programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Special guest and comic book legend Stan Lee takes a seat at the chef's table, where he and his friends comment about the action in the kitchen as the service progresses.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining four chefs sample one of Ramsay's complex entrees and then must re-create it correctly and two of the chefs face elimination.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The cooking competition reaches its climax, Gordon presides as the two remaining contestants choose a kitchen team made up of their former rivals. Who will best organise their former teammates and lead themselves to victory this year?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Ramsay splits the contestants into two teams along gender lines and asks them to present their signature dishes, with the winning team getting to spend an evening with William Shatner.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The men's team get a head start on the first challenge after some successful crab fishing, but can the women edge ahead when it comes to the cooking? Dinner service sees an infuriated Gordon throw an entire team out of the kitchen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: This time, the chefs are given a rude awakening as they are tasked with entering an icy lake early in the morning to match up fish heads to their correct bodies. The winning team end up getting even wetter during surfing lessons.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Konfrontasjon på Casa Diablo, del 1
programme.desc: Det oppstår kamp mellom Walker og et par voldelige brødre som leder et narkokartell.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Konfrontasjon på Casa Diablo, del 2
programme.desc: Kampen fortsetter mellom Walker og de narkolangende Ortega-brødrene, som har kidnappet Alex og Sydney.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Utrdikningslaget
programme.desc: Walkers utdrikningslag, en helg med camping med Trivette og Gage, blir avbrutt av en grizzlybjørn som har fått smaken på mennesker og av en voldelig forbryter som vil hindre rangerne i å vitne i rettssaken mot ham.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Bryllupsklokker, del 1
programme.desc: Walker og Alex gifter seg endelig i en vakker og rørende seremoni – men først må de overleve dødelige leiemordere som truer med å ødelegge bryllupet og livene deres.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Bryllupsklokker, del 2
programme.desc: Walker og Alex gifter seg endelig i en vakker og rørende seremoni – men først må de overleve dødelige leiemordere som truer med å ødelegge bryllupet og livene deres.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: De modiges hjem
programme.desc: Nyfødte babyer blir kidnappet fra det lokale sykehuset like etter at de ble født.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: A bikini photo shoot, a dress inspired by the movie The Princess Diaries II, and thirty dancers make up Janelle's Quinceanera. Let's hope her diva mother doesn't ruin it!

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: With the famous R&B singer Gerald Levert as her father, Carlysia gets what she wants. This includes a personal assistant and famous friends.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: Cher lives in a castle in the small town of Palm Harbor, Florida. Her best friend and mother is a V.I.P. of Saks Fifth Avenue. Cher's Sweet 16 theme is a Mardi Gras masquerade ball because it'll give her party a festive feel.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Shondas Ford Mustang Convertible. Hun ruller i vei i et pimpet og helt trafikksikkert kjøretøy.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Maxima Station Wagon
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Ezras Nissan Maxima Station Wagon. Han kjører av gårde i en mobil DJ-bås.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Volkswagen Baja
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Krissys Volkswagen Baja Bug. Boblen fra 1969 ble konstruert med holdbarhet som mål. Men med sitt bøyde eksosrør og sine ødelagte dører, kan den virkelig beskrives som alt annet enn akkurat det.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1987 Honda CRX
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Brians Honda CRX. Det er den første bilen som får en splitter ny motor, ettersom den gamle dør innen Xzibit får den inn på verkstedet.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Lara Flynn Boyle, Ashanti, Omarion (from B2K)
programme.desc: Lara Flynn Boyle (The Practice) gets the anti-Hollywood treatment, Ashanti rides the tour bus from hell and Omarion (B2K, You Got Served) makes every father's nightmare come true.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Taye Diggs, Rachael Leigh Cook, Halle Berry
programme.desc: Rachael Leigh Cook (She's all That) blows the whistle on an old man beat-down, Halle Berry (Gothika, Catwoman) is denied entrance into her own movie premiere and Taye Diggs (Brown Sugar) gets a touchy-feely examination from Dr. Punk'd.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Jaime Pressly, Blink 182 (Travis)
programme.desc: Travis Barker gets ready to throw down at dinner when his girlfriend's ex-boyfriend serves them up, Jaime Pressly, fashion entrepreneur or sweat shop slave driver and the Punk'd Foreign Press asks celebrities "important" questions on the red carpet.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Dave Mirra, OutKast, Amber Tamblyn
programme.desc: The Punk'd Feds get extreme on Dave Mirra (BMX pro), OutKast deals with the costs of a totaled luxury rental car and Amber Tamblyn (Joan of Arcadia) sits for a stranger's ooch and gets Punk'd doggie style.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Old Man Out pt. 2
programme.desc: Rollin manages to avoid the guards and get to the roof but is arrested before he can rescue Vossek.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Memory
programme.desc: The IMF must undermine "the Butcher of the Balkans," Janos Karq, by having his head of security capture an agent, Sparrow, who will then incriminate Karq.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Operation Rogosh
programme.desc: Imry Rogosh is a mass murderer who kills to foment political upheaval. He is targeting Los Angeles, so the IMF knocks him out in a car accident.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Odds On Evil
programme.desc: Prince Iben Kostas plans to use his money to finance a war, the IMF team must stop him before it's too late.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: A Spoon There Was
programme.desc: Rollin and Cinnamon go it alone to recover a reel of recording wire containing information on a chemical warfare project aimed at the U.S.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 307
programme.desc: Mads og Mia ønsker å flytte litt utenfor byen - men ikke helt på landet. Med Tobias og Mads sin hjelp kjøper de en bolig som har nøyaktig alt de ikke liker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 401
programme.desc: I første episode møter vi Tine og Lars, som har svimlende åtte millioner å kjøpe hus og pusse opp for. Men det store budsjettet har ikke hjulpet dem så langt - kan ekspertene være til hjelp?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 402
programme.desc: Ekspertene drar til Hørning, der presten og hennes familie trenger et nytt sted å bo. De leier et lite rekkehus og nå vil de gjerne flytte.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 404
programme.desc: Ida og Rasmus drømmer om å bytte ut sine lille leiebolig på Nørrebro med en murervilla i Hillerød. Men de angrer bittert på at de har spurt ekspertene om hjelp når de får se huset pengene gikk til.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Luleå
programme.desc: Tareq visits Luleå, home to the beautiful Tree Hotel: a collection of treehouses built by an award winning architect. Following the river further up into the mountains he reaches the land where, for centuries, the Sami people kept their reindeer herds.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Halmstad
programme.desc: In Halmstad Tareq explores the contrast between the busy summer scene at the beach and the quiet rural country life, meeting Jörgen Persson: award winning table tennis player and visiting a village famous for its cheese.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kemi
programme.desc: Kemi is situated in northern Finland by the Bothnian Bay and it is part of Lapland region. Tareq tries his luck at a spot of burbot fishing on the frozen sea and visits the snow castle hotel.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: West Sweden
programme.desc: Situated on the west coast of Sweden, Bohuslän is a place where you can really feel the history of fishing all around a tradition that is still active. Tareq will be harvesting supreme quality oysters and lobsters and cook some wonderful seafood dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Florø
programme.desc: Tareq visits Norway and Florø to celebrate their national day -17th of May. Surrounded by breathtaking archipelagos and stunning fjords he dives for scallops in the north sea, cooking at mountain peaks and exploring the history of norwegian salmon

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia
programme.desc: Tareq makes his way across the baltic sea to Estonia and the capital Tallinn. He discovers the historical treasures of the city and its thriving culinary life before he heads out into the vast and beautiful countryside and the national park of Soomaa.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Ringkøbing
programme.desc: Ringkøbing, a lovely old market town located at the west coast of Denmark. Here, Tareq visit a traditional Herring Festival and meets up with local entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever-changing environment.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Falkenberg
programme.desc: Something is definitely happening in Falkenberg on the west coast of Sweden. Over the last couple of years it have become somewhat of a haven for foodies. Tareq is on a mission; taking him through a fertile landscape with vineyards and salmon fishing.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Vicky And Holly's Task
programme.desc: Cancun-kaoset fortsetter når Gaz feirer fødselsdag i sann Geordie-ånd. Charlotte tar ferieromansen sin til neste nivå. Vulkan Vicky bryter ut mens Cancun Chris tar hevn ved å sende henne og Holly på en kjøretur.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Tequila Trip
programme.desc: Vicky og Ricci rekker Beccas fest. Chris straffer alle for å drikke tequilaen hans og sender Charlotte og Gary ut i natta for å finne mer. Sterke Sophie sender Joel hjem til England, men angrer fort, og Gary tar seg en trekant med lesbene til Holly.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Argument
programme.desc: En uventet samtale gjør at James må velge mellom bestevennene og Holly. Gary får en annen trekant Charlotte tar en kveld på byen for å glemme Gary, men det slutter med katastrofe.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Vicky's Having Doubts
programme.desc: Gutter mot jenter er tilbake og Charlotte og Gaz prater ikke sammen, Becca og Jay krangler og Holly og James er kjølige. Klarer Gaz å rette opp den dårlige stemningen? Riccy og Gaz prøver å finne forlovelsesring til Vicky og Gaz blir avslørt.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Big Question
programme.desc: Ferien er snart over og huset rystes av tapet av nok et medlem. Ricci planlegger sitt frieri til Vicky, James og Holly prøver ut fjæringen i rullestolen og Charlotte går til sengs med Gary. Cancun har forandret Geordie Shore-huset for bestandig.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: From the First Fist Pump
programme.desc: Et underholdende tilbakeblikk på de første tre sesongene av Jersey Shore - med all moroa, dramatikken, skurkestrekene og avkjølende øyeblikk som folk ikke kan slutte å snakke om.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Going to Italia
programme.desc: Deltakerne pakker extensions og Shore Store-T-skjorter og drar på europeisk eventyr i Italia. Men kultursjokket som venter er ingenting sammenliknet med de sjokkerende, nye romansene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Like More than a Friend
programme.desc: Deena og Pauly vurderer konsekvensene av sex, mens Mike prøver å ta forholdet til Snooki ett skritt videre. På klubben prøver Ron og Sammi å bli venner, men gamle vaner, gode og dårlige, er vonde å vende.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Twinning
programme.desc: Tvillinger gir dobbelt så mye trøbbel når 'bi-nysgjerrige' Deena raner Mike og Vinny. Mikes hemmelige 'forhold' til Snooki blir avslørt. Er Snooki utro eller vil The Situation bare lage bråk?

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Guttene plager Deena fordi hun stjal en jente fra Vinnys seng - og hun begynner å tvile på forholdet til de andre. Ronnie & Sam er tilbake i gamle vaner, men nå er Mike innblandet i deres problemer.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: And the Wall Won
programme.desc: Mike har lagt trøbbel for Ron og Sam i årevis. Det ender i slåsskamp, og Mike bæres ut på båre. Har ting gått for langt? Og er forholdet mellom Sam og Ron nå fullstendig ødelagt?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: På banen
programme.desc: Det storslagne Cowboys stadion er stedet for DCCs avsluttende prøvedansing. Presset blir høyt for 69 nye jenter når 18 DCC-veteraner deltar i den ettertraktede invitasjonen til treningsleiren.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Treningsleiren
programme.desc: DCCs treningsleir begynner på Valley Ranch i kveld! De nye kandidatene stresser påtagelig foran treningsleiren mens de kjemper for å endre planene og sikre nye boformer i Dallas.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Den brømte uniformen
programme.desc: To uker inn i treningsleiren, forbereder Kelli og Judy sin første opptreden. Ukens øvelser er viktige for alle jentene. De forventes å beherske de verdensberømte DCC-sparkene og splitthoppene.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Fornyelse
programme.desc: På treningsleirens tredje uke blir nybegynnerne DCC-fornyet. Hår og sminke blir piffet opp når de blir støpt i DCC-formen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Portrettfotografering
programme.desc: Kveldens øvelser begynner med et smell da teknisk sjef for DCC, Kitty Carter, kommer på overraskende besøk til Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Feltøvelse
programme.desc: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders er to uker unna første omgang, og DCC-sjefen Kelli McGonagill Finglass og koreografen Judy Trammel er presset for at de skal klare utvelgingen og offentliggjøre laget.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Kiko, Tootsie & Ginger, and Binkey

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lexi Rivera
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kaster Rob, Steelo og Lexi Rivera seg inn i spillet med noen 'Nattatleter', tar en slumsete drink laget av noen 'Sleivete miksologer' og feirer irriterende forhold i 'Elsker å hate dem'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lexi Rivera II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' benytter Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lexi Rivera de bevegelige trappene i 'Opptrappet smerte', møter morderiske barn som muligens er 'Foreldrekverkere' og kan ikke krysse gaten uten å oppleve 'Overgangskræsj'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' fyrer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood av noen 'Skliskudd', starter hårete branner 'I fyr og flamme' og krangler om rot i 'Snuskete kjærlighet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood tak i en partner og nyter 'Parskøyting', gjør seg klar til en underholdende kveld i 'Brettspillmiserer' og opplever hvor tøft det er å dele rom med 'Pottesure papegøyer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvilken terrengbåt de helst velger i 'Landjakk', ser på alle måtene barn kan sette seg fast i 'Smårollingfeller' og avslutter med distre folk som er 'Uten romforståelse'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood i gang kjøretøyene sine i 'Flyktende motorer', vender det andre kinnet til i 'Overraskelseskyss' og hogger i vei med litt 'Økseanarki'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood L
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og deres spesielle gjest Lolo Wood, redd for å få sprøyter i 'Stikkpanikk', får igjen verbalt i 'Ta igjen-attakk' og føler hele dekkmønsteret når de blir 'Overkjørt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at uhell elsker selskap i 'Du blir med meg', strever med vekter i 'Verstinger med vekstang' og møter noen fryktelig glade papper i 'Overentusiastiske fedre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' smasher Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood handlevogner med 'Vognkrasjere', deler luftyogaens felles smerte med 'Dinglende duoer' og blir banket opp av gårdsdyr i 'Buskapssmell'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' faller Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood lett i 'Henfallen til fall', forbauser aper voldsomt med 'Apemagi' og har problemer med å finne tingene sine i 'Borte, men funnet'.

programme.desc: Andromeda-mannskapet går opp for å finne ut hvem som drepte en gruppe forskere.

programme.title: Andromeda: Opphøyet grunn, strålende datter
programme.desc: Andromeda-mannskapet går opp for å finne ut hvem som drepte en gruppe forskere.

programme.desc: Samlerne kontrollerer nå Commonwealth og setter Andromeda-mannskapet for retten.

programme.title: Andromeda: Spider's Stratagem
programme.desc: Andromeda oppdager en forsendelse med biorustning.

programme.title: Andromeda: Varmen fra et usynlig lys
programme.desc: En eksperimentell tilsløringsenhet slipper Dylan inn i et alternativt univers.

programme.title: Andromeda: De andre
programme.desc: Andromeda blir fanget i en krig mellom to skip, og den inkluderer en dødelig sykdom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: A man disappears one year to the day after beginning an affair with his friend's wife. 15 years later, with the help of a metal detector, police find evidence that would prove what had happened and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found under an isolated highway ramp, a unique fiber on the victim's clothing leads San Diego police straight to the most unlikely of killers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A go-go dancer told her family she needed to get away for a while and then she simply disappeared. Investigators were suspicious, because she took neither her car nor her clothes. 20 years later, her family received a call that changed everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: A Colorado hunter is the victim of a well-planned crime. Investigators suspect two weapons and two killers. But forensic evidence points them in a different direction — one much closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California firefighters battled ten arson fires in three weeks. When cigarettes and a scrap of paper connected the case to similar fires further north, the hunt was on for a dangerous pyromaniac.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: In 2002, a small community in upstate New York was devastated when Patty Wlasiuk died in a truck accident. But burdock seed pods found in her hair and on her clothes indicated that this was no accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: When a woman disappeared without a trace, there were two possible explanations: kidnapping or murder. Careful investigation, a forensic artist and DNA profiling enabled police to find a single suspect, who was known to prey upon vulnerable women.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Alaskan hikers discover a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Investigators find a tuft of red carpet fibers clinging to the sheet — threads of evidence which lead them straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: Prompted by news of a flight attendant's brutal murder, the son of a previous victim contacts police. Both murders have similar MOs, and biological evidence proves that these were serial killings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A two-man shrimp boat sinks when a fast-moving, violent storm strikes the Louisiana coast. The captain drowns, but the deckhand is rescued fourteen hours later. The crewman is hailed as a hero — until the captain's body is discovered.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode includes: Miraculous Escape, UD: G.I. Dad, Phantom Judge & UD, and Coffee Pot Twins & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: Baron 52 Crew, UD: Mary & Martha, and Stamper's Rampage & UD

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: Goldie's Girl & UD, UD: Who's Tyler?, Til Death Do Us Part & UD, and Thanks Big Brother & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode includes: St. James' Ghost, Ghostly Attraction, Where Is She Now? and Calling Dr. Fraud & UD

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode includes: Past Lives, Murder & Extortion, UD: Smitty, 48-hour Fraud & UD, and Mystery Clerk & UD.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Stranger in Town
programme.desc: She appeared on the highway in the spring, a young woman, her life cut short, her past and her identity a mystery. Only by finding out who she was could we ever hope to find her killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files: When Seconds Count
programme.desc: On July 2nd 1994, a 12-year-old girl was abducted from her home in northern California. The FBI knows to act fast, search wide, enlist volunteers. But as the hours slipped by, agents also realized their chances for recovering her alive grew slim.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Vanished
programme.desc: A daring kidnapping and a bizarre ransom note baffled Mississippi authorities. The victim was the wife of a wealthy businessman. A list of 12 names and a few drops of blood were the only clues to her fate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Unlawful Flight
programme.desc: In Alabama, two desperate criminals fled the custody of a local deputy. Eluding authorities, they made their way across the country in a wave of car theft, abduction, and murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Grave Discoveries
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives: A Federal Offense
programme.desc: When there's a difficult case to crack  whether it involves drugs, arson, or weapons  the investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms have the means to crack it.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Living In Terror
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Women Who Kill
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Soldier Stories
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Razor Ruddock's Home
programme.desc: We visit the home of Soccer legend Neil "Razor" Ruddock which seems to be haunted. Is it his home specifically? Or are these ghosts attached to him?

programme.title: Past Hunters: Mill Street Barracks
programme.desc: Built in 1861 Mill Street Barracks is steeped in rich history. It has accommodated many branches of the armed forces throughout its life. Like many other barracks it has also been used as a morgue making it a prime location for the supernatural.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Stranger in the Blitz
programme.desc: Damaged during the blitz, the location the team investigate was a former war hospital for the injured and wounded, based in Liverpool, UK.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Celebrity Special - The Black Horse in Pluckley Village
programme.desc: Bex and Sean are joined by reality TV star Charlie Doherty in the most haunted village in the UK and investigate the most haunted pub in the UK, The Black Horse.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Piano Plays a Ghost Song
programme.desc: Following reports of loud voices and footsteps heard when no one else is around, staff seeing dark shadows fleeting through the empty corridors, to several pianos playing by themselves, Ghost Dimension head into Champness Hall.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Wait! Don't Read The Results Yet Steve...
programme.desc: Sharina thinks that Clarence is cheating on her because he’s always out late. Plus, Chrystal doesn’t want Earnie’s ex Tenyia to live with them just because she’s the mother of his child.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Is My Husband the Abuser?
programme.desc: Joyia is desperate to keep her friend Stephanie from going back to her problematic ex Scott. But she still loves him! Will she have the strength to leave him?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Jack is worried about his grandchildren because his daughter-in-law Carol has been negligent and hot-tempered. Then, Kendra explains why she suddenly put Corey’s baby up for adoption.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Teenager Megan lives with her older controlling boyfriend Rick. Megan cannot attend school, find a job, or even eat without his OK! Can her aunt and Steve get through to her?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Fake Your Pregnancies?
programme.desc: Dennis claims his ex-girlfriend Kendal keeps tied down with pregnancy lies! He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve’s DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Results Revealed: Did She Cheat?
programme.desc: Justin is convinced that girlfriend Lainie has been cheating on him, and more importantly that he’s not the father of their child. But his own insecurities have led him to turn violent. Also, Steven doubts whether Ashley’s child is his.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bullet With My Name On It
programme.desc: In his first year on the force, rookie patrol officer Joe Kenda quickly learns the ropes. But when he tries to singlehandedly stop a brawling mob, he finds himself facing down gunfire.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: End of Days
programme.desc: The discovery of a family home littered with corpses tasks Kenda with unspooling the paranoid obsessions of a diseased mind, and forces him to confront his greatest fear.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Mr. Violence
programme.desc: 29yr old Chris is shot in cold blood outside a neighborhood bar. Faced with a trio of suspects, Kenda trusts his gut and makes a controversial decision.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: Kenda encounters one of the most horrendous crime scenes of his career, but his hunt for a homicidal maniac leads him to the most unexpected of killers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Mr. LA
programme.desc: A young man tries to flee a violent scene, but is shot dead behind the wheel of his car. A peculiar clue puts Kenda hot on the heels of a self-styled gangster with revenge on his mind.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Threat
programme.desc: A suspected drug dealer would stop at nothing to keep local and federal authorities from building a case against him. When his organization started targeting the government itself, federal agencies went on high alert.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Coffee Shop Murders
programme.desc: At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Remorse
programme.desc: A small town without any crime was turned inside out by the arrival of one dangerous stranger. Some killers are cold and calculating; others are impulsive, unpredictable, and hard to pin down.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Global Pursuit
programme.desc: In Langley, Virginia, a terrorist fired into rush hour traffic. The victims seemed randomly selected, but the motive appeared to be political, targeting employees of the Central Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Death of Princess Diana - Tragic Car Accident or Murder Most Foul?
programme.desc: An investigation into the various conspiracy theories revolving around the tragic death of Diana, The People's Princess, in Paris in August 1997.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Secret Space Program
programme.desc: Were the Mercury, Genesis, Apollo and Space Shuttle programs mere window dressing designed for public consumption?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Werewolves
programme.desc: The legend of the werewolf throughout history and in various cultures is explored. The Conspiracy Show travels to England and rural Wisconsin to investigate claims of actual werewolf sightings.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Mill Street Barracks
programme.desc: Built in 1861 Mill Street Barracks is steeped in rich history. It has accommodated many branches of the armed forces throughout its life. Like many other barracks it has also been used as a morgue making it a prime location for the supernatural.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Hack Green Secret Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: The Hack Green Secret Nuclear Bunker is a former government-owned nuclear bunker located at Hack Green, Cheshire, England. It Started as a decoy site for enemy bombers but later developed into a legitimate base. Now it is ripe with hauntings.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Drakelow Tunnels
programme.desc: The Drakelow Tunnels are a former underground military complexused mainly for storage. However, during the construction and running of this facility, 6 people are thought to have died.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Vow of Silence and Cryptic
programme.desc: A single mother's new home was once a convent that kept a horrifying secret. A couple is tormented by the meaning of a date that keeps appearing in their new home.

programme.title: Andromeda: Biter av åtte
programme.desc: Citizen Eight prøver å fjerne Dylan fra kommandoen over Andromeda.

programme.title: Mutant X: The Prophecy
programme.desc: Brennan kjemper med en Guardian of the Prophecy for å stoppe den avdøde mutanten Ashlockes plan utover verdensherredømmets grav.

programme.title: Mutant X: Cirque des Merveilles
programme.desc: Lexas mistanker får Mutant X til å avdekke en omreisende dødsleir, som blir presentert som et sirkus for mutante flyktninger og Mutant Xs fiende i Dominion.

programme.title: Mutant X: The Assault
programme.desc: Mange av mysteriene rundt Mutant X blir avslørt når Lexa og Jesse blir fanget av Dominion, og teamet, sammen med Adam, går inn for å redde dem.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: Mens Nigel øver sin hovedtale på et hotellrom i Sevilla, knekker en jente nesten nesen og krever noe - det viser seg at hun var ute etter vannet fra Fountain of Youth.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Arthur's Cross
programme.desc: Scotland Yard kaller Sidney og Nigel for å identifisere et drapsvåpen fra 500-tallet. Det viser seg å være gravkorset til King Arthur, men i tillegg til offeret leter flere andre etter det.

programme.title: On the Case: The Art of Murder
programme.desc: In order to solve the murder of a talented young art student, investigators must first unravel a bizarre web of jealousy and deceit.

programme.title: On the Case: Trapped by Lies
programme.desc: Before police can catch a depraved killer of a 15 year old girl, they must first unravel a puzzling series of lies.

programme.title: On the Case: Unmasking a Killer
programme.desc: A beautiful grad student is found murdered inside a yoga apparel store. On the surface it appeared she was the victim of a botched robbery, but remarkable police work revealed a far more sinister plot.

programme.title: On the Case: Campus Killer
programme.desc: When a young girl goes missing from her university campus, her mother is forced to lead an investigation for the truth. Can she find her precious daughter before it's too late?

programme.title: On the Case: River of Sadness
programme.desc: A heartbreaking mystery begins with the discovery of a young woman's body floating in Washington state's Yakima River.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Dr. Charles Sophy, Drew's News
programme.desc: Dr. Charles Sophyis joining Drew. Plus, an all-new Drew-gooderfeaturing a hero mailman. Drew and Ross Mathewsare serving the news sunny-side upin an all-newDrew's News!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's Merrymore X People Magazine Giveaway Show
programme.desc: Drew & Ross Mathews host Drew MerryMore X People Magazine Holiday Giveaway. Studio audience of Drew-gooders get $300K in gifts. Drew highlights Drew-Gooders making difference in community.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Kristina Zias, Drew's News
programme.desc: Kristina Zias talks nostalgic fashion trends and wedding etiquette with Drew & Ross Mathews. Brendan Fraser's comeback and scientific reasons behind listening to sad songs on Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Mindy Kaling, Drew's News
programme.desc: Mindy Kaling talks holiday prep with kids, shares behind-the-scenes stories from "The Office" and "Oceans 8" and more. Drew & Ross Mathews cover snooze button science, dating ghosting debate, and saving a NY deli on Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News, Money-Saving Holiday MealFor Next Gathering
programme.desc: Pilar Valdes and Drew share money-saving holiday meal. Drew & Ross Mathews talk empowering single moms, Greta Gerwig's thoughts on a movie, and feature Drew-crime segment with two great grandmas stopping a purse snatcher. (200)

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Aubrey Plaza, Savannah Guthrie
programme.desc: "Today" co-anchor Savannah Guthrie is serving the news sunny-side up with Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk and dishing on her new series "Princess Power." Aubrey Plaza stops by to chat about the follow-up to "The Return of the Christmas Witch."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Gabe LaBelle, Chef Melissa King
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines in an all-new Drew's News. Drew chats with "The Fabelmans" star Gabe LaBelle who shares what it was like working with and portraying a young Steven Spielberg. Chef Melissa King joins Drew in the kitchen.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Emily in Paris" Cast
programme.desc: The cast of "Emily in Paris" including Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo stop by to chat about the new season. The cast is also participating in an "Emily in Paris" style makeover for a deserving audience member.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew & A with Cast of "Emily in Paris," Pilar Valdes
programme.desc: "Emily in Paris" stars Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo are joining Drew for a round of Drew & A. Pilar Valdes is joining Drew in the kitchen to whip up some yummy crepes.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Pilar Valdes, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathewsare covering the news including headlines like the study that found mammals who have friends live longer and the ice cream shop in D.C. serving everyone, even those who can't pay! Pilar Valdesis back with a new Pro Tips with Pilar.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Tig Notaro, Drew's News
programme.desc: "Your Place or Mine" star Tig Notaro is telling Drew about working with Reese Witherspoon on their new film and the latest season of "The Morning Show."

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Strange Case of Kurt Sonnenfeld
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Doctor's Daughter
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Idaho Student Murders
programme.desc: Criminology Ph.D. student Bryan Kohberger is charged with the murder of four University of Idaho students. Kaylee Goncalves, Ethan Chapin, Xana Kernodle, and Madison Mogen were found dead in their off-campus home in November 2022.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death After Midnight
programme.desc: A report on the 2012 death of Ashley Fallis, a married mother of three who was found with a single gunshot wound to the head in the bedroom of her Evans, Colorado home.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dark Voyage
programme.desc: A report on events surrounding the mysterious death of aspiring actress Ashley Barnett on the cruise ship "Paradise" in October 2005.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dangerous Liaisons
programme.desc: A report on the July 2003 murder of Sandra Rozzo of Pinellas Park, Florida, including the police investigation that led to the eventual conviction and imprisonment of her ex-lover Timothy ‘Tracey’ Humphrey and his wife Ashley Laney Humphrey.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 72
programme.desc: Judge Judy Sheindlin, a former judge from New York, tackles actual, small claims cases with her no-nonsense attitude.

programme.desc: Judge Judy Sheindlin, a former judge from New York, tackles actual, small claims cases with her no-nonsense attitude.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 12
programme.desc: Judge Judy Sheindlin, a former judge from New York, tackles actual, small claims cases with her no-nonsense attitude.

programme.title: Cops: Wardrobe Malfunction
programme.desc: A suspect flees police in a truck over a misdemeanor traffic warrant. A man denies hitting his wife who has a bloody nose. A man denies ownership of his shorts when deputies find drugs in them.

programme.title: Cops: High Speed Golf
programme.desc: Deputies pursue a truck with a trailer full of golf carts. Police question a driver after finding a mask and handgun in his car. Officers are called to a traffic collision involving a semi and an SUV.

programme.title: Cops: Bumper Cars
programme.desc: A man rams his wife's car into his daughter's car. Deputies find a rifle in a suspect's car that was in a prior altercation. A man claims to run a travel business after cops find evidence of id theft.

programme.title: Cops: Doggie Dispute
programme.desc: Deputies pursue a man wanted in connection with a family violence call. Detectives are called to a dispute between neighbors over an unleashed dog.

programme.title: Cops: Rocks in my Socks
programme.desc: Deputies discover a purse and a sock containing paraphernalia during an arrest. Deputies pursue an intoxicated motorcyclist. A woman is suspected of stealing a cake.

programme.title: Cops: Special Delivery
programme.desc: Deputies prevent the delivery of a pillow stuffed with drugs. A disabled woman calls the law when a father and son get into a fist fight. Deputies confront an intoxicated man riding a bike.

programme.title: Cops: Memory Loss
programme.desc: A man on parole dumps a stolen car and flees from officers on foot. A man denies stealing a wallet from a car with a smashed window. A hostile woman gives officers a false name.

programme.title: Cops: Up for Sainthood
programme.desc: Officers pursue two juveniles involved in a carjacking. Two men sitting in a truck are spotted hiding something in the console. A man claims he took drug paraphernalia from kids as a good samaritan.

programme.title: Cops: Beer Run
programme.desc: A carjacking results in a chase and a flipped vehicle. Suspects crash a truck after attempting to steal beer. A man attempts to swallow his drugs during a bust.

programme.title: Cops: Petrol Heist
programme.desc: Officers wrestle an uncooperative driver to the ground after a traffic stop. Deputies search for a man who sent threatening texts to his ex-girlfriend. Two suspects are caught stealing gas.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: (Ruth Légeret Case) Bloody Christmas next to the Leman lake
programme.desc: On January 4, 2006, Ruth Légeret was found dead in the middle of a pool of blood at her luxurious property in Vevey, Switzerland. Next to her was the lifeless body of her friend, Marina Studer. Who could have killed these two simple and wealthy widows?

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Willy Pomonti Case
programme.desc: Willy Pomonti, a retired architect, is found savagely murdered in his opulent villa in La Celle-Saint-Cloud, near Paris. It soon becomes clear that the man has been tortured prior to death.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Night of Horror at Devil's Plateau (Marie-Jeanne Meyer Case)
programme.desc: On June 18, 2011, Marie-Jeanne Meyer, 17-years old, waved goodbye to her sister before leaving for her daily jog on the heights of Tournon in Ardèche. Three days later, her mutilated body was found in a freshly dug pit, near an area known to be cursed.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Adeline Piet Case
programme.desc: A man walks into a gendarmerie near Saint-Malo to report that his wife has been missing since the previous day. The couple are going through a divorce, but this mother would never have left her seven children alone! What has happened to Adeline Piet?

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)
programme.desc: On March 31, 2003, firefighters were called to a fire in a housing estate of Meyrargues, near Aix-en-Provence. On site, they discovered a horrific scene: the tortured and charred bodies of a mother and her daughter, Chantal and Audrey D'Amato.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 507
programme.desc: 13. desember 2008 skjer det som omtales som den verste brannen i Oslo siden krigen, i Urtegata på Grønland. Det ble fort mistenkt at brannen var påsatt.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 505
programme.desc: I 1999 brenner huset til Knut Øyvind Moe ned til grunnen i Valdres. To dager senere blir levningene hans hentet ut av brannruinene, og det viser seg at han ble skutt og drept i forkant av brannen.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 607
programme.desc: Den 7. april 2017 var Stockholm den neste i rekken av hovedstader som ble utsatt for terrorhandlinger. I denne episoden følger vi politiets ekstremt intense jakt på terroristen Rakhmat Akilov.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 103
programme.desc: To turgåere finner et utbrent lik på et bål langs en øde skogsbilvei på Veståsen i Søndre Land. I flere uker står politiet helt uten svar på hvem som kan stå bak den groteske handlingen.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En tidlig februarmorgen i Stockholm melder en mann sin kone, Sacha, savnet. Etter hvert som politiet graver i parets fortid, oppdager de et turbulent forhold under den tilsynelatende ryddige overflaten.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Chimes at Midnight
programme.desc: After Vincent entrusts Snow's ring to Diana, she quickly discovers Gabriel's henchman have targeted her and soon kidnap her and take her to Gabriel.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Invictus
programme.desc: With Vincent caged, Gabriel allows him to see his infant son who suddenly begins to make a miraculous recovery.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: In the Forests of the Night
programme.desc: Rolley is shot while trying to rob a liquor store and takes refuge in the tunnels.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Reckoning"
programme.desc: A woman whom Father knows returns to the city. She asks him to join her and he considers it. At the same time Diana is working on a murder. And it turns that the victim is someone Father knows.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Legacies
programme.desc: Upon returning to "The World Below" upon the knowledge of some of ex-tunnel inhabitants being murdered, Father encounters Gregory Coyle who seeks revenge for the death of his father by cave-in 20 years ago.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Long Distance Call
programme.desc: A toy telephone becomes the link between a young boy and his dead grandmother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: 100 Yards over the Rim
programme.desc: A pioneer from a wagon train in 1847 sets off to find something for his ill son and stumbles into present-day New Mexico.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Rip Van Winkle Caper
programme.desc: After successfully stealing a gold shipment, a group of criminals and their scientist accomplice put themselves in suspended animation in a remote desert cave. When they awaken decades later, complications ensue when their truck is destroyed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Curious Case of Edgar Witherspoon
programme.desc: A woman tries to get her Uncle Edgar committed, believing that he is senile. The investigating doctor finds Edgar living in an apartment containing all kinds of junk.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Extra Innings
programme.desc: Ex-baseball player Ed Hamler, lame from an injury and forced to retire early is given a 1909 baseball card of a player that looks exactly like him. The card is magical in that he becomes drawn into it and lives out the life of the player in the past.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Crossing
programme.desc: A stressed-out priest repeatedly encounters a station wagon containing a young girl. The car keeps crashing and bursting into flames.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hunters
programme.desc: A young boy falls into an undiscovered cave near a housing project. An archeologist studies strange paintings on its walls and then bizarre things begin to happen. Cave items move around and animals are killed and brought into the cave.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Silence
programme.desc: Annoyed by a club member's constant chatter, a man bets him he cannot remain silent for a year, living in a glass enclosure in the club basement.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Shadow Play
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: JAG: Enemy Below
programme.desc: Kabir is preparing an attack against the U.S. and was last seen crossing the border from Afghanistan to Iran. He is believed to have recruited Capt. Yerastov, a Russian submarine captain. Turner, Harm and Mac help in the hunt for the terrorists.

programme.title: JAG: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Bud has lost his right lower leg due to a mine in Afghanistan; during emergency surgery he faces bad trouble. Sturgis returns to Washington, and Harm and Mac disobey an order from the admiral. Bud encounters an astounding change of course.

programme.title: JAG: Dangerous Game
programme.desc: A deputy sheriff dies while chasing a car carrying two SEALs in a Navy exercise. The driver stands trial for negligent homicide.

programme.title: JAG: In Thin Air
programme.desc: Lt. Albrecht and Lt. Cmdr. Zuzello make Zuzello’s farewell flight before he retires. All is fine until Albrecht notices that his partner is passed out from hypoxia. Albrecht makes an emergency landing on the ship.Harm is sent to the ship to investigate.

programme.title: JAG: Need to Know
programme.desc: As a favor from Congresswoman Lillian Dorning, SECNAV Sheffield asks the JAG staff to get the story of a submarine, USS Angel Shark (SSGN-559), which was lost on a CIA mission in 1968.

programme.title: Happy Days: Goin' to Chicago
programme.desc: While in Chicago with their high school choir, Richie, Ralph, and Potsie sneak by their chaperons, wind up on the wrong side of an unsympathetic downtown nightclub owner, and win the sympathy of a kind-hearted cocktail waitress.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Cunningham Caper
programme.desc: Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.

programme.title: Happy Days: Get A Job
programme.desc: It's a new experience for Richie when he becomes romantically attracted to an "older woman."

programme.title: Happy Days: Cruisin'
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie, and Ralph Malph visit another part of town to meet some girls and find themselves in trouble when the girls' boyfriends show up. Fonzie steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Fonzarelli Part I
programme.desc: For a television show, the Fonz sets a record by jumping his motorcycle over fourteen garbage cans. He ends up crashing into Arnold's chicken stand, and while recuperating from a broken leg, upsets the regimen of the Cunningham household.

programme.title: Happy Days: Football Frolics
programme.desc: To raise money for the big football game, the boys decide to start their own babysitting service. In Football Frolics, Richie, Potsie and Ralph have their hopes set on seeing the big football game of the year, but tickets can't be found anywhere.

programme.title: Happy Days: Two Angry Men
programme.desc: When Fonzie sets a pigeon coop atop the Cunningham garage and the roof caves, Mr. Cunningham sues to collect damages. In Two Angry Men, Laverne and Shirley prevail upon Fonzie to care for a coop of pigeons.

programme.title: Happy Days: Sight for Sore Eyes
programme.desc: After reading too many foreign car manuals, Fonzie is plagued with headaches and is forced to wear glasses for a few weeks, but fears glasses aren't cool.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Loves Pinky Part II
programme.desc: The Malachi brothers sabotage Pinky's car the night before the demolition derby.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Anitta takes on the wings of death and talks about Brazilian snacks, live performances and staying positive.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Tenacious D Gets Rocked By Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Jack Black and Kyle Gass have been rocking crowds as Tenacious D for more than two decades.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Maisie Williams Shivers Uncontrollably While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Maisie Williams is an Emmy-nominated actress and star of "Game of Thrones."

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Jonas Brothers Burn Up While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The Jonas Brothers kick off a new season with more guests and more wings than the table has ever seen.

programme.title: Hot Ones: DJ Snake Reveals His Human Side While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: You might not recognize DJ Snake walking down the street, but once you hear his discography, the lights go.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: End Game
programme.desc: In January 1945, Nazi Germany faces defeat as Allied armies close in. Hitler, aged 55 and in poor health, remains defiant in his Berlin bunker. On April 30th, 1945, Hitler commits suicide, and days later, Germany surrenders, ending World War II.

programme.title: Secret War: Agent Garbo
programme.desc: Juan Pujol, MI6's WWII agent "Garbo," created a fictitious spy network in Lisbon, deceiving the Germans with crucial disinformation and influencing their strategies. After the war, MI6 protected him, and he lived in Venezuela until his death in 1988.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Barbarossa Unleashed 1941
programme.desc: E1 begins with a brief examination of the rationale of hatred projected by Hitler onto the Soviet-Slavic-Jewish world. Then it leaps forward, to see Hitler initiate an invasion of the USSR.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The AK-47, the world's deadliest firearm, sparked a Cold War race for superior assault rifles like the American M4 and German HK 416. Host Wil Willis explores its history, from Mikhail Kalashnikov's WWII experiences to its assembly and lethal impact.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Former U.S. Army Ranger Wil Willis tests modern combat shotguns like the Benelli M4 and Mossberg 590, alongside historic models.This documentary features 3D animations and weapon tests to explore effectiveness of combat shotguns.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Møtet med førstedamen
programme.desc: Et føderalt bureau begynner å undersøke iCarly-gjengen etter at de hacker seg inn på et sikkerhetsnettverk for å holde nettfødselsdag for Carlys far. Gjestestjerne - Michelle Obama.

programme.title: iCarly: Billetten
programme.desc: Gjengen, minus Carly, tar med Sam til Canadian Fat Cake-fabrikken, men oppdager så at Sam ikke får komme tilbake inn i USA. I mens får Carly bekymringer i badekaret når hun gjør seg klar til daten sin.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Yakima
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt disset i et intervju om iCarly, prøver Freddie å vise sin kreative side gjennom å webb-sende iCarly i 3D. Spencer ansetter en assistent som han ikke har råd til å betale.

programme.title: iCarly: Tabber
programme.desc: Christopher Cane, skuespilleren som spiller Rex on Victorious, venner tilbake som vert i et dyptgående intervju med stjernerne fra iCarly og viser deres supergøyale tabber og bortklipte scener. Gjestestjerne: Rex fra Victorious

programme.title: iCarly: Fortsatt like gal
programme.desc: Ettr å ha fått beskjed om at Nora Dershlit blir løslatt fra fengselet, ser iCarly-gjengen på hva de kan gjøre for å holde sin gamle kidnapper bak lås og slå. Imens oppdager Freddies mor den virkelige T-Bo.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly møter One Direction
programme.desc: Carly får en smittsom sykdom og kommer til å smitte et medlem i bandet One Direction. I mens skal Spencer trene en liten jente som ikke kan fordra å morsjonere.

programme.title: iCarly: Restauranten
programme.desc: Gibby åpner en hemmelig restaurant i skolens kjeller med Sams hjelp. Og Spencer designer en sikkerhetsrobot til hjemmebruk, som plutselig mister fokus helt.

programme.title: iCarly: Aprilsnarr
programme.desc: I dette spesielle aprilsnarr-avsnittet blir Carly og Spencer satt på gaten, så gjengen sitter og tenker tilbake på sin tid i Bushwell Plaza. Men minnene deres stemmer kanskje ikke alltid helt med hvordan vi husker hendelsene.

programme.title: iCarly: Dårlig stemning i butikken
programme.desc: Freddies nye drømmejobb i Pear Store blir et mareritt når Sam også blir ansatt. Imens prøver Carly å bli inviteret ut av en fra Pear Store, og Spencer må melde seg til frivillig jobb på den lokale brannstasjonen.

programme.title: iCarly: Halloween
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen holder en "Halfoween"-fest, for de syns at det skal være Halloween to ganger i året. Men da en forkledd gjest spiller Carly og vennene et puss, blir festen litt for vill.

programme.title: CBS Morning News
programme.desc: CBS News Mornings is a live daily morning news show that is anchored by Anne-Marie Green. Get ahead on the latest news by streaming the most important national and global stories first thing in the morning.

programme.title: CBS Mornings
programme.desc: Reporting on international news stories, interviews, and in-depth pieces, covering topics from news, sports, climate and technology to race, health, parenting and personal finance.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7 Mornings
programme.desc: Få med deg de seneste nyhetene fra CBS direkte her med omfattende nyhetsreportasjer døgnet rundt fra hele verden.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Camp
programme.desc: Mikey trains for High Arctic survival with the Canadian Rangers. The Air Force invades Chuck's hangar. Joe faces tough competition at a California plane auction.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Frozen Solid
programme.desc: AJ and James battle a DC-4 engine fire. It's Joe's 69th birthday - and he's never flown a helicopter before, so Mikey plans a special gift of chopper flight lessons.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Power Crash
programme.desc: Cory, Chuck and Brian watch as a 5,000-pound power unit smash to the ground, denting the Electra and putting it out of commission. Mikey scrambles to manage the crisis while Joe races to England to try and purchase a backup Electra.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Breakdown
programme.desc: Co-pilot Graeme's fumbles his Electra training landings. Chris stresses over his C-46 check ride. Adam rescues a stranded C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Target Practice
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey head to England to bring home a new plane. Devan does target-practice in the DC-4.James builds a Buffalo-style soapbox racer.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Air Show
programme.desc: Joe flies with the Snowbirds during the Hamilton air show and later teaches Mikey to fly. A surprise departure shakes up Buffalo.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Lilith og Frasier får øvd seg på foreldrerollen når de er barnevakt for Carlas veslevoksne sønn.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam prøver så godt han kan å holde tritt med sin unge, sportsgale kjæreste. Rebecca prøver å imponere sjefen ved å reklamere for Norms malerfirma.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Lilith overtaler Frasier til å gi avkall på det urbane liv og flytte til en hytte i skogen.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebecca anklager den amerikanske forsvarssjefen for å ha stjålet diamantøredobbene hennes.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam later som han er impotent for å bli bedre kjent med en kollega av Lilith og Frasier

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Den rike kjæresten til Woody setter ikke pris på den billige bursdagpresangen hun får av ham. Rebecca fornyer seg for å øke sine karrieremuligheter.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Woody blir hekta på gambling, og Carla venter spent på at Eddie skal overraske henne på bryllupsdagen.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam prøver å overtale Rebecca til å skvære opp med søsteren sin.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebecca anklager en velkjent utroskapsekspert for å legge an på henne.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Politically Correct / True Crime
programme.desc: To better understand their female classmates, Beavis & Butt-head must get in touch with their feelings. Huh huh, he said "touch." / Beavis & Butt-head unknowingly star in their favorite crime reenactment shows.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Follow me / Nothing happening / Take a lap
programme.desc: Beavis starts mimicing Butt-Head / A quiet day in Highland, Texas / Our duo enrolls in a fitness class

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Scared Straight / Citizen Butt-head Part 2
programme.desc: To teach them that crime doesn't pay, Beavis & Butt-head's principal sends them to prison for a day. Bad idea. / Beavis & Butt-head and President Clinton explore chaos theory together.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Sporting goods / Cow tipping
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head decide to get athletic gear supporters for gym class / The duo venture out on a quest for cow tipping

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Den rare jenta / Tidsreisen
programme.desc: Beavis møter en hemmelig beundrer på skolen./ Beavis og Butt-Head krysser frem og tilbake over delstatslinjen inn i Mountain Time Zone og tror de kan reise i tiden.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Manners Suck / Pipe Of Doom
programme.desc: Mr. Van Driessen gives his class a lesson in manners that no one will ever forget. He punches out the etiquette teacher. / Butt-head gets stuck in a construction site pipe, a la Baby Jessica.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nyren / Den gode handling
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis ødelegger nyren og en donor fra hans fortid redder dagen./ Beavis og Butt-Head utfører sin første gode gjerning ved å ha DDT i bowlen på skoledansen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shortcuts / Late Night with Butt-Head / Butt, Butt Hike!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head miss the schoolbus home / The duo makes a Late Night Show / Beavis and Butt-Head are invited to play football

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Tak / Elv
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head blir sittende fast på taket av Tom Andersons hus./ Beavis og Butt-Head seiler på dekk i en elv og ender opp på sjøen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Crush / Young, Gifted & Crude
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head want to hang with a "really cool' bunch of delinquents. / Beavis & Butt-head spend some time with the school's gifted class. Not much time.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Salem And Juliette
programme.desc: Sabrina helps Salem find a date for his high school reunion.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Nipping At Your Nose
programme.desc: When the weather outside turns frightful, the Spellman’s plan a trip to Jamaica.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Now You See Her Now You Don’t
programme.desc: Adhering to a fad diet from the Other Realm, Sabrina becomes so thin she literally disappears.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Super Hero
programme.desc: Childhood dreams come true when Sabrina casts a spell that turns Harvey into a superhero.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Love In Bloom
programme.desc: Valentine’s Day gets complicated when Sabrina learns two boys are vying for her heart.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Welcome Back Duke
programme.desc: Sabrina discovers why the road to ruin is paved with good intentions.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Salem’s Daughter
programme.desc: As maid of honor, Sabrina pays the price for reuniting Salem with his daughter in time for her wedding.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Dreama, The Mouse
programme.desc: Brad’s witch hunting gene goes into overdrive when Sabrina comes down with Spring Fever.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Wild Wild Witch
programme.desc: The West gets even wilder when Sabrina takes the reins as town sheriff.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: She’s Baaack!
programme.desc: Cousin Amanda returns to give Sabrina a little competition in the teenage witch -and love-- department.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Four Faces Of Sabrina
programme.desc: Choosing a college literally tears Sabrina apart when she tries too hard to make everyone happy.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Baby Boy Doe
programme.desc: When Alex's pal Skippy discovers he's adopted, Alex helps him cope with the shocking news.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Gambler
programme.desc: When Elyse has a convention speech in 'fascinating east coast resort' Atlantic City, she didn't plan to waste any time and money gambling.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Here We Go Again
programme.desc: The news that their mother is pregnant sends the three Keaton kids into an angry outburst resulting in a family battle.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Fabric Smarts
programme.desc: Mallory's enthusiasm for her part-time job at a boutique causes her grades to slip even lower than usual.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Lost Weekend
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse plan a nostalgic weekend with the kids before the baby arrives, and are crushed to discover that the children are not at all interested in reminiscing about old times-they'd rather be with their friends.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Little Man on Campus
programme.desc: Alex is thrilled to be taking a college course taught by one of his personal heroes, Professor Ephraim Bronski. In his eagerness to impress the teacher he gets off to a bad start and is humiliated by his idol when he fails the first-class assignment.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Best Man
programme.desc: Alex cannot accept the fact that he and everyone around him are growing up and desperately clings to his old ways.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Keaton and Son
programme.desc: Alex reluctantly accepts a part-time job with his father at the non-profit station, and his dad is bursting with pride to have him following in his footsteps.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Don't Kiss Me, I'm Only The Messenger
programme.desc: Alex plays Cupid to help his shy pal Skippy get together with Jane, the girl of his dreams, but his good intentions go awry when the girl falls for him instead.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Concussion Quarterback
programme.desc: En fotballspiller med hjerneskade prøver å inspirere laget sitt, en mann anklager sin kone for å være utro med en hund og en restauranteier skremmer bort gjestene sine.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Job Interview
programme.desc: Dommer Jessie har et nytt program, en mann venter på et jobbintervju, to damer sludrer, parkeringsvakter diskuterer Val Kilmer, en pensjonert mann fra hæren hører om et nytt prosjekt og en kvinne introduserer sin forlovede for foreldrene.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Gang Stand-Off
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer gangstere som er gale etter 'Twilight,' besøk i en verden der navn er promper, og rasistiske superhelter.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meegan & Andre Break Up
programme.desc: To venner kommer i klammeri på en klubb, Meegan og André har en seriøs samtale, en rapper går fra et intervju, Conrad flyr business class og Keegan har en ny bart.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Country Music
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer Steve Jobs' efterfølger, Ice-T, som en uoppdragen valp og Rihanna og Chris Brown prøver igjen.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Branding
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan utforsker opplevelsen som sort collegestudent og snylterne som suksess medfører. Andre sketsjer inkluderer et nabolags reaksjon på et mystisk vesen, når man kan - og ikke kan - si et kontroversielt ord.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Alien Imposters
programme.desc: Romvesener invaderer jorden, en familie forliker seg med en slektnings homobryllup og noen rasister gir uttrykk for noen overraskende meninger.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Boarding Group One
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Keegan ikke får lov å gå om bord i flyet sitt, en bølle som nekter å helle ut innholdet i spritflaska og en bokser som sviner til modstanderen sin.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sexy Vampires
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en uhyggelig asiatisk spøkelsessamboer, kara ser på den lyse siden av tortur og Keegan opplever et hus fullt av sexy vampyrer.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Airplane Showdown
programme.desc: En flyvert må håndtere en passasjer som ikke vil ha på sikkerhetsbeltet, britiske oppdagelsesreisende diskuterer sine reiser, to par forsøker å unngå spoilere på en dobbeltdate og en bibelgruppe opplever en guddommelig intervensjon.

programme.title: Key & Peele: MC Mom
programme.desc: En gangster deltar i et skuddrama, en mor skriver en sang til sønnen sin, to bondefangere konkurrerer, Big Boi møter André 3000 og to karer kommer ut for en bilulykke.

programme.title: Broad City: B&B-NYC
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana legger ut leilighetene sine på B & B-NYC for å tjene litt ekstra penger.

programme.title: Broad City: Burning Bridges
programme.desc: Ilanas foreldre kommer til byen for deres 30-årsjubileum, men Abbi og Ilana syns det er vanskelig å feire når de begge opplever samlivsproblemer.

programme.title: Broad City: Getting There
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana skal ut på tur, men bare det å komme seg til flyplassen viser seg å være mye vanskeligere enn forventet.

programme.title: Broad City: Jews on a Plane
programme.desc: Abbi får mensen under en flytur, så hun og Ilana går drastisk til verks for å finne en tampong.

programme.title: Broad City: Sliding Doors
programme.desc: En vårdag i 2011 møtes Abbi og Ilana for første gang.

programme.title: Broad City: Twaining Day
programme.desc: Abbis korte tilbakekomst til Soulstice blir interessant når hun får opplæringsmuligheten som hun alltid har drømt om. I mellomtiden får Ilana en ny jobb på en restaurant.

programme.title: Broad City: Just the Tips
programme.desc: Ilana går amok med pengene hun tjente på servitørjobben, og Abbis nye forhold gjør at det lyser av henne. På fest senere den kvelden, møter jentene på en gammel venn.

programme.title: Broad City: Mushrooms
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana ruser seg på sopp og opplever en hendelsesrik trip.

programme.title: Broad City: Abbi's Mom
programme.desc: Abbis mor kommer til byen på besøk, og Ilana navigerer Sushi Mambeaux' intense arbeidskultur samtidig som hun håndterer sin sesongavhengig depresjon.

programme.title: Broad City: Witches
programme.desc: Abbi føler seg gammel etter å ha funnet et grått hår; Ilana går til en sexterapeut.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Halloween
programme.desc: On Halloween, the deputies prepare for a night of mayhem, and Wiegel sets a sting operation to catch mischievous teens.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Dangle's Promotion
programme.desc: Dangle gets a new job in Carson City, but the deputies are too wrapped up in women's basketball to give him a proper send-off.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: Wiegel's new boyfriend, Craig, bears an uncanny resemblance to the Truckee River Serial Killer.

programme.title: RENO 911!: British Law
programme.desc: Inspector Martin Smiley of the U.K. joins the Reno Sheriff's Department in an exchange program.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Dangle's Wife Visits
programme.desc: Divorce looms over Dangle and his estranged wife, and the rest of the department struggles with a giant Ten Commandments monument.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Religion in Reno
programme.desc: The Reverend Gigg LeCarp, Reno's favorite televangelist, saves the deputies in their very own jail.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Fire Fighters Are Jerks
programme.desc: The accursed Fire Department schedules its Pancake Dinner at the same time as the Policeman's Ball.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Not Without My Mustache
programme.desc: As the deputies struggle to save their moustaches from a county-ordered shave, Jones worries about a psychic's prediction.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Security for Kenny Rogers
programme.desc: Deputy Garcia lives his lifelong dream: leading security for a Kenny Rogers book signing.

programme.title: RENO 911!: More FBI Help
programme.desc: When the lieutenant governor's brother goes missing, the FBI swings in to help the deputies.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Make-A-Wish & Fisticuff
programme.desc: Dave sees people's inner thoughts and freaks out when a little kid beats him at video games.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: O'Dweeds & Trading Spouses
programme.desc: Dave shows what happens when couples try "Trading Spouses" and introduces a family-friendly brand of pot; musical guest Black Star.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Samuel Jackson Beer & Racial Draft
programme.desc: Dave debuts Samuel Jackson beer and reveals major upsets in "The Racial Draft."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Negrodamus & The Niggar Family
programme.desc: Paul Mooney introduces Negrodamus, and Dave imagines a black Gallagher.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: White People Can't Dance & The Three Daves
programme.desc: Dave challenges the myth that white people can't dance.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Love Contract & True Hollywood Stories: Rick James
programme.desc: Rick James is one of the baddest mothaf**kers of all time.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: True Hollywood Stories: Prince & Red Balls Energy Drink
programme.desc: Negrodamus answers questions, and Charlie Murphy plays basketball with Prince.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Internet & Moment in the Life of Lil Jon
programme.desc: Dave walks in Lil Jon's shoes and considers the Internet's sleaziness.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: World Series of Dice & Mooney on Movies
programme.desc: The Marcy Projects hosts a champion shooter contest, and Paul Mooney talks "Gone with the Wind."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: I Know Black People & Keeping It Real Goes Wrong
programme.desc: Dave asks contestants how much they know about black American culture.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Tisha UnArmed
programme.desc: Daniel sliter med seksualiteten sin, anmelder biografiene deres og en armeløs jente får gjenoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Male Cheerleader
programme.desc: Daniel lar oss få se på når han sover og lar oss spørre ham om alt. Dessuten får en frekk cheerleader gjenoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Bryan Adams Kid
programme.desc: Daniel viser fram sin Halloween-drakt og hjelper til med å fange et internettmonster. Dessuten får en kjærlighedssyk teenager gjenoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Pikespeider-tyver
programme.desc: Daniel taler solskinnsstatens heteste kriminelles sak, får staben til å spise eksklusiv dyremat og starter en ny sportsliga.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Taxi Dave
programme.desc: Daniel feirer Thanksgiving med sine fans og den rappende taxisjåføren får gjenoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Virgin Trampoline Jumper
programme.desc: Daniel hjelper en jomfru med å sjekke og introduserer dere for de aller sinteste damene i USA.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Season Four Web Reflection
programme.desc: Med sylskarp humor og bitende kommentarer, fører komikeren Daniel Tosh oss inn i alle aspekter av Internett, fra det helt absurde til det geniale, i denne ukentlige serien med forkjellige tema.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Gingers Have Souls
programme.desc: I sesongpremieren utfører Daniel og hans personale sportsutfordringer, han sender et våget bilde til en fremmed og Michael - en fyr som blir mobbet for å være rødhåret - får gjenoppreisning på nettet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: X12 (CeWEBrity Profile)
programme.desc: Daniel feirer Valentinsdag med å la deg beklage deg over partneren din, og verdens eneste svarte superhelt får nettoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: The Oscars Spoiler Alerts
programme.desc: Daniel får workouttips til soverommet og avslører alt om filmene som er nominert til Oscar for Beste film.
