programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Wyatt's Decision
programme.desc: Earp decides to leave Tombstone but learns the Clantons are gunning for him. Nellie Cashman and Dick Gird want Earp to stay to bring law and order to Tombstone.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An embittered ranch woman holds Matt Dillon and Kitty prisoner while plotting Matt's execution to avenge her husband's hanging.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Just Before the Battle
programme.desc: A stagecoach holdup orchestrated by Johnny Ringo and Curly Bill gives Wyatt Earp the opportunity he's been waiting for--a chance to get the rival factions to turn on each other.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Hunt the Man Down
programme.desc: Earp is forced with the help of Mr. Cousin to go into the rough Bushwhacker area to track down a man wanted for murder.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: An attorney takes the case of a famed gunman who is charged with murder.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: One-Man Army
programme.desc: Texan Drum Denman goes after northerner Earp by backing a free newspaper to print false stories about Earp trying to draw him out of Dodge City.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Lt. Robert Benson becomes torn when the woman he loves asks him to give out secret government information.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: A Good Man
programme.desc: A reformed gambler Tittle comes to Dodge City preaching against gambling and the devil. Earp is forced to intervene when Tittle preaches in a popular saloon.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' faller Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood lett i 'Henfallen til fall', forbauser aper voldsomt med 'Apemagi' og har problemer med å finne tingene sine i 'Borte, men funnet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kan ikke Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood løpe fra den morsomme snublingen i 'Fluktfall', viser fram imponerende bisker i 'Hermehunder' og snakker varmt for bruken av solide hodeplagg i 'Skudd fra oven'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvor stor skade en strippepåle kan forårsake i «Pål-lateral skade', oppdager at ikke alle liker å bli skremt i 'Skremtraseri' før de avslutter med noen 'Forlatte farer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut fra tee i 'Sving-ding', krasjer med 'Små landingsmatter' og blir offer for noen 'Byfeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood besøk av sangeren Teddy Swims og ser nærmere på folk som 'Mister kontrollen', får faderlige råd i 'Pappavisdom og kaster ut noen problemtyper i 'Vis dem veien ut'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood problemer med å sette seg på grunn av 'Stolnasking', møter brått uventede dyr i 'Dyrestøkk' og bruker god tid på å falle i 'Gradvise fall'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood nærbilkontakt med leppene i 'Bilkyssere', får seg et slag under beltestedet med 'Lavtslåtte damer' og orker ikke å spise når de er sammen med 'Matlystslukkere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at telefoner kan være distraherende i 'Telefonblind', møter unger som bør finne seg en annen sportsgren i 'Minigolfere' og besøker noen steder der det er 'Kjempekaldt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood smertefullt på hodet i 'Stup hvor som helst', kaster seg på sykkelen i 'Pedaltrøkk rett i pølen' og blir vitner til tupékatastrofer i 'Tupé på vift'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hva som skjer når du ikke lander støtt i 'Ustø landing', sjekker de mest lojale kjærestene i 'Jeg er opptatt' og avslutter med uheldige campere i 'Glamourløs camping'.

programme.title: Andromeda: De andre
programme.desc: Andromeda blir fanget i en krig mellom to skip, og den inkluderer en dødelig sykdom.

programme.title: Andromeda: Frykt brenner ned til aske
programme.desc: Dylan blir lurt av Rev og kidnappet. Mannskapet finner en uventet alliert i en samler.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tapt i et rom som ikke er der
programme.desc: Abyss har smittet Beka. Mannskapet må finne en måte å redde henne på.

programme.title: Andromeda: Forkortelse av djevelens skille
programme.desc: Etter at noe av mannskapet er fanget, blir Harper tvunget til å jobbe på en tidsbro for patriarken.

programme.title: Andromeda: Stoler på Gordian Maze
programme.desc: En spion fra Tri Gemma dukker opp på Andromeda i et forsøk på å stjele stjernekartet.

programme.title: Andromeda: En symmetri av ufullkommenhet
programme.desc: Når Rommie blir for emosjonell, kutter skipet hennes tilgang til diagnostikk.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A two-man shrimp boat sinks when a fast-moving, violent storm strikes the Louisiana coast. The captain drowns, but the deckhand is rescued fourteen hours later. The crewman is hailed as a hero — until the captain's body is discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate tycoon goes missing, it appears to be foul play. In his will, he leaves instructions in case he should die under violent circumstances — which were carried out after a hiker comes across his bullet-ridden skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: South of the Border
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort draws law enforcement resources on both sides of the border. At first glance, the motive appears to be robbery, but careful analysis of the forensic evidence points to something more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: Police are led on a wild goose chase when the wife of a prominent banker is kidnapped. An entomologist's unexpected discovery leads to a new suspect — and the realization that ordinary office equipment can leave extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water. The husband, however, had no recollection of the crime. A jury would have to decide between evidence and the mysteries of the mind.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: It would take 46 years, handwriting analysis and new fingerprint technology to solve the 1957 murders of two California police officers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: A man riding a bicycle was fatally injured in what police believed to be a hit-and-run accident. Tiny clues found at the scene created a picture of the vehicle which struck him and led police to its driver.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple died in a suspicious house fire, their son became the prime suspect. Investigators turned to forensic science to determine if the fire had been set deliberately, or if it was an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search when the mother of two young children went missing. Twenty years after her body was found, new technology recontextualized old evidence and pointed directly to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: When hunters reported finding a skull in a Texas canyon, police immediately began an investigation. With a forensic artist's reconstruction, police eventually learned the victim's identity. Now all they had to do was find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: A married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a mini-vacation in Key West. The wife went missing and police searched every square inch of the island; they found nothing but a pair of sandals which might have belonged to her.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode includes: Past Lives, Murder & Extortion, UD: Smitty, 48-hour Fraud & UD, and Mystery Clerk & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode includes: Mail Bombings, UD: Mom's Genetic Curse, Loving's Lost Love & UD, Go Ask Alice & UD and Sal & Sally.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode includes: Belgian UFO, (Pts. 1 & 2), UD: I.D. Swap, Brenda's Fire, and Philip Breen & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 11
programme.desc: This episode includes: Best Friends & UD, Marine Captain Murder, Florida Fires & UD, UD: Stamper's Rampage, and Mucho Oro.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Murderer's Escape & UD, Lady and the Tramp, UD: Father/Son, Death Row Defender, and Charlie's Angels & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 13
programme.desc: This episode includes: Chad, UD: Thanks Big Brother, Honky Tonk Woman & UD, Practical Joker & UD, and Nine Lives & UD.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Unlawful Flight
programme.desc: In Alabama, two desperate criminals fled the custody of a local deputy. Eluding authorities, they made their way across the country in a wave of car theft, abduction, and murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Murdering Cowboy
programme.desc: The sun set on the Wild West long ago, but some people refused to notice. Claude Dallas was one of them. A wily trapper, Dallas typified the rugged individualism that forged this country. He went too far when he killed two game wardens in 1981.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: When the small community of Noel, Missouri discovered their bank was robbed, they're shocked. When the bank president turned up missing, they're outraged. And when clues began to surface the facts were more terrible than anyone could have guessed.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Driven to Kill
programme.desc: A serial rapist targeted women. His dark urges raged out of control and led him to murder. He followed a path so random it was impossible to trace, and all that tied him to his crimes were his access to the highways and a bizarre sexual fetish.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: Two young boys were the only witnesses to their mother's murder. The horrible crime appeared unmotivated, senseless and random.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Soldier Stories
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Infallible Witness
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental "brain fingerprinting" technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Traces Of Guilt
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence: a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Chemistry
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Scattered Clues
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutalchoosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Piano Plays a Ghost Song
programme.desc: Following reports of loud voices and footsteps heard when no one else is around, staff seeing dark shadows fleeting through the empty corridors, to several pianos playing by themselves, Ghost Dimension head into Champness Hall.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Horror at Sandhole Cottage - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean returns to his former, haunted home. No tenant has ever been able to stay the full term. Sean wants to seek out the spirits once and for all, to finally find out what is haunting his former home.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Horror at Sandhole Cottage - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of Sandhole Cottage and appears to be in direct contact with the spirits that haunted any tenants that came to live there. Will he finally get them to rest?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Opening The Book at Leeds Library - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean delves deep and opens a new chapter for the Ghost Dimension Flying Solo series as he investigates Leeds Library, to uncover what is haunting and frightening the staff that work here.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Closing The Book at Leeds Library - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at Leeds Library and attempts to communicate with a spirit known by the name of Sternberg. Will his investigation have a happy ending?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 1
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travels to Derbyshire to investigate the New Mills Arts Theatre. This quirky little building has played host to many famous acts and world-renowned plays but has a little-known secret in that it's allegedly haunted.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Results Revealed: Did She Cheat?
programme.desc: Justin is convinced that girlfriend Lainie has been cheating on him, and more importantly that he’s not the father of their child. But his own insecurities have led him to turn violent. Also, Steven doubts whether Ashley’s child is his.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Tragic Accident
programme.desc: Rebecca left her baby with fiancé James and his mother Adeline, only to discover that her baby was hospitalized. Rebecca suspects that James is responsible. Adeline blames her for the baby’s death!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Starving Myself to Death
programme.desc: Pamela aims to weigh 40 pounds. Samantha, who suffers from bulimia and alcoholism, steals to accomplish her binging. Can both women confront their eating disorders with support and treatment?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Crawl to Your Wife
programme.desc: After surviving a wild car chase, losing her leg, and being comatose due to her husband, Portia will finally confront him. He won't admit fault, but today Steve’s helping Portia find her voice.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Teen Daughter Wants a Baby
programme.desc: 17-year-old Naomi has undergone a sudden attitude change and is on a mission to have a baby. Parents Leeanders and April need Steve to intervene!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Stole 15 Years of My Life
programme.desc: Jennifer left home to protect herself from her stepdad Allen. 15 years later, her mother wants a second chance, but Jennifer is hesitant. Can Steve help mend this broken family?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She Is My Property
programme.desc: Lanikka is sick and tired of her boyfriend Malcom’s abusive ways. Then, Tim’s jealousy has torn his family apart, but now he’s desperate to win them back, but will Tiffany leave him for good?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Mr. LA
programme.desc: A young man tries to flee a violent scene, but is shot dead behind the wheel of his car. A peculiar clue puts Kenda hot on the heels of a self-styled gangster with revenge on his mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Collision Course
programme.desc: Two best friends are gunned down on a dark residential street. When a string of disappointments threaten to derail the case, Kenda enlists the help of an old acquaintance.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bump In the Night
programme.desc: When a pretty, young pilot is found in bed, bound and with a bullet in her head, Lt. Joe Kenda must determine if this was a random assault or payback for something that happened in the skies.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead Man Falling
programme.desc: When a family of four is brutally murdered, it sends a shockwave of fear through the town. Police believe they have a spree killer on their hands, until Lt. Joe Kenda discovers a gruesome connection.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: Hikers come across a horrific scene: the corpse of a man left nude, beaten and bound in the mountain wilderness.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Global Pursuit
programme.desc: In Langley, Virginia, a terrorist fired into rush hour traffic. The victims seemed randomly selected, but the motive appeared to be political, targeting employees of the Central Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Betrayed
programme.desc: On the day before Thanksgiving, a mother discovered her ten-year-old son was missing from his school. When a child of separated parents disappears, investigators first look at the family and divorced parents often suspect each other.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Jimmy Savile
programme.desc: Jimmy Savile: From national treasure to one of the UK's most notorious sex offenders: this is the story of how the revelation of Jimmy Savile's crimes left the UK reeling.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Lee Rigby
programme.desc: In broad daylight on a busy Woolwich street on 22nd May 2013, serving soldier Fusilier Lee Rigby was attacked and murdered by Islamic extremists Michael Adebolajo and Michael Adebowale.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rose West
programme.desc: With her husband Fred, Rose West brutally murdered ten girls between 1973 and 1979, making her one of the most high profile serial killers in the UK.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Marchioness Disaster
programme.desc: The story of the Marchioness; a pleasure boat that collided with dredger Bowbelle and sank within minutes resulting in the loss of 51 lives.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Vow of Silence and Cryptic
programme.desc: A single mother's new home was once a convent that kept a horrifying secret. A couple is tormented by the meaning of a date that keeps appearing in their new home.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Family Grave and Deception
programme.desc: A man's childhood fears come to life when he returns to his family's farm after his mother's death. A woman begins to suspect that her withdrawn husband may be causing the unexplainable occurrences in their new home.

programme.title: My Haunted House: The Attic and 'Til Death
programme.desc: A college student is tormented by her little sister's imaginary friend. A newly engaged woman sees visions of her fiance's widow.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: The Boy in the Closet
programme.desc: A couple is haunted by the spirit of a little boy who lives in their young son's bedroom closet. A gas station owner's life is abruptly changed by the appearance of a mysterious paranormal mist with a demonic presence.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: Screams in the Dark
programme.desc: Two men retire without knowing their new home sits on the graves of people who were tortured and murdered by the KKK. The Queen Mary once ruled the high seas, but now ghosts roam her decks.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: The Face in the Window
programme.desc: A woman under assault by an aggressive entity is rescued by the spirit of her deceased son. A maid who was murdered in the 19th century continues to work at an old Texas hotel.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Arthur's Cross
programme.desc: Scotland Yard kaller Sidney og Nigel for å identifisere et drapsvåpen fra 500-tallet. Det viser seg å være gravkorset til King Arthur, men i tillegg til offeret leter flere andre etter det.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: So Shall It Be
programme.desc: Når Sidney og Nigel er i ferd med å gå inn på stedet for en Bristol-foredrag, nærmer en ung forfatter dem å følge opp et øyeblikkelig tips om et kart til de tapte nøklene til druidekulten i Stonehenge.

programme.title: Andromeda: Under natten
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt igjen strandet i nærheten av et svart hull, blir kaptein Dylan Hunt oppdaget av et leiesoldat bergingsskip og finner at han har vært frossen i tide i 300 år.

programme.title: Andromeda: En bekreftende flamme
programme.desc: Dylan beskytter Andromeda mot leiesoldater mens Beka begynner å lure på om de kjemper for feil side.

programme.title: Andromeda: Å miste den skjebnesvangre lynet
programme.desc: Dylan finner en romstasjon full av barn som tror at han er der for å bringe fred ved å drepe fiendene sine.

programme.title: Andromeda: D Minus Zero
programme.desc: Andromeda-mannskapet lærer fremdeles hvordan de skal samarbeide ettersom de blir angrepet av restauratørene.

programme.title: On the Case: River of Sadness
programme.desc: A heartbreaking mystery begins with the discovery of a young woman's body floating in Washington state's Yakima River.

programme.title: On the Case: Betrayal and Regret
programme.desc: After a teenage girl is found murdered in an isolated cemetery, police must untangle a dark mystery in order to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case: From Dusk to Darkness
programme.desc: After a 10-year-old girl mysteriously disappears, her family and the police undergo a tormenting journey to find a lead.

programme.title: On the Case: A Nightmare in Laurel
programme.desc: When a young woman disappears before her final shift at a Maryland hospital, her family begins a decades-long search for answers.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Riddle
programme.desc: Nine days after 11-year-old Mary Stiles goes missing while trick-or-treating, a letter arrives at the police station leading investigators to Stiles' body; then, investigators must decipher a series of riddles before the killer strikes again.

programme.title: On the Case: The Long Path to Justice
programme.desc: A couple's daily walk ends in murder and a cloud of suspicion descends on the victim's family.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Tig Notaro, Drew's News
programme.desc: "Your Place or Mine" star Tig Notaro is telling Drew about working with Reese Witherspoon on their new film and the latest season of "The Morning Show."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's Birthday Surprise Show with Penn Badgley& John Oliver
programme.desc: It's Drew's birthday and we're celebrating all show long with some special surprises for her! "You" star Penn Badgley is surprising Drew with a special birthday present and telling her all about the new season of his hit show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Pilar Valdes, Danny Seo, Mikel Welch, Drew's News with Rachel Dratch
programme.desc: The celebration continues, and Drew's birthday twin Rachel Dratch has a delicious surprise for her when she joinsDrew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: William Jackson Harper, Drew's News, Andrew Rea
programme.desc: "Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania" star William Jackson Harper is telling Drew about his role in the new Marvel film, why he took his dog to a pet psychic and how he met his girlfriend.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Bronwyn Tarboton, Drew's News
programme.desc: Bronwyn Tarboton is sharing some genius upcycling tips including how to create home décor out of items in your trash.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Guy Fieri, Damona Hoffman, Pilar Valdes, Robin Black
programme.desc: "Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives" host Guy Fieri is joining Drew to chat and play a game! Dating expert Damona Hoffman is joining Drew, Ross Mathews and his husband Wellington Garciato talk about love and soulmates.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Taye Diggs, Jamila Norman, Jeralyn Gerba, Nadine Jane
programme.desc: "All American" star Taye Diggs is joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to hit the hottest headlines of the day! Jamila Norman is joining Drew and Taye and sharing tips on how to build your own herb garden.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Senator Bernie Sanders, Drew's News
programme.desc: Senator Bernie Sanders is joining Drew to chat about his new book. He's also joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to discuss local Vermont headlines and share some of his favorite Vermont-based small businesses.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Jabari Banks, Drew's News
programme.desc: "Bel-Air" star Jabari Banks is joining Drew to chat about his show. Drew and her co-pilot Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Gayle King, Drew & Ross Visit Montana
programme.desc: "CBS Mornings" co-host Gayle King is joining Drew and Ross Mathews to hit the headlines, covering topics like the woman who found an unusual way to calm her nerves before a first kiss.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Gayle King, Brittany O'Grady and Nat Wolf
programme.desc: "CBS Mornings" co-host Gayle King is joining Drew and Ross Mathews to hit the headlines. Plus, its Drew' News: The Weekender Edition, a curated list of must-haves, must watches and more to do this weekend from Drew!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Whitney Cummings, Anita Tam, Drew's News with Whitney Cummings
programme.desc: "At Midnight" star Whitney Cummings is joining Drew to take a bungee fitness class! She's also covering the news with Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk including why women may smell different after leaving a boyfriend's place.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dangerous Liaisons
programme.desc: A report on the July 2003 murder of Sandra Rozzo of Pinellas Park, Florida, including the police investigation that led to the eventual conviction and imprisonment of her ex-lover Timothy ‘Tracey’ Humphrey and his wife Ashley Laney Humphrey.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Betrayal of Linda Slaten
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Last Take
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Kiss of Death and the Google Exec
programme.desc: A report about the investigation into the 2013 drug-related death of Google executive Forrest Hayes and Alix Tichelman, the woman charged with killing him, whose ex-boyfriend also died of a lethal overdose.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Good Cop/Bad Cop: Solving the Murder of Heather Bogle
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: Cops: Petrol Heist
programme.desc: Officers wrestle an uncooperative driver to the ground after a traffic stop. Deputies search for a man who sent threatening texts to his ex-girlfriend. Two suspects are caught stealing gas.

programme.title: Cops: Check Please!
programme.desc: Deputies confront an intoxicated man who threatened a restaurant owner. A man tells officers he can assault who he wants. Officers are called to an altercation over a sleeping bag and a backpack.

programme.title: Cops: Decorating Tips
programme.desc: Officers pursue an SUV on the freeway. Deputies are called when an agitated man armed with scissors tears up a trailer. A driver tells officers the illegal items found in his car was left by a friend.

programme.title: Cops: Hide and Go Porch
programme.desc: Officers engage in a car chase when they spot a possible robbery suspect. A man nicknamed "Danger" is tasered after assaulting several girls. Suspects bail from a vehicle and hide under a porch.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A prostitution sting leads police to uncover additional crimes . A prostitute tells deputies she wanted money to buy her daughter a birthday gift. Deputies are called to an assault at a pub.

programme.title: Cops: Alleycat
programme.desc: Officers search for a runaway suspect with a weapons charge. A man admits to having a large number of drugs during a traffic stop. Officers respond to a man with a gun in an alley.

programme.title: Cops: Victoria's New Secret
programme.desc: Deputies observe a woman stuff drugs into her bra. A mother attacks her daughter because she got married in Vegas. Officers are called when a woman is accused of stalking her friend.

programme.title: Cops: Apologies Detective
programme.desc: Officers hold a man under a car at gunpoint after a traffic stop. Officers are flagged down and directed to an arguing couple. A man apologizes to detectives for the illicit items they find.

programme.title: Cops: It's Laundry Day
programme.desc: Deputies detain a man when a gun falls from his pantleg. Deputies are called when a father spits on his son's girlfriend. Officers respond when a child is bitten by two large dogs.

programme.title: Cops: Nothing Upstairs
programme.desc: Officers pursue a motorcyclist driving erratically. Deputies find broken drug paraphernalia in a car when conducting a traffic stop. A man who beat up his girlfriend hides from officers in an attic.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)
programme.desc: On March 31, 2003, firefighters were called to a fire in a housing estate of Meyrargues, near Aix-en-Provence. On site, they discovered a horrific scene: the tortured and charred bodies of a mother and her daughter, Chantal and Audrey D'Amato.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Dire Deception (Laurence Maille Case)
programme.desc: On November 28, 2007, Laurence Maille disappeared. It was her partner, John Zablevski, who alerted the Vimy police in Pas-de-Calais. He explained that the young woman had left in the morning for a walk with their dog and never returned.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Stabed In Her Bed: The Maureen Jaquier Case
programme.desc: On February 27, 2015, in Toulouse, the parents of 19-year-old Maureen Jacquier discover their daughter stabbed several times in her bed.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Shot At Point-Blank: The Aurelie Barbot Affair
programme.desc: On December 20, 2012, in Val d'Izé (Ille-et-Vilaine), Aurélie Barbot, 29, was killed on her doorstep with a bullet to the head.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Honeymoon Killers (Van Beers Case)
programme.desc: Marc Van Beers, a 36-year old Brussels tax lawyer, dies in a road accident while on honeymoon. His wife Aurore is unharmed by the accident.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En tidlig februarmorgen i Stockholm melder en mann sin kone, Sacha, savnet. Etter hvert som politiet graver i parets fortid, oppdager de et turbulent forhold under den tilsynelatende ryddige overflaten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 204
programme.desc: På kvelden 1. nyttårsdag i 2012 utløses trygghetsalarmen hjemme hos 98 år gamle Hilda Feste. Da hjemmetjenesten rykker ut blir de vitne til en grufull hendelse. Politiet starter umiddelbart opp jakten på gjerningsmannen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 403
programme.desc: Marit Ødegaard jobber på en veikro ikke langt fra svenskegrensen. En oktoberdag i 2000 dukker hun ikke opp på jobb. Kort tid etter blir Marit funnet drept i hjemmet sitt

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 604
programme.desc: En 33 år gammel mann blir funnet skutt og drept nær Sundsvall. Det viser seg å være en mann med mange fiender, og politiets liste består i begynnelsen av over femti personer med mulige motiver.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En ung mann blir funnet død på et jorde utenfor Enköping. Ved første øyekast ser det ut som om han har lagt seg ned for å hvile - men når politiet undersøker liket, oppdager de noe som antas å være et skuddsår.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 506
programme.desc: 26. januar 2001 ble Benjamin Hermansen knivstukket til døde som følge av sin hudfarge. Drapet fikk hele landet til å delta i antirasistiske markeringer og protester.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Legacies
programme.desc: Upon returning to "The World Below" upon the knowledge of some of ex-tunnel inhabitants being murdered, Father encounters Gregory Coyle who seeks revenge for the death of his father by cave-in 20 years ago.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Once Upon a Time in the City of New York
programme.desc: Attacked, mutilated and left for dead, Catherine Chandler is rescued by the mysterious man-beast called Vincent.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Terrible Savior
programme.desc: Witness descriptions of a vigilante lead Catherine to fear Vincent may be a killer.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Siege
programme.desc: Vincent helps the residents of an apartment building defend their homes against thugs who want them out so the land can be re-developed.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: No Way Down
programme.desc: Injured in an explosion, Vincent is captured by a vicious street gang.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Shadow Play
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mind and the Matter
programme.desc: Using the power of mind over matter, Archibald Beechcroft remakes the world to his own specifications.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Will the Real Martian Please Stand Up
programme.desc: Following a frantic phone call about a crashed spaceship, two policemen try and determine who among the passengers of a bus at a snowed-in roadside diner is from another world.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Dream Me a Life
programme.desc: A man in a retirement home dreams of a woman holding back a monster, and in real life realizes the woman is his cataleptic neighbor.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Memories
programme.desc: A hypnotist who specializes in helping people relive their past lives tries to find her own history. She hypnotizes herself and when she awakens, she learns that everyone can now remember their past lives. They also desperately want to forget them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hellgramite Method
programme.desc: An alcoholic goes through an extremely painful and potentially deadly cure for his drinking problem. He has to choose which is more important - the bottle or his life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Our Selina is Dying
programme.desc: A young woman, Debra, comes to live with her mysterious family, including the dying patriarch Selena. After Selena clutches Debra's hand firmly leaving an odd spot on it, Debra begins to age very fast while Selena rejuvenates.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Obsolete Man
programme.desc: In a future totalitarian society, a librarian is declared obsolete and sentenced to death.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Two
programme.desc: A man and a woman, on opposite sides of a future war, encounter each other in a deserted town.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Arrival
programme.desc: A plane lands safely, but the pilot, crew and all of its passengers are missing!

programme.title: JAG: Need to Know
programme.desc: As a favor from Congresswoman Lillian Dorning, SECNAV Sheffield asks the JAG staff to get the story of a submarine, USS Angel Shark (SSGN-559), which was lost on a CIA mission in 1968.

programme.title: JAG: Friendly Fire
programme.desc: Harm serves as a judge and Mac is the contentious prosecutor in a case fraught withpolitical implications when an American aviator is charged with killing three Britishsoldiers during a flight mission in Afghanistan.

programme.title: JAG: Shifting Sands
programme.desc: When a Gulf War MIA victim is found as the sheik’s wife in a nomadic Arab tribe, Bud prosecutes and Mac defends her against charges of desertion and, in a stunning turn of events, treason. Harm tries to get his old job back but is turned away.

programme.title: JAG: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Mac defends and Turner prosecutes in the case of a special op marine who, during an Iraqi mission, may have deserted his team for his own survival. Harm takes on a CIA training assignment in a mach six craft that soon has him in danger.

programme.title: JAG: Close Quarters
programme.desc: Back at JAG, Harm is flooded with cases but still wants to help out an 80-year-old veteran accused of robbery. Meanwhile, Turner takes on an assignment in a sub whose crew has rescued possible defecting North Koreans.

programme.title: JAG: Posse Comitatus
programme.desc: Harm and Mac argue the case of a Marine pilot who used force to interfere with a local police matter that led to a man’s killing. Roberts is the investigating officer in the matter of a Navy doctor who is requesting conscientious objector status.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Loves Pinky Part II
programme.desc: The Malachi brothers sabotage Pinky's car the night before the demolition derby.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Physical
programme.desc: A short-tempered sergeant loses his tenuous grasp on discipline when the Fonz reports to the army recruitment center soon after draftees Richie, Ralph and Potsie check in for physicals.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Apartment
programme.desc: Personality quirks begin to fray nerves after best friends Richie, Ralph, and Potsie rent an apartment together.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hard Cover
programme.desc: Richie and Fonzie must think fast to outwit a tough housemother after they're caught past curfew in the college girls' dormitory.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 2
programme.desc: Soon after getting the bad news that the studio deemed his James Dean impression obsolete, and gave Richie's wholesome good looks a contract instead, the Fonz finds a bigger fish to fry.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 3
programme.desc: Richie must choose either a 5-year Hollywood contract or college in Milwaukee while the Fonz accepts the California Kid's challenge to perform a dangerous water ski jump...over a shark!

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonsilectomy
programme.desc: Forced to spend the night in the hospital's children's ward, Fonzie worries more about who will be making time with his girl at the Halloween party than the tonsillectomy he's scheduled for the next morning.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Cousin the Cheat
programme.desc: Fonzie is furious with his rebellious cousin, Chachi Arcola, after Chachi cheats on a school test using answers stolen from a tutoring session with Joanie Cunningham.

programme.title: Happy Days: Nose is for News
programme.desc: To prove to his college journalism professor that he has what it takes to be a good investigative reporter, Richie gets down and dirty to expose who's behind an illegal garbage collection scheme.

programme.desc: Comedy duo Rhett and Link are among the most requested "Hot Ones" guests of all time!

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Former U.S. Army Ranger Wil Willis tests modern combat shotguns like the Benelli M4 and Mossberg 590, alongside historic models.This documentary features 3D animations and weapon tests to explore effectiveness of combat shotguns.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Grand Mufti
programme.desc: The controversy surrounding Mohammad Amin al-Husayni, stems from his Nazi collaboration. He recruited Bosnian Muslims and advocated for a Palestinian homeland with Nazi help. His diaries reveal awareness of the Holocaust and anti-Semitic sentiments.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: The Final Solution
programme.desc: This is the story of how Hitler orchestrated the genocide of 6 million Jews. Hitler portrayed Jews as a societal threat, using Goebbels' propaganda. Deportations were masked as resettlements while Auschwitz-Birkenau became a death factory.

programme.title: Mata Hari - The Beautiful Spy
programme.desc: Mata Hari. Dance, Seduction and Espionage. The enduring myth.

programme.title: Secret War: Hardy Amies and Operation Ratweek
programme.desc: Operation Ratweek’s existence has always been denied. However WMR has now discovered evidence that it existed and was carried out.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Halloween
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen holder en "Halfoween"-fest, for de syns at det skal være Halloween to ganger i året. Men da en forkledd gjest spiller Carly og vennene et puss, blir festen litt for vill.

programme.title: iCarly: Chucks lillebror
programme.desc: Et sinna barn ønsker inderlig å hevne seg, men målskiven Spencer prøver iherdig å stoppe ham. Gibby blir knust når hans nye lekelaserpistol går i stykker, men blir fra seg av henrykkelse når Freddies reparsjion gir den overraskende krefter.

programme.title: iCarly: Utestengt
programme.desc: Når Carly bannlyser T-Bo fra hennes og Spencers hjem, hevner han seg ved å ikke slippe Carly inn på Groovy Smoothie. Imens oppdager Freddie og Gibby at det fins mange fordeler ved å spille i band...og også et par ulemper.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Las Vegas
programme.desc: Når Sam får vite at moren hennes er i fengsel i Vegas, bestemmer gjengen seg for å ta sine mest verdifulle eiendeler, kjøre til Vegas og pantsette dem - så de får nok penger til å betale borgen for henne. Gjesteartister: History Channels PAWN STARS.

programme.title: iCarly: Nattsynbrillene
programme.desc: Sams venn kommer ut av ungdomsfengselet, og Sam advarer alle om å holde seg unna, men Carly hører ikke etter og havner på dypt vann. Hjemme i leiligheten finner Spencer noen nattsynbriller.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 1
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York. De elsker New York og er kjempeglade for å være med i programmet, men alt kan skje på live tv.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 2
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York, men en stor klesmiss fra Gibby betyr store problemer for nettshowets fremtid.

programme.title: iCarly: Spencers venner
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen vil finne venner til Spencer på hans egen alder. De finner noen gode muligheter, men vil vennskapet blomstre?

programme.title: iCarly: Den stjålne laptoppen
programme.desc: Når Sams laptop blir stjålet, prøver iCarly-gjengen å hjelpe henne med å oppspore tyven. Imens får Spencer vite at han ikke får komme inn i sin yndlingsspillehall hvis han ikke er i følge med et barn. Hellet snur når Guppy trenger barnevakt.

programme.title: iCarly: Farvel del 2
programme.desc: Carly er på vei til å akseptere at hun ikke kan gå på det årlige ballet, da faren hennes dukker opp og går sammen med henne. Kvelden tar en uventet vending når faren hennes stiller et livsavgjørende spørsmål.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Air Show
programme.desc: Joe flies with the Snowbirds during the Hamilton air show and later teaches Mikey to fly. A surprise departure shakes up Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Five Seasons
programme.desc: Ice Pilots NWT celebrates a milestone with a look back at the last five years, a peek behind the camera and reflections from the Buffalo crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Ball O'Snags
programme.desc: An engine fire and series of mechanical gremlins has Buffalo scrambling to make its Christmas deliveries. Newest rampie Prefkar Mony struggles with life in the North.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Storm
programme.desc: Buffalo's Electra aircraft is hammered by rough winds up the Mackenzie Valley. In Hay River, a rookie crew faces the worst ice storm in years and one rampie has a tough go trying to fit in at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Old Dogs
programme.desc: Engine trouble plagues Buffalo's newest Electra, ZFE, and a standoff between Joe and Transport Canada threatens to close the airline. At the same time, Joe faces a tough decision about his old dog Sophie.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Checkflight
programme.desc: Joe leaves to undergo medical tests at the Mayo Clinic in Phoenix, Arizona. Jeff and Sam stress over their DC-3 checkflights and Joe celebrates turning 70-his way.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebecca anklager en velkjent utroskapsekspert for å legge an på henne.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam får nesten sjansen til en date med Rebecca, helt til en kjekk bedriftshai kommer inn.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebecca tar en tur til Beverly Hills med Robin i hans privatfly.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam vurderer å åpne en egen bar for å gi livet mening.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Frykten for å binde seg gjør Cliff gal når han sier ja til frieriet fra kjæresten.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Mens Sam angrer på det raske salget av Corvetten, får Norm vite at det er vanskeligere å være sjef enn det ser ut til.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Mens barens gjester og ledelse feirer Cheers 100-årsjubileum, føder Lilith en gutt.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Etter Eddies tidlige død, oppdager Carla at mannen hennes levde et dobbeltliv når hun møter hans andre kone i begravelsen.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Frasier kidnapper sin egen sønn for å hindre ham i å bli rituelt omskåret i henhold til den jødiske tradisjonen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Crush / Young, Gifted & Crude
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head want to hang with a "really cool' bunch of delinquents. / Beavis & Butt-head spend some time with the school's gifted class. Not much time.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Choke / Career day
programme.desc: Eating chicken can be hazardous / Later they go out on work experience as security guards

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Work is Death (aka Burger World) / Werewolves of Highland / Tech Support
programme.desc: After the Manager explains that Workers Compensation pays you for getting injured on the job, Butt-head sets out to injure Beavis / A Vampire craze hits the high school / Beavis and Butt-Head misinterpret what it means to ask a man for his daughter's hand

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Killing Time / Dude, a Reward
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head's worst fears are realized when they have to kill two hours, until something good comes on TV. / Images of Beavis and Butt-head grace the walls of a photo gallery after they find a lost camera and put it to creative use.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Teen Talk / vs.the Vending Machine
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head join Captain Dick Jackman on his Sunday morning program, "rapping" about their problems. / The vending machine wins.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Fluktrommet/Den viktige
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å løse Fluktromgåten, bare for å bli fanget på badet. / Beavis møter sin største helt - Ild.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Snille Butt-Head/ Hjemmehjelp
programme.desc: Butt-Head får medisin for sin aggresjon mot Beavis og blir litt for snill./ Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head går tom for ølpenger, så Beavis må finne seg en jobb.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shopping cart / Die Fly, Die! / Drinking Butt-ies
programme.desc: Our duo find out that accidents can lead to money / Beavis and Butt-Head get annoyed at a fly / After a beating by Todd, they become best friends over beer

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Virtuelt vannvidd / Utestengt
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head tar på seg solbriller og tror de er virtual reality-briller./ Beavis og Butt-Head blir låst ute av huset og ødelegger det når de prøver å komme seg inn.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Radio Sweethearts / The Great Cornholio
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head win a radio contest and become disc jockeys for a day. / During a sugar rush, Beavis' alter ego appears. He reeks havoc at Highland High looking for "teepee for his bunghole."

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Four Faces Of Sabrina
programme.desc: Choosing a college literally tears Sabrina apart when she tries too hard to make everyone happy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)
programme.desc: After four years of enduring Sabrina’s spells and strange behavior, Harvey finally suspects she is a witch

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Every Witch Way but Loose
programme.desc: After spending the summer trying to get over her first love, Sabrina decides to make some changes in her life, including attending college and living away from home like a normal freshman.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Double Time
programme.desc: In order to keep up with the overwhelming academic and social demands of college life, Sabrina puts herself under a complicated time spell to move at lightning speed, but she later discovers that the extra time got sucked away from her roommates.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Heart of the Matter
programme.desc: When Sabrina realizes she has been turning down guys right and left since her break up with Harvey, she casts a spell to turn herself into a dating machine.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: You Can’t Twin
programme.desc: On a visit to the Other Realm, Sabrina meets up with her evil twin Katrina who steals her passport and returns to mortal life posing as Sabrina.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: House of PI’s
programme.desc: Sabrina and Roxie are unexpectedly paired together to write a story in an effort to land a coveted spot on the school newspaper.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Halloween Scene
programme.desc: When Sabrina can’t find anyone to share her enthusiasm for Halloween she decides to throw her own haunted holiday bash and it turns into the party of the year.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Welcome Traveler
programme.desc: When Sabrina tries to pull Miles away from his latest conspiracy theory and into some semblance of a social life, she unknowingly pushes him right into the hands of a cult whose eccentric leader claims to be a witch.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Some of My Best Friends are Half-Mortals
programme.desc: Tired of hiding her true identity when dating mortal guys, Sabrina agrees to be fixed up by Zelda with a handsome and charming witch, Derek. The budding romance is dashed when she encounters racism over the fact that she is half-mortal.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Don't Kiss Me, I'm Only The Messenger
programme.desc: Alex plays Cupid to help his shy pal Skippy get together with Jane, the girl of his dreams, but his good intentions go awry when the girl falls for him instead.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Little Jennifer is thrilled about getting a visit from her former neighborhood pal, Scott, whom she hasn't seen in five years.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Hotline Fever
programme.desc: As an economics student, Alex finds it demeaning to be forced into a public service position, but his experiences at the crisis center give him a new outlook on life.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Help Wanted
programme.desc: Steven gets depressed from interviewing frightfully inept candidates as housekeeper-nanny for the baby, such as a child-hater ad an ex-con.

programme.title: Fem i familien: 4 RMS OCN VU
programme.desc: While Steven and Elyse are away on vacation, Mallory accidentally crashes her parents' car into a telephone pole. The kids need to raise money for auto repairs and decides to turn the Keaton house into a hotel.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Karen 11, Alex 0
programme.desc: Alex's chances for acceptance into a smug college fraternity are dependent upon him having a knockout date for the pledge dance.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Auntie Up
programme.desc: Mallory is crushed when her favorite aunt dies suddenly, but her feelings of sadness turn to anger when family and friends at the funeral seem to be taking Aunt Trudy's death too lightly.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Oh Donna
programme.desc: Alex befriends Donna, a young, unwed expectant mother from Elyse's natural-childbirth class.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Philadelphia Story
programme.desc: Alex falls asleep while working on a college term paper on Thomas Jefferson and dreams that his family and friends are living 200 years ago.

programme.title: Key & Peele: MC Mom
programme.desc: En gangster deltar i et skuddrama, en mor skriver en sang til sønnen sin, to bondefangere konkurrerer, Big Boi møter André 3000 og to karer kommer ut for en bilulykke.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Scariest Movie Ever
programme.desc: En vampyr avslører seg selv, en seriemorder blir forhindret og et barn får ønsket sitt oppfylt.

programme.title: Key & Peele: A Cappella Club
programme.desc: En PSA jobber med barnesoldater i Afrika, en college-a-cappella-gruppe får et nytt medlem, Meegan og André går på sin første date, en terrorgruppe har en matbil og to gamle menn diskuterer popmusikk.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Cunnilingus Class
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Mr. T lærer oss livsleksjoner, Wendell har bruk for en ny seng og en fornærmelse som går over streken.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Slap-Ass
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at kara har en dårlig Skype-forbindelse, en Django Unchained-slavekamp og en baseballspiller som klasker for mange rumper.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Das Negroes
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan prøver å gjemme seg for en negerjaktende nazist. Andre sketsjer inkluderer to slaver som sliter med å bli solgt, et par kriminelle som kommer i knipe før et stort kupp.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meagan's Fight
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Meagan vender tilbake, Jordan prøver å se kul ut på en strippeklubb og opptrer med et funk-show.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Aerobics Meltdown
programme.desc: Stan Lee har noen nye superhelter, og en gatesmart fyr mister sin street cred når han opplever en hjernefrysning. Og sist, men ikke minst, utvikler en mann en komplisert minnesanordning for å huske hvor han har parkert.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Obama College Years
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan befinner seg plutselig i en gjenoppføring av Borgerkrigen, Jesus møter en farlig hallik, og vi får en god titt på president Barack Obama de første årene på college.

programme.title: Key & Peele: MMMMMM
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan opptrer foran et oppstemt publikum, en trafikkreporter blir utsatt for turbulens i et helikopter og halvdelen av en R&B duo avslører sine sanne følelser for sin partner under en opptreden.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Power of Wings
programme.desc: Inkluderer sketsjer der Keegan og Jordan avlytter hvite kvinner som elsker svarte menn, Wendell lager en musikkvideo og Kareem og Jahar går på treningssenteret.

programme.title: Broad City: Witches
programme.desc: Abbi føler seg gammel etter å ha funnet et grått hår; Ilana går til en sexterapeut.

programme.title: Broad City: Florida
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana, Eliot og Bobbi drar til Florida for å rydde ut av Grandma Esthers leilighet.

programme.title: Broad City: House Sitting
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana, Jaime og Lincoln passer huset til Strands. Ilana og Lincoln definerer forholdet deres, og Abbi går på en Bumble-date med en mann fra fortiden hennes.

programme.title: Broad City: Bed Bugs
programme.desc: En fancy ny veske gir Abbi tillit under arbeidsledigheten. Ilana og Jaimé må ta tak i et uunngåelig New York City-mareritt.

programme.title: Broad City: Friendiversary
programme.desc: Jentenes 'Friendiversary' utvikler seg i en farlig retning når de blir vitne til noe forferdelig.

programme.title: Broad City: Stories
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana farer fra toppen av Manhattan til bunnen for å feire Abbis 30-årsdag, og treffer på både gamle og nye venner på veien.

programme.title: Broad City: Shework and S**t Bucket
programme.desc: Ilana gir seg i kast med sin seneste mulighet til å tjene penger da hun en åpner et utendørs kontorlandskap for New Yorks røykere; Abbi konfronterer husverten sin da han nekter å modernisere sanitæranlegget hennes.

programme.title: Broad City: Bitcoin & the Missing Girl
programme.desc: Ilana besøker en gammel flamme for å få sin del av en Bitcoin-formue; Abbi glemmer klesvasken sin for første gang, og mister favorittgenseren sin.

programme.title: Broad City: Make the Space
programme.desc: Ilana oppdager en skremmende hemmelighet om Jaimé; Abbi prøver å avansere fra genserbretter til vinduskunstner på Anthropologie.

programme.title: Broad City: Artsy Fartsy
programme.desc: Abbi inviteres til et fancy kunstarrangement på MoMA; Ilana og Lincoln analyserer det første året de har vært sammen.

programme.title: RENO 911!: More FBI Help
programme.desc: When the lieutenant governor's brother goes missing, the FBI swings in to help the deputies.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Raineesha X
programme.desc: Williams discovers the Nation of Islam and changes her ways, while Clemmy and Dangle throw down at a fraternity costume contest.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Clementine and Garcia are Dating
programme.desc: After getting it on with nearly every other man in Reno, Johnson finally hooks up with Garcia, and Dangle breaks out his chimney sweep costume.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Undercover Drug Bust
programme.desc: Jones and Garcia enjoy their undercover stakeout a little too much, and Dangle and Clemmy start the department's first rock band.

programme.title: RENO 911!: President Bush in Reno
programme.desc: Reno's finest take on traffic control for President George W. Bush's motorcade, and Jones and Garcia reenact the Civil War at a pizza parlor.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Accidental Marriage
programme.desc: Garcia shoots a Dungeons & Dragons player, and Junior accidentally gets married during a sting operation.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Milkshake Man's Death
programme.desc: Reno District Attorney Mike Powers investigates the Sheriff's Department.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Investigation Concluded
programme.desc: District Attorney Mike Powers concludes his investigation of the Sheriff's Department, while Terry the prostitute takes off in Reno's police helicopter.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Released from Prison
programme.desc: Members of the Reno Sheriff's Department start new lives after getting kicked off the force.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Revenge of Mike Powers
programme.desc: The deputies enjoy their new lives in the private sector, but a specter from their past continues to haunt them.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: I Know Black People & Keeping It Real Goes Wrong
programme.desc: Dave asks contestants how much they know about black American culture.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Oprah's Baby Daddy & Jury Duty
programme.desc: Dave gets Oprah pregnant and recalls being a member of the O.J. Simpson trial jury.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Kneehigh Park & Making da Band
programme.desc: P. Diddy gives unusual requests, and Snoop Dogg visits Kneehigh Park; appearances by Q-Tip and Wyclef Jean.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mandela Boot Camp & The Time Haters
programme.desc: Dave reveals sketches that are too hot for television.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Wayne Brady & Tyrone Biggums's Fear Factor
programme.desc: Dave gives up his show to Wayne Brady, and Tyrone Biggums returns as a guest on "Fear Factor."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Lil Jon on Lil Jon & Black Bush
programme.desc: Dave considers how recent events would have played out if President Bush were black; special guests Jamie Foxx, Lil John, and music from Outkast's Big Boi.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: PopCopy & Clayton Bigsby
programme.desc: A blind white supremacist unleashes hate, and Dave unveils Nat King Cole's booty videos.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums at School & Wrap It Up Box
programme.desc: Crack addict Tyrone Biggums visits an elementary school.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Zapped & It's a Wonderful Chest
programme.desc: Dave screens his failed reality TV show and shares outtakes from "Roots."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Reparations & NY Boobs
programme.desc: Great New York boobs get awards, and Dave predicts reparations chaos.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Great Moments in Hookup History & Ask a Black Dude
programme.desc: With time running out, Martin Johnson has one last stab at glory: Ashley "Smashly" Evans.

programme.title: Tosh.0: The Oscars Spoiler Alerts
programme.desc: Daniel får workouttips til soverommet og avslører alt om filmene som er nominert til Oscar for Beste film.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Tosh.0 February 26, 2013 - Courtroom C**k Guy
programme.desc: The Courtroom C**k Guy gets a Web Redemption, Daniel tests out different slurs, and comedian Greg Hahn asks for medical advice.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Ventriloquist Fail
programme.desc: Daniel nekter å lage en 'Harlem Shake'-video, og Candice, buktaleren som forlot scenen, får gjenoppreisning på nettet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Fat Bottle Ninja
programme.desc: Daniel lærer å koble av, viser hvorfor det er en elendig idé å dra på ferie med kjæresten, og Will - den feite ninja - får gjenoppreisning på nettet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Tosh.0 March 19, 2013 - The Illusion
programme.desc: The Illusion interns for Tosh.0, Daniel battles a homophobic rapper, and prankster Todd Glass dresses up as a cop.

programme.title: Tosh.0: LP Theories
programme.desc: Daniels nye kvinneparfyme kommer ut, han tilbringer tid med sin yndlingskomiker oppkalt etter en rotgrønnsak og noen ufølsomme collegejenter får oppreisning på nettet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Plus-Size Model
programme.desc: Daniel presenterer oss for vår gærne nabo i nord og løser alt som er galt med USA - og dessuten får en model med et enormt hjerte (og stort alt annet) sin oppreisning på nettet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: BK Chicken Fries
programme.desc: Daniel lærer hvilke av hans private deler som er brannfarlige og gir bort ting gratis, og en entusiastisk mann som er glad i barnemat, får oppreisning på nettet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Hey, Baby Girl
programme.desc: Daniel hjelper Bill Gates med å skape et produkt som folk liker å bruke og lærer Georgia litt om borgerrettigheter. Dessuten får en gutt med bar overkropp oppreisning på nettet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Fired For Being Too Hot
programme.desc: Daniel kommer "sex" tilbake i sextrakassering, gjør deg enda mer paranoid om å bo på hotell og hyller trær før Arbor Day og "420". Og en kvinne som ble sparket fordi hun var for pen, får oppreisning på nettet.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Latka worries that Simka's wacky behavior might cost her the right to remain permanently in America.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex’s romantic instincts are triggered by the sexy voice at the answering service. Her alluring manner prompts him to arrange a dinner date that turns into a big surprise on Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi go to great lengths to secure a loan to fix an unexpected issue on their flip house.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi are eager to book a night away in a hotel after Teddy keeps sleeping in their bed; Kate is allowed to stay home alone but doesn't follow Adam and Andi's strict rules.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam offers to go on a vegan diet with Kate in an effort to bond with her, his love of meat proves a hard habit to break.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: After Adam throws out his back on his 50th birthday, he is still determined to take a dirt bike excursion and check it off his bucket list; Don and Adam give out bonuses at work.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam gets jealous when Teddy names Andi as his hero for a school essay.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam accidentally invites Andi to go on the guys' annual trip, he tries to un-invite her, which only makes matters worse.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam recruits Marcy to put Andi's snooty sister in her place when she comes for a visit.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi see how much Lowell's new relationship with Andi's sister is changing him, they stage an intervention to get him to stop putting up with her bad behavior.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
