programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hva som skjer når du ikke lander støtt i 'Ustø landing', sjekker de mest lojale kjærestene i 'Jeg er opptatt' og avslutter med uheldige campere i 'Glamourløs camping'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med stil idet de 'Flyr over styret', spaserer på løs grunn i 'Fallgulv' og drar for å gjøre innkjøp altfor sent i 'Grubutikken'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' hogger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ned trær med noen 'Tømmerflopper', får seg noen 'Luftige-svev-madrasser' og har det kjempekult på 'Rockeførskolen'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' havner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood i 'Faresoner', avklarer ulike situasjoner av 'Glassknas' og oppnår betydelig høyde med 'Flygebiler'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' møter Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood ufokuserte fedre med 'Distraherte pappahjerner', driver høyt spill i golf med 'Djerv gjenvinning' og viser sine fiseferdigheter når de utfører 'Gasstriks'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppsummerer Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood kostnadene ved å ha barn i 'Dyre barn', snubler over sirkusartister som lager 'Plutselig sirkus' og opplever slitsomme feiringer med 'Dårlige bursdager'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' denger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hodet i veggen som første trekk i 'Kraftskaller', ødelegger golfutstyret sitt i 'På tide med nye køller' og møter farene ved å benytte 'Samkjøring om natten'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' utforsker Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood ildidrettens verden i 'Flammesport', finner ut hvor farlige dører kan være i 'Helt av hengslene' og blir overrasket over noen svært 'Uventede raketter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood inn i ubevegelige gjenstander i 'Parkert smerte', oppdager at trafikkflyten kan påvirkes av bisarre årsaker i 'Motorveiforsinkelser' og opplever farene ved 'Olme okser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' støter Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på farlige voltere uten 'Saltobevissthet', opplever smerten ved knuste tohjulinger i Billigsykler' og oppdager at heis og fyll ikke går så godt sammen i 'Heisa-heistur'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood å muntre opp folk som er 'Vinterdeppa', finner ut hva som skjer når du faller og opplever 'Fjes mot gjerde' og ødelegger perfekte øyeblikk med 'Triste forlovelsesopptak'.

programme.title: Andromeda: En symmetri av ufullkommenhet
programme.desc: Når Rommie blir for emosjonell, kutter skipet hennes tilgang til diagnostikk.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tid ute av sinn
programme.desc: Abyss dreper Bekas venn, og mannskapet må finne ut hvilken informasjon de drepte for.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dissonantintervallet (del 1)
programme.desc: Andromeda redder et skip som returnerer fra fredsforhandlinger med Magog.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dissonantintervallet (del 2)
programme.desc: Magog-angrepet har alvorlige konsekvenser. Andromeda blir ødelagt, Trance og Dylan antas å være de eneste overlevende og Dylan rømmer inn i en tidsrute.

programme.title: Andromeda: Vekten (del 1)
programme.desc: Dylan havner på Seefra, der den overtroiske befolkningen ikke har noen teknologi.

programme.title: Andromeda: Vekten (del 2)
programme.desc: Beka blir dumpet på Seefra etter at Andromeda er stjålet, og Dylan må bevise at skipet er hans.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: A married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a mini-vacation in Key West. The wife went missing and police searched every square inch of the island; they found nothing but a pair of sandals which might have belonged to her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two young children was found dead in her bedroom. Her death was ruled a suicide — but when investigators learned she had almost died in a house fire three years earlier, they decided to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: In 1991, when the wife of a serviceman was brutally murdered in the Philippines, investigators had to reassemble a tiny computer disk that had been cut to pieces in order to find the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bombings are difficult to solve because the perpetrator isn't usually at the scene and the evidence goes up in smoke. In this case, pieces of plastic the size of grains of sand hold the key to finding a murderer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer was found dead in her bed with a plastic laundry bag near her face. Further investigation proved that the scene had been staged. Her death wasn't an accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: When a fire destroyed most of a home and a young boy went missing, police organized the largest search in the history of their small town. First the boy's backpack was discovered five miles from home, then his body was found 50 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman was dispatched to what he thought would be a routine traffic accident — until he looked in the car. He had seen hundreds of accidents, but none with as much blood as this.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up On Crime
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a young woman was discovered in a Bakersfield irrigation canal. If there was trace evidence, it had been washed away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile caused the Baton Rouge Police Department to search for the wrong man. The real perpetrator may have eluded arrest, had it not been for a molecular biologist who painted DNA picture of the suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 13
programme.desc: This episode includes: Chad, UD: Thanks Big Brother, Honky Tonk Woman & UD, Practical Joker & UD, and Nine Lives & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 14
programme.desc: This episode includes: Larry's Last Race & UD, UD: Til Death Do Us Part, Millionairess Murder & UD, and Dances With Moomess & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 15
programme.desc: This episode includes: Mystery Hitchhiker, Anchors Away, Lucky Lost Love & UD, and Vegas Rapist & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 16
programme.desc: This episode includes: Medjugorje, Shack Fire, Dial A for Abduction, and Missing Bank Executive.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 17
programme.desc: This episode includes: Black and Blue & UD, Drunk Driver & UD, Yeti, and Jane Doe's Ashes.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: Two young boys were the only witnesses to their mother's murder. The horrible crime appeared unmotivated, senseless and random.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Remorse
programme.desc: A small town without any crime was turned inside out by the arrival of one dangerous stranger. Some killers are cold and calculating; others are impulsive, unpredictable, and hard to pin down.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dixie Mafia
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Radical Agenda
programme.desc: In the 1970's a string of bank robberies and bombings spread fear and destruction along the east coast. The FBI faced a new breed of criminal, the domestic terrorist.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Scattered Clues
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutalchoosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Compulsion
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker: the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead In The Water
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Toxic Death
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Short Fuse
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which was mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid, the box exploded, killing her instantly.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 1
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travels to Derbyshire to investigate the New Mills Arts Theatre. This quirky little building has played host to many famous acts and world-renowned plays but has a little-known secret in that it's allegedly haunted.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 2
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension Team is ready for act II at the New Mills Arts Theatre. With so much apparent activity happening at this unassuming theatre, the team just couldn't leave when so much more could happen.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunted Weir Mill
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team visits Weir Mill, the oldest and most paranormally active mill in Stockport.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Old Glen and Milner Curse
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team heads to Shipley, West Yorkshire to investigate The Old Glen House Pub.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Bulkeley Hotel
programme.desc: The former home of Queen Victoria is now home to many spirits who have been seen by guests and staff. Witness the first ever formal documentation of the paranormal activities in the Bulkeley Hotel.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: House of Horror
programme.desc: Blackpool is iconic for ghosts and tonight, Sean and Bex investigate a horror attraction which appears to have attracted some very real spirits that are spooking its customers.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She Is My Property
programme.desc: Lanikka is sick and tired of her boyfriend Malcom’s abusive ways. Then, Tim’s jealousy has torn his family apart, but now he’s desperate to win them back, but will Tiffany leave him for good?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Slept With THAT Man?
programme.desc: LaShawna and her boyfriend James will learn if her friend Coral harmed her child years ago. She’ll also admit that she cheated with Coral. How will he react when he finds out another bombshell?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Better Not Fail That Test!
programme.desc: Lainie and Justin have a 9-month-old baby together. Justin hurts Lainie because he thinks she’s cheating. But how will Steve react when he confronts Justin?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: How Could You Cover for Him?
programme.desc: Gina believes that her daughter’s boyfriend Efrain is abusing her grandson. Her daughter wants to prove that Efrain is innocent, but her father Raul suspects she is covering for Efrain.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Who Did This?
programme.desc: Who’s responsible for toddler Noel's well-being? Everyone may deny the allegations, but someone knows what happened, and Steve is getting answers!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom
programme.desc: Kendra is on a mission to save herself from her toxic boyfriend Chris. At 17, Kendra is pregnant with his sixth child. Kendra has tried almost everything including kicking him out of their house, but he not only argued back but assaulted Kendra as well.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: Hikers come across a horrific scene: the corpse of a man left nude, beaten and bound in the mountain wilderness.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: With Friends Like This
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down outside his home. Sgt. Joe Kenda and Det. John Anderson must determine whether the killer was a complete stranger, a barrio gang member, or a jealous lover.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood On the Tracks
programme.desc: When an unsuspecting train conductor discovers a decapitated body on a lonely stretch of track, Lt. Joe Kenda must unravel the mystery of his death.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Make My Day
programme.desc: When Keith Andrews is killed, a man steps forward claiming he did it in self-defense—but Lt. Joe Kenda has his doubts.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: .357 Magnum
programme.desc: The murder of a popular teen at a crowded house party sends Kenda down a winding road paved with lies, misdirection, and innuendo.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Marchioness Disaster
programme.desc: The story of the Marchioness; a pleasure boat that collided with dredger Bowbelle and sank within minutes resulting in the loss of 51 lives.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Clare Wood
programme.desc: In April 2007, Clare Wood met George Appleton on a dating website and they embarked on a relationship together. Unbeknownst to her, Appleton was a criminal with a severe history of violence against women.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Philpotts
programme.desc: When six children died in a house fire in Allenton, Derby in May 2012 it shocked the nation. Parents Mick and Mairead Philpott were charged with the murders. We uncover the reasons behind the arson attack on their own home.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Deadly Doppelgangers
programme.desc: Jerome and Tyrone Page went through years of criminality that comes to a head in a night of brutal violence. Their shared DNA will eventually pit one twin against the other.

programme.title: Evil Twins: The Candymen
programme.desc: Growing up privileged, the George Brothers had everything. In Florida’s pill epidemic of the 2000s, they became millionaires, only to crash amidst overdoses, arrests and a tragic train accident.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: The Face in the Window
programme.desc: A woman under assault by an aggressive entity is rescued by the spirit of her deceased son. A maid who was murdered in the 19th century continues to work at an old Texas hotel.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: Haunted Bergen House
programme.desc: With the help of ghost hunter Megan Deputy, Nick investigates the Haunted Bergen House.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: Fire in the Church
programme.desc: Nick tries to determine if the ghosts of priests that died in a 1948 fire are haunting the property today.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: The Mountain Clinic
programme.desc: Nick conducts the first-ever paranormal investigation of the Mountain Clinic, a 105-year-old vacant hospital.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Spirits at The Lord Eldon
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travels to the old town of Knutsford, Cheshire to investigate the historic Lord Eldon Inn, hoping to contact the spirit of Sarah Ann Pollitt who is said to haunt the pub.

programme.title: Andromeda: D Minus Zero
programme.desc: Andromeda-mannskapet lærer fremdeles hvordan de skal samarbeide ettersom de blir angrepet av restauratørene.

programme.title: Mutant X: The Shock of the New (Pilot)
programme.desc: En mutant empat på flukt fra mystiske regjeringsagenter blir reddet av et team av andre 'nye mutanter', gruppen kjent som Mutant X.

programme.title: Mutant X: I Scream the Body Electric
programme.desc: Brennan blir fanget og faller under Eckharts kontroll, og han blir tvunget til å jobbe mot de nye mutantene.

programme.title: Mutant X: Russian Roulette
programme.desc: Mutant X kommer til hjelp av en tenåring New Mutant forfulgt av russere fordi hun har hemmeligheten til et nytt våpen som er rettet mot mutanter.

programme.title: Mutant X: Fool for Love
programme.desc: Shalimar nærmer seg en annen vill når det er 'lyst ved første blikk', men saken blir komplisert når hennes nye kjæreste prøver å finne en kur for tilstanden hans.

programme.title: On the Case: The Long Path to Justice
programme.desc: A couple's daily walk ends in murder and a cloud of suspicion descends on the victim's family.

programme.title: On the Case: A Ray of Darkness
programme.desc: Police must connect two vicious murders in order to bring a single killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder Ordained?
programme.desc: When a young minister's wife is found dead, it appears to be a tragic accident. But then, another member of the congregation is murdered. Police begin to wonder if its just a coincidence or a calculated plot.

programme.title: On the Case: Hanging By A Thread
programme.desc: Hillsborough County Florida is in the midst of a horrifying crime spree. Young women are turning up dead every week. Can one teen age girl's bravery bring an end to a vicious killer's reign of terror?

programme.title: On the Case: For Love and Duty
programme.desc: After a father discovers his 23 year old daughter murdered in her bed, a dedicated investigator spends more than 30 years chasing her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Darkness After Dawn
programme.desc: After a newlywed is found murdered in her bedroom, a search is launched for the killer that will last for three decades.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Whitney Cummings, Anita Tam, Drew's News with Whitney Cummings
programme.desc: "At Midnight" star Whitney Cummings is joining Drew to take a bungee fitness class! She's also covering the news with Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk including why women may smell different after leaving a boyfriend's place.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Patricia Field, Pilar Valdes, Drew's News
programme.desc: Costume designer Patricia Field is telling Drew all about some of the famous looks she's created for "Sex and the City," "The Devil Wears Prada" and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Rebel Wilson, Lauren Makk
programme.desc: "The Almond and the Seahorse" star Rebel Wilson is joining Drew. HGTV's Lauren Makk is talking all about candle sticks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Eliza VanCort, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew is joined by Garcelle Beauva is for a special female empowerment edition of Drew's News. "Claiming Space" author and mentor Eliza Van Cort is sharing tips for female empowerment and how to claim your space.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Bobby Farrelly, Madison Tevlin, Kevin Iannucci, Joshua Felder
programme.desc: "Champions" director Bobby Farrelly is talking to Drew and joined by cast members Madison Tevlin, Kevin Iannucci and Joshua Felder to chat about the film. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Pilar Valdes, Chris Freimuth, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are back at the news desk and hitting the hottest headlines. Drew-crew member Pilar Valdes is sharing pro tips for making burgers. Horticulturist Chris Freimuth is sharing some easy flower tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Theresa Caputo
programme.desc: "Long Island Medium" star Theresa Caputo is chatting with Drew about her work as a medium, the show and more. She's also doing a special reading of the studio audience.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Mario Cantone, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up covering the one thing Drake regrets about his rap career and how long experts say it takes to decide if you're attracted to someone.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Daisy Jones and the Six Cast, Drew's News
programme.desc: The cast of "Daisy Jones and the Six" talk with Drew about their new show! They're chatting all about the 70's theme of the show, their time on set and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Mikel Welch, Kristina Zias, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering headlines like the woman who tweeted the unusual snack her fellow plane passenger whipped out and the new device that allows lovers to kiss virtually.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Christine Taylor, Drew's News
programme.desc: "Hey Dude the 90's Called" podcast host and actress Christine Taylor is joining Drew to chat about working together on "The Wedding Singer" and some of her iconic roles in classics like "Dodgeball" and "The Brady Bunch Movie."

programme.title: 48 Hours: Good Cop/Bad Cop: Solving the Murder of Heather Bogle
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Grave Injustice
programme.desc: A report on the case of Anthony Graves, who spent eighteen years -- twelve of them on death row -- in a Texas prison for murders he did not commit.

programme.title: 48 Hours: One of Their Own
programme.desc: A report about how female Los Angeles Police Detective Stephanie Lazarus was charged with the 1986 murder of Sherri Mae Rasmussen. The victim, newly married to Lazarus’ ex-boyfriend, was attacked, beaten and shot to death in her Los Angeles home.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Redemption Song
programme.desc: A report on the 1985 death of Natalie Antonetti, a woman who was part of the Austin, Texas music community. She was found beaten at home by her son, Johnny Goodie, and remained in a coma for two weeks before she died.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Vase Against Enrico Forti
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Red Notice For Murder
programme.desc: A report on the international search conducted by Nadia Ford and private detective Herman Weisberg for Viktoria Nasyrova, a Russian woman suspected of the 2014 murder of Ford's mother, Alla Aleksenko.

programme.desc: Judge Judy Sheindlin, a former judge from New York, tackles actual, small claims cases with her no-nonsense attitude.

programme.title: Cops: Nothing Upstairs
programme.desc: Officers pursue a motorcyclist driving erratically. Deputies find broken drug paraphernalia in a car when conducting a traffic stop. A man who beat up his girlfriend hides from officers in an attic.

programme.title: Cops: Follow Me to the River
programme.desc: A deputy jumps into a waterway to arrest a fleeing suspect. Officers respond to roommates in an argument. Officers are called when two crossdressers attack a group of women.

programme.title: Cops: Hiding the Evidence
programme.desc: A drug dealer swallows something suspicious as deputies move in to arrest him. Deputies pull over a father with his son in the car. A woman files a kidnapping report against her own boyfriend.

programme.title: Cops: Blame my Man
programme.desc: A man runs from police claiming he heard a gunshot. A woman lays the blame on her boyfriend. Officers confront a man who refuses to come down from a roof.

programme.title: Cops: My BFF Screwed Up
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call of a woman holding a loaded gun to her head. Officers kick in a door to halt an assault in progress. A woman driving a stolen vehicle claims it was purchased by a friend.

programme.title: Cops: Last Call Brawl
programme.desc: Deputies chase a man who flees a routine traffic stop. Deputies find drugs on a man who gives them an expired license. Officers respond to a man attacking several patrons in a bar.

programme.title: Cops: He's the Gingerbread Man
programme.desc: A man wanted for unpaid child support hides from deputies. Officers respond to a sexual predator following a minor. A man with a checkered driving record crashes his car.

programme.title: Cops: Hood Flip
programme.desc: A police chase becomes more dangerous when the hood of a stolen vehicle flips open. A purse snatcher denies robbing a woman. A limping man with a knee injury denies crashing his car into a tree.

programme.title: Cops: Dangerous Toppings
programme.desc: A jaywalker with no id bolts away from an officer. A man mixes illicit items with his pizza. A woman involved in a domestic violence call blames her monthly issues.

programme.title: Cops: No Respect these Days
programme.desc: A combative man at a fast food restaurant claims his phone was stolen. Multiple illegal items are found on a man parked on the side of the road. An intoxicated man throws an 83-year-old's walker.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Honeymoon Killers (Van Beers Case)
programme.desc: Marc Van Beers, a 36-year old Brussels tax lawyer, dies in a road accident while on honeymoon. His wife Aurore is unharmed by the accident.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Laurence Dromard Case
programme.desc: Sylvain Dromard finds the body of his wife Laurence lying in a pool of blood in the kitchen. The crime was particularly violent and the theory of a burglary that went wrong is soon excluded. But investigators don't understand who could want her dead.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Two Young Women Massacred: The Leconte Affair
programme.desc: On July 8, 2002, near Amiens, a farmer discovers the lifeless body of a young woman, Patricia Leclercq, on his field.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Shot In the While Sleeping (Richard Alessandri Case)
programme.desc: On the night of July 16, 2000, the life of Edwige Alessandri changed forever. She made a frantic emergency call in the town of Carpentras. She recounted that some men burst into her room and shot her husband while he slept.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Josiane Bézard Case
programme.desc: On the morning of January 9th 2014, Josiane Bézard, 53 years old, drives her son to the Manosque's train station, and then vanishes.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 506
programme.desc: 26. januar 2001 ble Benjamin Hermansen knivstukket til døde som følge av sin hudfarge. Drapet fikk hele landet til å delta i antirasistiske markeringer og protester.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En familie som rammes av en husbrann klarer å unnslippe flammene, men alt de eier har blitt til aske. Det som først ser ut til å være en ulykke, viser seg å være mye mer komplisert.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 105
programme.desc: Tina Jørgensen forsvant etter en kveld på byen i Stavanger. En måned senere finner politiet liket av en 20 år gammel kvinne. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av Tina og deretter dumpet henne langs en øde veistrekning?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 301
programme.desc: Justisminister Tor Mikkel Wara blir i 2018 utsatt for en rekke alvorlige angrep på sitt private hjem. I flere måneder står politiet uten spor, helt til det kommer et sjokkerende gjennombrudd i saken.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 404
programme.desc: I desember 2015 gjør gallerist Reidar Osen et ærend med varebilen sin da han blir kapret av ukjente gjerningsmenn, som truer ham på livet og krever to millioner kroner. Hvem står bak kidnappingen?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 102
programme.desc: Åtte år gamle Monika Sviglinskaja blir funnet død i sitt hjem på Sotra. Politiet mener det dreier seg om et selvmord og henlegger saken. Men moren hennes er fortsatt overbevist om at noe kriminelt har skjedd.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: No Way Down
programme.desc: Injured in an explosion, Vincent is captured by a vicious street gang.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Masques
programme.desc: Free to walk the streets openly on Halloween, Vincent becomes the guardian of an Irish peace activist who's been targeted for assassination.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Beast Within
programme.desc: Vincent must choose loyalties when a childhood friend becomes a mob enforcer.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Nor Iron Bars a Cage
programme.desc: Accidentally caught on film, Vincent become the target of a scientist desperate to learn the truth about him.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Song of Orpheus
programme.desc: When Father ventures to the Above World for the first time in decades, he is arrested for murder. Vincent and Catherine must delve into Father's mysterious past to uncover the truth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Arrival
programme.desc: A plane lands safely, but the pilot, crew and all of its passengers are missing!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Shelter
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Call
programme.desc: A lonely man accidentally phones the wrong number and finds an intriguing female to whom he grows attached. When she refuses to meet him, he investigates and finds the phone in a museum next to the statue of a woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trance
programme.desc: A scam artist purports to channel the spirit of Delos, a former inhabitant of Atlantis. Together with a partner, he makes a living off of it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Acts of Terror
programme.desc: A woman terrorized by her abusive husband finds some small consolation in a statue of a dog given to her by her sympathetic sister

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Twenty-Twenty Vision
programme.desc: Newly promoted bank loan officer Warren Cribbens cracks his eyeglasses and discovers he can see the future through them. Faced with seeing the future of the farmers whose farms he must foreclose on, Warren can't bring himself to foreclose.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Passersby
programme.desc: On the road home from the Civil War, a Confederate soldier stops at a burned-out house and gets to know the owner, a recent widow.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Game of Pool
programme.desc: Championship pool player Fats Brown returns from the grave for one last game.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Mirror
programme.desc: After a poor but ambitious Central American farm worker overthrows his country's tyrannical leader, he believes he sees assassins everywhere. A look in the mirror reveals his most dangerous enemy.

programme.title: JAG: Posse Comitatus
programme.desc: Harm and Mac argue the case of a Marine pilot who used force to interfere with a local police matter that led to a man’s killing. Roberts is the investigating officer in the matter of a Navy doctor who is requesting conscientious objector status.

programme.title: JAG: The Boast
programme.desc: When an unwitting corporal boasts to a reporter that he killed an Iraqi prisoner of war, facts begin to emerge that could convict him despite his later claim that he was only lying toi mpress.

programme.title: JAG: Pulse Rate
programme.desc: Harm and Mac go aboard the USS Gillcrist to determine if a seaman’s fatal accident during a routine repair was the result of a co-worker’s dereliction of duty or worse.

programme.title: JAG: Good Intentions
programme.desc: Mac defends a petty officer and former alcoholic accused of a brutal murder after a drinking binge which renders him useless in remembering details that could help him. Roberts is entangled in the case of a Navy Commander accused of embezzling funds.

programme.title: JAG: People vs SECNAV
programme.desc: After an incident in Iraq claims the lives of innocent civilians, SecNav is brought up on charges of war crimes in International Court, and Harm and Mac must defend him. Meanwhile, during a trip to the arcade, little A.J. goes missing.

programme.title: Happy Days: Nose is for News
programme.desc: To prove to his college journalism professor that he has what it takes to be a good investigative reporter, Richie gets down and dirty to expose who's behind an illegal garbage collection scheme.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Fair Fonzie
programme.desc: Snobby Cynthia Holmes schemes with her obnoxious cousin, Skippy, to make the Fonz look foolish at a country club soirée.

programme.title: Happy Days: Bye Bye Blackball
programme.desc: Richie, Ralph, and Potsie endure the harassment of "hell week" to prove themselves worthy to enter their college fraternity, Phi Kappa Nu.

programme.title: Happy Days: Joanie's First Kiss
programme.desc: Sophomore Joanie Cunningham gets basic back-seat defense tips from Richie and Fonzie before her first "car date" with a senior boy, and then cramps her older brother's style when she and her date show up at his college "make-out" party.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Almost Dies
programme.desc: What begins as a humorous escapade with a motorcycle turns into a tragic vigil for the Cunninghams and their friends.

programme.title: Happy Days: Do You Want to Dance
programme.desc: Fonzie's latest romantic interest, a ballet teacher, is secretly yearning to turn professional and dance with the greats in New York. Fonzie, however, has trouble accepting that she may forgo their relationship to pursue her dreams of fame.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Malph
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Happy Days: Smokin' Ain'T Cool
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Hot Ones: Shaq Tries to Not Make a Face While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Shaquille O'Neal is one of the most dominant players in NBA history, an analyst on Inside the NBA and a DJ!

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones: Kumail Nanjiani Sweats Intensely While Eating Spicy Wings

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Lizzo is a three-time Grammy Award-winning singer-songwriter who wants the hot sauce crown.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Joji and Rich Brian Play the Newlywed Game While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Joji and Rich Brian make a second date with the wings of death for the first-ever "Hot Ones Summer Special."

programme.title: Hot Ones: Issa Rae Raps While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Issa Rae, the multitalented writer, producer and actress, traces her glow up from Stanford to TV.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Alexa Chung Fears for Her Life While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Alexa Chung takes on the wings of death and explains how she got banned from red carpet hosting duties.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Timberlake and Fatone take on the gauntlet for a second time and the rest of the band joins them.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Andy Cohen Spills the Tea While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The "Watch What Happens Live with Andy Cohen" star is no stranger to talk shows going off the rails.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Under the supervision of sculptor Gutzon Borglum, miners and quarrymen carve the faces of four U.S. presidents into the Black Hills of South Dakota, paying tribute to the first 150 years of American history.

programme.title: Secret War: Hardy Amies and Operation Ratweek
programme.desc: Operation Ratweek’s existence has always been denied. However WMR has now discovered evidence that it existed and was carried out.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Slovenia: The Crow's Flight
programme.desc: Monty heads to Slovenia to retrace one of the most daring, yet unknown, mass escapes of Allied prisoners during the second world war, made possible only with the help of partisans and locals.

programme.title: Secret War: Double Agent Tricycle
programme.desc: Dusan Popov was almost certainly James Bond. Ian Fleming knew all the stories about him. Popov managed to persuade both the Germans and MI6 to keep him in the style of a millionaire businessman while performing a series of missions against the Nazis.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Time is Blood 1942-5
programme.desc: Episode 2 begins after the desperate German winter of 1941. Yet 1942 began badly for the Soviets, with more vicious Nazi campaigning seeing millions more Russians captured and starved.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: They are iconic weapons: the Tommy Gun, Uzi, and today’s MP5. Invented to break WWI stalemates, the submachine gun revolutionized warfare and culture. Host Wil Willis explores its evolution, firing the Thompson and BAR.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Farvel del 2
programme.desc: Carly er på vei til å akseptere at hun ikke kan gå på det årlige ballet, da faren hennes dukker opp og går sammen med henne. Kvelden tar en uventet vending når faren hennes stiller et livsavgjørende spørsmål.

programme.title: iCarly: Vårt eget webshow
programme.desc: Når Miss Briggs avviser alle yndlingsdeltagerne deres fra uttakene til talenshowet, bestemmer Carly og Sam seg for å lage sitt eget talentshow for klassekameratene gjennom iCarly på nettet.

programme.title: iCarly: Herr Nesten Perfekt
programme.desc: Carly er keen på en gutt på skolen som heter Jake. Han er råkul og kjekk, og fordi hun liker ham, inviterer hun Jake til å spille gitar og synge på sitt nye webshow. Men hun oppdager forsent at Jake synger helt forferdelig.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil ha flere seere
programme.desc: Carly og Sam konkurrerer med Freddie og Spencer om å finne den beste planen for hvordan å få flere ungdommer til å se på iCarlys websendinger. Når alle planene deres slår helt feil, blir alt helt sprøtt.

programme.title: iCarly: En pågående kritiker
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie vil at web-showet deres skal bli anmeldt av 'Nevelocity', en populær webside for slike anmeldelser. Carly drar for å møte Nevel, og det viser seg at han er en irriterende gutt som vil date henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil bli hos Spencer
programme.desc: Bestefaren til Carly og Spencer kommer på overraskelsesvisitt. Han tror at Spencer er for uansvarlig til å passe på Carly. Carly og vennene hennes må bevise overfor bestefaren at Spencer er i stand til det.

programme.title: iCarly: Rekordforsøket
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie prøver å slå verdensrekorden for den lengste sammenhengende nettvideovisningen. For å klare det, må iCarly gå i over 24 timer i ett kjør.

programme.title: iCarly: En date med Freddie
programme.desc: Valerie er iCarly-fan og ber Freddie på date. Daten går så bra at Freddie begynner å filme Valeries eget webshow. Men når hennes webshow kommer i veien for iCarly, får Freddie problemer.

programme.title: iCarly: En lidenskapelig amatør
programme.desc: Carly inviterer Spencers kunsthelt, Harry Joyner, for å se på Spencers arbeid. Når Harry kaller Spensers ting amatørmessige, føler Spencer at livet har mistet all mening.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarlys største fan
programme.desc: iCarlys største fan, Mandy, blir invitert til showet som enslig studiopuplikum. Mandy viser seg å være mer av en forfølger enn et fan, og de blir nødt til å kvitte seg med henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Kyllinger på rømmen
programme.desc: Carly og Sam starter med å klekke ut kyllinger for et naturfagprosjekt. Kyllingene klekkes tidligere enn ventet og rømmer fra inkubatoren. Nå må Carly, Sam, Freddie og Spencer finne alle kyllingene rundt om i leiligheten.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7

programme.title: The Takeout with Major Garrett
programme.desc: The Takeout is a new spin on the widely acclaimed podcast hosted by Major Garrett; a daily streaming show that harnesses the best of CBS News' political reporting and lives comfortably in deep discussions.

programme.title: The Daily Report
programme.desc: The Daily Report on CBS News features original interviews and insights on the most important, urgent and interesting stories of the day.

programme.title: 24/7 Primetime

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Checkflight
programme.desc: Joe leaves to undergo medical tests at the Mayo Clinic in Phoenix, Arizona. Jeff and Sam stress over their DC-3 checkflights and Joe celebrates turning 70-his way.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Second Chances
programme.desc: Rookie pilot Jeff nearly runs off the runway. Prefkar learns to play hockey but drops the ball at Buffalo and Joe goes on a date with a real dog.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Big Plans, Bad Luck
programme.desc: Mikey decides to get Buffalo involved in a D-Day paratrooper jump to commemorate the 70th anniversary of D-Day. Prefkar escapes Hay River courier duty. Cory finds an original bracket for the DC3 static line for Mikey's D-Day jump.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Dogfight
programme.desc: Buffalo's top guns, rookies and vets, go to California for aerial dogfights in real fighter planes. Cory and Mikey race to get ready for the D-Day jump.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: D-Day
programme.desc: Mikey's much-planned D-Day tribute parachute jump with 20 paratroopers hits a wall when Joe refuses to fly his DC-3 to the drop zone.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: 40/40/40
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot Scott faces his worst nightmare when a faltering Curtiss C-46 Commando engine and low fog force a scary landing.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Frasier kidnapper sin egen sønn for å hindre ham i å bli rituelt omskåret i henhold til den jødiske tradisjonen.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Gutta på Cheers har en skjeggvekstkonkurranse for å teste mannligheten.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Når Rebeccas plan om å overraske Robin Colcord med en romantisk kveld slår feil, ender hun opp fanget i Robins toppleilighet med Sam.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Mens Norms eks-sekretær faller for Cliff, søker Rebecca etter en "skjult skatt" i en gave fra Robin.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam, Carla og Norm seiler i Robin Colcords båt når de oppdager at det finnes en bombe om bord.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebeccas favorittprofessor kommer på besøk, og til stor vantro har professoren en kort affære med Sam.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Cliff blir trukket av scenen når han er en deltaker på Jeopardy.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam oppdager Rebeccas mann med en annen kvinne.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebecca finner ut at hun ikke er den eneste kvinnen i Robins kjærlighetsliv.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Woodys kjærestes mor, en vakker, eldre kvinne, gjør seksuelle fremskritt mot ham.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Radio Sweethearts / The Great Cornholio
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head win a radio contest and become disc jockeys for a day. / During a sugar rush, Beavis' alter ego appears. He reeks havoc at Highland High looking for "teepee for his bunghole."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Murder Site / Sexual Harassment
programme.desc: Beavis can't take Butt-head's verbal abuse anymore, and snaps while they're checking out the site of a local murder. / Beavis and Butt-head sue Kimberly for sexual harassment, since she's giving them wood.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Ding-Dong-Ditch / Head lice / Nothing happening
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head have trouble with a prank / The duo try to cure their scratchy heads / A quiet day in Highland, Texas

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Cyber-Butt / Citizens arrest / Pierced
programme.desc: The school PC gets internet and Stewart helps out friends surf the net / An armed robbery has hilarious consequence / Beavis and Butt-Head get beaten up and inspired to get their ears pierced

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bus trip / Green thumbs
programme.desc: The class goes on a roadtrip / Beavis and Butt dabble into counterfeit money using a photocopier

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Meet God
programme.desc: Innocent, naive yougsters Beavis & Butt-head are drawn into an insidious religious cult.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: 1-900-BEAVIS / Water Safety
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to start their own phone service / Beavis and Butt-head learn CPR from Mr. Buzzcut

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Take a number / Stewart moves away / Premature evacuation
programme.desc: The duo goes to rock concert / Beavis and Butt-Head breaks into Stewarts house to watch TV / A bomb threat is called into their high school

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Friday Night / Tornado
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head spend Friday night at the local convenience store. / Beavis & Butt-head in their own mini-disaster movie with new friends Lolita and Tanqueray.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: They're Coming to Take Me Away, Huh Huh (aka Psychiatrist)/ Jump!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head pass all their Rorscach tests. / Beavis and Butt-head inadvertently stop a suicide.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Some of My Best Friends are Half-Mortals
programme.desc: Tired of hiding her true identity when dating mortal guys, Sabrina agrees to be fixed up by Zelda with a handsome and charming witch, Derek. The budding romance is dashed when she encounters racism over the fact that she is half-mortal.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Lost @ C
programme.desc: Sabrina is distraught when she receives her first “C” ever on a class assignment and turns to Zelda for counseling. Zelda ends up conducting her own private tutoring session with Sabrina’s handsome professor.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: Sabrina opts to spend a picture-perfect Christmas with Morgan and her family rather than endure the annual insanity with Hilda and Zelda. She soon discovers the ugly secrets under the flawless façade.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: My Best Shot
programme.desc: Sabrina tries to give Josh a little confidence booster in his new passion to be a photographer, but her simple spell to help him make his first sale leads to his getting a big head and walking out on his job at the coffeehouse.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Tick-Tock Hilda’s Clock
programme.desc: When Sabrina throws Hilda a surprise party for her 650th birthday, Hilda becomes depressed that she doesn’t have a husband or family yet. Things go from bad to worse when Sabrina loses the out-of-whack biological clock.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s New Roommate
programme.desc: When Sabrina reluctantly takes in Zelda for a few days while Hilda’s on a home remodeling binge, Sabrina and her roommates try to loosen up her uptight Aunt Zelda.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Making the Grade
programme.desc: Sabrina tries to right a wrong when she writes an article for the school paper exposing the preferential treatment given to school athletes, but she inadvertently puts Roxie's scholarship in jeopardy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Love is a Many Complicated Thing
programme.desc: Sabrina agrees to a double date on Valentine's Day with Josh and Morgan, but by the end of the date she finds herself in the middle of her friends' break up.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina the Muse
programme.desc: Sabrina is flattered when her new boyfriend writes music about his feelings for her, but the pressure to inspire him as his muse becomes a one-sided relationship.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Beach Blanket Bizarro
programme.desc: Sabrina’s wild visions of her first college spring break turn squeaky-clean when her aunts ask 60’s teen idol Frankie Avalon to put a spell on the trip. This sends Sabrina and her friends into a world straight out of a 60’s beach movie.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Philadelphia Story
programme.desc: Alex falls asleep while working on a college term paper on Thomas Jefferson and dreams that his family and friends are living 200 years ago.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Birth Of A Keaton, Part One
programme.desc: To help Steven during pledge week at the television station, the Keatons reluctantly agree to be part of the entertainment. The audience gets an unexpected show when Elyse goes into labor right on camera while in the middle of a song.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Birth of a Keaton, Part 2
programme.desc: A snowstorm prevents Elyse from getting to the hospital in time to deliver her baby.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Cry Baby
programme.desc: Jennifer is jealous of the attention paid to Andrew.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Don't Know Much About History...
programme.desc: Alex and his good friend James go into business together as tutors for their fellow students at Leland.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Cold Storage
programme.desc: With the rest of the Keaton family away for the weekend, Mallory is excited about having the house to herself until she is accidentally locked in the basement with the person she'd least like to be with--her adoring neighbor, Skippy.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Bringing Up Baby
programme.desc: With Elyse back at work, Steven is frustrated when her schedule and the baby's schedule aren't allowing them any free time together.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Remembrance of Things Past: Part 1
programme.desc: Steven takes a nostalgic trip to his hometown following the death of his father. With the support of Elyse and the children, he tries to prepare his mother for her new life (Part 1 of 2)

programme.title: Fem i familien: Remembrance of Things Past: Part 2
programme.desc: Steven takes a nostalgic trip to his hometown following the death of his father. With the support of Elyse and the children, he tries to prepare his mother for her new life. (Part 2 of 2)

programme.title: Fem i familien: Designated Hitter
programme.desc: Jennifer has a boyfriend and feels a bit self-conscious. When the boyfriend is teased at school by a bully, Jennifer steps in to defend him

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Power of Wings
programme.desc: Inkluderer sketsjer der Keegan og Jordan avlytter hvite kvinner som elsker svarte menn, Wendell lager en musikkvideo og Kareem og Jahar går på treningssenteret.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Soul Food
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan diskuterer hvem som er mest svart, og å være den eneste svarte på en fest. Sketsjer inkluderer Tea Party som oppdager et nytt håp, hærens ververe som tenker annerledes, og Bobby McFerrin som duellerer mot Michael Winslow.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The 420 Special
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson slapper av hjemme, Keegan må bevare fatningen under et jobbintervju, en skredder får en klient med luft i magen, parkeringsvaktene diskuterer 'Game of Thrones' og en telefonselger prøver en ny strategi.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Terrorist Meeting
programme.desc: En gangster prøver desperat å bevise at han er gal, terrorister møtes for å planlegge sitt neste trekk og en sjalu storebror gjør familiemiddagen pinlig.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Bone Thugs And Homeless
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en hund som plager en nyhetsreporter og Harriet Tubman som løper fritt omkring.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Landlord
programme.desc: I sesongfinalen vil president Obama behandles som alle andre, Jordan ser på en leilighet som er eid av en mistenksom utleier, og et par festfiksere som vil få gang i festen på en bar mitzvah.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Hollywood Sequel Doctor
programme.desc: Kileleking mellem to venner blir plutselig merkelig, forfattere brainstormer til 'Gremlins 2', to bøller mistenker vennen sin for å stjele og Keegan og Jordan diskuterer Afrika på en fest.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Biological Dad
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer et romvesen som lærer om kvinnelig anatomi, karer som prøver å overgå hverandre og møtet mellom de to siste mennesker på Jorden.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Y'all Ready For This?
programme.desc: Et fotballag girer seg opp før en kamp, president Obama og Luther møter Hillary Clinton, to karer forbereder seg på potensielle trusler på et fly, pirater synger en sang og en betjent er litt for skyteglad.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Manly Tears
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en narkohandel som går på trynet, en mafiafyr som er en stor grinasabb, og Darius Rucker som prøver å takle sin Hootie-fortid.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Michael Jackson Halloween
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan feirer Halloween med å flykte fra rasistiske zombier, skuespillerne i 'Human Centipede' har en skremmende gjenforening, og vi besøker en folkeskole for trollmenn med problemer.

programme.title: Broad City: Artsy Fartsy
programme.desc: Abbi inviteres til et fancy kunstarrangement på MoMA; Ilana og Lincoln analyserer det første året de har vært sammen.

programme.title: Broad City: Lost and Found
programme.desc: Jentene møter Ilanas femtenmenning, som overlevde Holocaust, og tar ham med på en kjedelig brunch; Abbi prøver en ny look.

programme.title: Broad City: Shenanigans
programme.desc: Ilana rekrutteres som hårmodell; Abbis nye flamme forteller henne at hun ikke er moden nok.

programme.title: Broad City: Sleep No More
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana besøker 'Sleep No More', og Abbi prøver å finne rett tidspunkt for å fortelle Ilana noe som vil forandre livet hennes radikalt.

programme.title: Broad City: Along Came Molly
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana og Bevers selger Abbis eiendeler i New York; Abbi får billetter til en Lil Wayne-konsert, og jentene tar en 'tripp'.

programme.title: Broad City: Broad City
programme.desc: Jentene tar farvel.

programme.title: Broad City: What A Wonderful World
programme.desc: Ilana får nyss om en hemmelig Lil Wayne-konsert. Sammen med Abbi loffer hun seg frem i New York. Jentene lar ingenting hindre dem i å skrape sammen nok penger til billettene. Selv om det blir skremmende, mister de aldri målet av sikte.

programme.title: Broad City: Stolen Phone
programme.desc: Etter å ha prøvd å finne gutter på Facebook, bestemmer Abbi og Ilana seg for å prøve å finne gutter i 'virkeligheten'.

programme.title: Broad City: Working Girls
programme.desc: Ilana prøver å tjene litt ekstra penger i 'temp game'. Abbi lover naboen sin å vente på pakken hans, men hun går glipp av leveransen og må dra til verdens ende for å få fatt i den.

programme.title: Broad City: The Lockout
programme.desc: Når Abbi får sprøytet leiligheten sin mot skadedyr og Ilana mister nøklene sine, blir jentene nødt til å bo på gaten - akkurat når Abbi har sin første kunstutstilling.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Revenge of Mike Powers
programme.desc: The deputies enjoy their new lives in the private sector, but a specter from their past continues to haunt them.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Cop School
programme.desc: Some promising new recruits intimidate the team with their skills, and Wiegel has trouble making magic with her incarcerated boyfriend.

programme.title: RENO 911!: SARS Outbreak
programme.desc: Dangle, Jones and Wiegel lose it in quarantine after exposure to SARS, while the rest of the sheriffs hang out with kids' show host Reading Ron.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Fastest Criminal in Reno
programme.desc: The deputies try to catch the infamous Fast Eddie McLintock.

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Prefect of Wanganui
programme.desc: Kimball and Dangle escort the Prefect of Wanganui, Reno's sister city, around town; Junior and Wiegel struggle to stand out at the high school job fair.

programme.title: RENO 911!: ...And the Installation Is Free
programme.desc: Jones discovers the delights of fame after doing radio commercials for a carpeting company.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Clemmy Marries a Dead Guy
programme.desc: Johnson tries to marry the late Hot Tub King of Reno, and Garcia and Williams discover the magical properties of Liberace's piano.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Garcia's Secret Girlfriend
programme.desc: Dangle and the gang solve Reno's biggest mystery: who is Garcia's new girlfriend?

programme.title: RENO 911!: Dangle's Son
programme.desc: While Dangle spends time with a beautiful young man who might be his son, the other deputies enjoy the new department Humvee.

programme.title: RENO 911!: CSI: Reno
programme.desc: The deputies work as security guards when "CSI: Miami" comes to Reno, and Wiegel and Dangle get a homeless man into a bathtub.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Great Moments in Hookup History & Ask a Black Dude
programme.desc: With time running out, Martin Johnson has one last stab at glory: Ashley "Smashly" Evans.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mad Real World & Ask a Gay Dude
programme.desc: Dave imagines a "Real World" season with an all-black cast and one super-white guy.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Negrodamus & The Niggar Family
programme.desc: Paul Mooney introduces Negrodamus, and Dave imagines a black Gallagher.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: White People Can't Dance & The Three Daves
programme.desc: Dave challenges the myth that white people can't dance.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Fired For Being Too Hot
programme.desc: Daniel kommer "sex" tilbake i sextrakassering, gjør deg enda mer paranoid om å bo på hotell og hyller trær før Arbor Day og "420". Og en kvinne som ble sparket fordi hun var for pen, får oppreisning på nettet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Pussy Power
programme.desc: Daniel snakker med et barn som har sugermerker over hele kroppen, sender masse penger til en fremmed på nettet og gjør et CeWEBrity-portrett.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Ready to Mingle
programme.desc: Daniel vil bli invitert til skoleball, avslører alt om sommerens filmer og en produktiv og psykotisk artist, Tonetta, får en oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Nerf Hoops (30 for 30.0)
programme.desc: Daniel gjør sin afrikanske etterfølger mer avstumpet og vurderer å begå selvmord. I tillegg får verdens beste Nerf-dunker oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Furries Kid
programme.desc: I høstpremieren avslører Daniel sitt mest vågale klesvalg så langt, redder en furry fra et krisesenter og får en unik treningsøkt.

programme.title: Tosh.0: U-S-A Chant Fail
programme.desc: Daniel viser oss det mest pinlige som har skjedd i New York siden Jets valg av 'The Sanchize' og fikser alt som er galt med unge i USA .

programme.title: Tosh.0: Lohanthony (CeWEBrity Profile)
programme.desc: Daniel møter en prinsesse som man ønsker skal komme ut for en bilulykke, lærer oss om en magisk gjenstand som kommer tilbake når du kaster den, og Lohan Thony får oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: DJ Decimal Point
programme.desc: Daniel spiller en ekkel runde med 'Er det rasistisk?' og ber deg om hjelp til å oppdra datteren han håper han aldri vil få. I tillegg får en DJ oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Carnival
programme.desc: Daniel forklarer hvorfor sausen er høstens offisielle drikk, og fyren som ga bort alle sine sparepenger i bytte mot en banan med dreadlocks, får oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Force Field Master
programme.desc: Daniel utforsker USAs verste skole og fyren som kan skape kraftfelt får oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Competitive Sushi Eater
programme.desc: Det blir mye tygging når Daniel intervjuer en konkurransespiser. Videre tar han en titt på kvinnelige musikere og lærer om blomster og bier.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine fears the worst when the cabbies invite themselves to her party for her highbrow art world friends who have no clue that she moonlights as a cab driver.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The high-spirited taxi gang helps a jittery Bobby fight potential disappointment when he decides that he will end his stage career if he doesn’t get an acting job before midnight.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas faces deportation unless he marries a U.S. citizen. The taxi gang comes to his rescue by pitching in and hiring a local working girl to be his bride.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: John and his new wife, Suzanne, reach a crisis point in their marriage when one of them must drop out of college due to financial woes.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A Christmas party at the garage is interrupted when Louie, the dispatcher teams up with Alex in a game of high-stakes poker against his cardshark brother Nick.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang scrambles to come up with a scheme aimed at ending a one-sided romance when a determined, pretty cabbie sets her cap for Tony and joins the Sunshine Cab Co. to be near him.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex feels sympathy for a fare who’s a real loser with the women and arranges a date for the man with Elaine, who later discovers that her klutzy companion for the evening is a U.S. Congressman.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s career dreams come true when he lands a role in a soap opera, prompting him to throw his torn-up cabbie’s license at Louie, but the dispatcher vows to take revenge if Bobby ever comes crawling back.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After an operation, Louie, the sharp-tongued dispatcher, panics when he has to keep a promise that he made to God during surgery to turn over a new leaf.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker starts off the day in a cranky mood when he finds a stray cat in his office, which apparently crawled through a broken window.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker arrives at the office carrying the parking meter that ate his quarter.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker's patient, Jimmy, is a penniless scalper who is unable to afford his ulcer treatment.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: On Jake's way out to meet his girlfriend, Becker warns him that his zipper is down.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker (Ted Danson) performs his doctorly duties at the diner when a woman begins to choke on her food.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John tries to quit smoking and ends up exchanging one urge for another, sex.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Linda gets a Little Sister and learns a lesson about rebellion while John meddles in Reggies love life.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: We learn more about Linda's upbringing and gain insight into her world after a series of mishaps which led her to quit her job. (TV-PG)

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: What About Me?
programme.desc: På Speidis velværeanstalt går det rykter om at Kaitlynn er gravid. Brandon avslører sjokkerenede nyheter om forholdet. Familien Wahlers kamp for å slutte fred med familien Pratt, blir distrahert av mulige skjellsettende forandringer for egen del.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Timing Is Everything
programme.desc: Kaitlynn knekker nyheten om sin graviditet til Brody, men er urolig når han og Kris skal møtes på fristedet. Pratt- og Wahler-gjengen håndterer endelig feiden som har delt gruppen. Justin får lære viktigheten av å vedlikeholde kontakter.

programme.title: The Hills: New City, New Drama
programme.desc: Når Lauren Conrad må mestre både moteskolen, en krevende praktikantjobb og en uforutsigbar romkamerat som ødelegger for henne, forstår hun raskt at alt er stort i Los Angeles, også hennes egne problemer.

programme.title: The Hills: A Change of Plans
programme.desc: Når Heidi fikser et intervju for drømmejobben som får henne til å overveie å hoppe av skolen permanent, forstår Lauren at hun og Heidi kanskje har helt forskjellige mål.

programme.title: The Hills: An Unexpected Call
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sender Lauren på et oppdrag til New York City, men vel tilbake i L.A. venter det henne en stor overraskelse fra fortiden. Heidi skjønner at å jobbe med festreklamering ikke bare er en fest.

programme.title: The Hills: Lauren and Jason: Part 2
programme.desc: Da Jason, Laurens eksflamme fra Laguna Beach, dukker opp igjen i livet hennes, forstår hun at hun kanskje ikke er så ferdig med ham som hun trodde. Samtidig, i sin nye jobb, spør Heidi seg om det egentlig er verdt alt strevet.

programme.title: The Hills: Jason's Birthday
programme.desc: Lauren haster hjem fra en lang Teen Vogue-event for å være sammen med Jason på bursdagen hans, men kvelden blir ikke som forventet. Audrina ber Heidi om råd rundt hennes nyeste date, modellen og skuespilleren Danny.

programme.title: The Hills: Boyfriends and Work Don't Mix
programme.desc: Jason utvikler seg til å bli et forstyrrende moment i Laurens profesjonelle og akademiske liv. Heidi får endelig mulighet til å jobbe i nattklubbene, men tidspunktet kunne ikke ha vært dårligere.

programme.title: The Hills: Somebody Always Has to Cry
programme.desc: Det er gjengens første ferie i L.A. og ikke alle får det de ønsket seg. Et nyttårskyss skal vise seg å bli litt av en oppgave for Lauren, når Jason finner ut at hun fikk en uventet telefon fra en gammel flamme.

programme.title: The Hills: You Can't Just Be With Me?
programme.desc: Jason vil gjerne gjøre Laurens 20-årsdag spesiell, men når hun lyver for ham angående en jobb med mannelige modeller for et Teen Vogue-oppdrag, settes forholdet deres på prøve.

programme.title: Are You The One?: How Far Would You Go For Love? Part 1
programme.desc: Kjærlighetsforbindelsene gnistrer direkte da 22 singler fra hele verden med ubesvart kjærlighet flytter inn i et hus på Kanariøyene. De skal prøve å finne sin perfekte match og prøve å vinne én million dollar.

programme.title: Are You The One?: How Far Would You Go For Love? Part 2
programme.desc: En natt splittes et par og fortsetter til nye forbindelser, mens andre tror de har funnet den rette. Presset øker da romantiske forbindelser settes på prøve under den første Parseremonien.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Rollecoaster Relationships
programme.desc: Etter en hjerteskjærende paringsseremoni, kjemper noen singler med å utforske nye forbindelser mens andre fatter egoistiske avgjørelser so påvirker resten av huset. Ærlige samtaler om ønsker og behov gir sårede følelser.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Love Is Hell, Finding It Is Hell
programme.desc: En fest tenner nye romantiske gnister, og en kjærlighetstriangel dannes da en singel gjetter forbindelsen.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Wants And Needs
programme.desc: En sannhetsbås avsløringer ryster huset, og et par havner i en klein kjærlighetstriangel. Et annet par er nødt til å slå opp da presset fra huset begynner å bli plagsomt.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Down The Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: Når single slipper seg løs på en fest, truer sjalusi med å hindre et par fra fluktdaten. Frustrasjonen stiger da huset forstår at kun et av de sterkeste parene kan bli en perfekt match.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Det er klart for sesongens første parseremoni. Spillet er i gang for fullt og slue planer legges. En mystisk gjest sjekker inn på Perla.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Mayoo har inntatt rollen som rektor mens inspektøren følger nøye med i det parene må opp til eksamen. Hvilken jente blir satt i fare som følge av manglende kunnskap?

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: En upopulær handling under eksamen skaper splid i den ene alliansen. De «dummeste» på hotellet skal på date med den nye jenta, som må ta et vanskelig valg.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Skolen er ikke for alle og eksamensstresset fører til eksplosiv stemning på festen. Pass på hva du sier bak andres rygg, for du vet aldri hvem som sitter på makten på Paradise Hotel.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: To gjester får et oppdrag som får store konsekvenser for kveldens dramatiske parseremoni. Et mørke legger seg over hotellet. Hvem tør å sove på sitt eget rom?

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1004
programme.desc: Alenemoren Ragnhild og sønnen Julius sover i dag i køyeseng, og trenger desperat større plass. Christina og amerikanske Justin har mange krav på lista, og Karianne tar utfordringa på strak arm!

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1005
programme.desc: Samboerne Linn og Joakim bor i dag i drømmehuset, men det ligger på helt feil sted! Hans Christian møter Christine, som leter etter en ny leilighet med uteområde til katten sin.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1006
programme.desc: Christian skal selge leiligheten han har arvet, og Karianne får derfor en helt ny utfordring! Vi møter også tidligere deltagere og får bli med inn i deres nye leiligheter, hus og gårdsbruk.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 901
programme.desc: Toppblogger Isabel Raad har tidligere leid leilighet for 29 000 kr i måneden. Nå skal hun kjøpe sin aller første bolig, men klarer Karianne å finne noe som kan leve opp til de skyhøye forventningene?

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 902
programme.desc: Amalie Snøløs drømmer om å kjøpe et oppussingsobjekt! Men har hun egentlig tid til det? Solfrid og André har spurt Hans Christian om hjelp til å finne drømmehuset, men ikke for enhver pris.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 903
programme.desc: Hanne kjøpte drømmeboligen som viste seg å være infisert av både rotter og skjeggkre. Etter sitt forrige bomkjøp håper hun at Hans Christian kan hjelpe. Og Christian skal kjøpe sin første leilighet.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 206
programme.desc: Det er kun få timer til Kjartan kommer for å smake på alle rettene på ukens meny - men restaurantsjef Erlend lar Terje styre skuta.

programme.title: Jul med Camp Kulinaris: Episode 102
programme.desc: Mia Gundersen, Jenny Jenssen, Michael Andressen og Omer Bhatti gjester kjøkkenet til Kjartan. Vegansk julemat står på konkurranse-menyen.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 716
programme.desc: Nok en deltaker må forlate Camp kulinaris. Dagens kokkekamp står mellom to gode venner som begge ønsker å bli.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 302
programme.desc: Det er første morgen på Camp Kulinaris og allerede så mangler det en deltaker i hytta. Kjartan kommer på sesongens første menysmaking for å kontrollere hvordan de ligger an til servering.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 201
programme.desc: 12 nye kjendiser flytter inn på Camp Kulinaris! Her skal de leve og bo sammen mens de drifter sin helt egne restaurant i regi av mesterkokk Kjartan Skjelde.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 901
programme.desc: Sommeren sparkes i gang, og det er tid for å møte reiselystne nordmenn som gleder seg til å kjenne på sydenvarmen igjen; Hilde bobler over av entusiasme fordi hun endelig skal tilbake på charterferie.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 907
programme.desc: Christian er ikke spesielt fornøyd med å dele hotellrom med moren, og jobber hardt for å få et eget rom med sjøutsikt.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1028
programme.desc: Damene i gjengen fra Buskerud arrangerer utdrikningslag for Tove som skal gifte seg med Rune i morgen. Familien Gude bruker dagen på shopping og strandkos. Radio Kvinesdal er på karneval.

programme.title: Charterfeber After Beach: Episode 101
programme.desc: I første episode blir vi kjent med Fetsund-gutta. Disse seks kompisene satser knallhardt på fyll, fest og galskap i Syden. Det blir også et gjensyn med Mario og Marthe, kjent fra Paradise hotel 2019.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1108
programme.desc: Svein prøver å imponere Lillian med en egenkomponert veganmiddag. Lars og teatervennene drar på Volvo-verksted, mens Håkon skal prøve seg som drag-queen, til Bibbis store begeistring.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1111
programme.desc: Iselin og Jørgen prøver seg på hinderløype til vanns. Onkel Erling og Stein Are har endelig kommet fram etter lastebilturen, men det tar ikke lang tid før et nytt problem dukker opp.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 301
programme.desc: Halvor, Ole, Jørgen og Gustav drar til idylliske Hvaler og pusser opp en sliten hytte som har bommet helt på stilen.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 302
programme.desc: Et båthus med rot og skrot fra de siste 50 årene skal få en solid overhaling av Halvor og gutta i kveldens episode. Men har de undervurdert prosjektets størrelse og arbeidsmengde?

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 303
programme.desc: En gammel låve skal pusses opp i Bauge, og Halvor har sett at det ligger et enormt potensiale blant halmballer, skakke benker og gamle jordbruksredskaper.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 304
programme.desc: Halvor og gutta reiser til ei seter liggende ved foten av Jostedalsbreen. Beitende geiter skaper utfordringer for oppussingen, og alle får smake på en lokal spesialitet; mølse!

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 305
programme.desc: Halvor tar med seg gutta til vakre Lofoten for å hjelpe en familie som drukner i klær og utstyr inne i den lille hytta de har.

programme.title: Luksusfellen
programme.desc: Arild blander privatøkonomien med bedriften sin, og dette gjør at han har mistet kontroll. Han skylder langt over en million kroner. Arild er en dyktig tatovør, men hvordan skal økonomien reddes?

programme.title: Luksusfellen
programme.desc: Hilde sløser bort lastebillønnen bort på råning. Hun overser regninger noe som gjør at hun aldri får hodet over vann. Kjøleskapet er tomt, strømmen er på vei til å bli stengt og gjelden stiger.

programme.title: Luksusfellen
programme.desc: Ellinor har solgt huset og skal re-starte livet. Til tross for god inntekt sliter hun. Ekspertene blir med på flytteprosessen, og får sjokk over hvor mye penger som går til unødvendige kjøp.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2301
programme.desc: Ingolf fra Malm i Trøndelag har på det meste eid hele seks biler samtidig – og har brukt ufattelig store beløp på sin store hobby. Kan Cecilie Tvetenstrand og Hallgeir Kvadsheim klare å rydde opp i Ingolfs rotete privatøkonomi og inkassokrav?

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2302
programme.desc: Gry og Glenn fra Veitvet i Oslo elsker å dra på turer med danskebåten og spise på restaurant. Men ekteparet har levd fullstendig over evne, og økonomiekspertene finner raskt ut at paret aldri har samarbeidet om økonomien.

programme.title: South Park: Help, My Teenager Hates Me!
programme.desc: Guttene finner ut av at gleden ved å spille Airsoft kommer med en tenåringsutfordring.

programme.title: South Park: Terrance and Phillip: Bak kulissene
programme.desc: Akkurat som Wham har de vindfulle kanadiske superstjernene Terrance & Phillip gått hver til sitt etter kreative uoverensstemmelser.

programme.title: South Park: La dem spise søle
programme.desc: Cartman er overbevist om at årsaken til at han fikk hjerteinfarkt, er den nye plantebaserte dietten i skolekantina.

programme.title: South Park: Barneskolemusikal
programme.desc: Musikalfeberen når South Park, og guttene må spille med eller miste popularitet.

programme.title: South Park: Dra til varemerket
programme.desc: Gutta prøver å finne et bra navn til sitt nye startup-firma, og døper det til The Washington Redskins.

programme.title: South Park: Krøplingsslagsmål!
programme.desc: Big Gay Al kommer tilbake til South Park, men blir kastet ut av speideren fordi han er homse.

programme.title: South Park: Thanksgiving på History Channel
programme.desc: Når gutta prøver å lære seg alt om Thanksgiving fra historiekanalen på TV, blir de fanget i et mysterium som involverer utenomjordiske, Natalie Portman og kalkunfyll!

programme.title: South Park: Fort Collins
programme.desc: En hel by i Colorado blir hacket. Gerald og Cartman kan miste alt når den fulle og hele historien om deres internett-aktiviteter kommer ut i offentligheten.

programme.title: South Park: Sesongfinalen
programme.desc: Innbyggerne i South Park har fått nok av Randy og Tegridy Farms og ønsker bare å låse ham inne.

programme.title: South Park: Handicar
programme.desc: Timmys suksess med hans nye bilverksted gir ham en masse fiender.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 216
programme.desc: Deltagerne deles i to lag som skal kjempe om stor makt.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 217
programme.desc: Kampen om sitteplassene fortsetter – og lagene kniver om å få John på sin side.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 218
programme.desc: Kveldens seremoni avslører høyt spill – hvem har lurt hvem?

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 219
programme.desc: En skummel klovn går løs på resorten…

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 220
programme.desc: Det blir vinn eller forsvinn under kuppelen når det skal avsløres hvem som gjemmer seg bak klovnemasken.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 221
programme.desc: Hvem blir spilt ut under kveldens partnerseremoni?

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 222
