programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A Modesto, California teenager goes missing. With no signs of struggle in her home, police suspect she has simply run away — until her naked, bruised body is discovered in a ditch 20 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Emergency dispatch received a call from a man who said his girlfriend shot and killed herself. The autopsy revealed that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted, and the evidence on her body would give police a golden opportunity to catch her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: When a Native American woman is brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, her killers leave a crime scene rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: A brilliant young architect falls ill and dies just before she is to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy reveals she'd been poisoned with arsenic. Investigators must determine who had a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: When a dry cleaner employee is raped and murdered in her store, police turn to forensic science for the answers they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: The murder of an eccentric millionaire was not entirely unexpected; he flaunted his wealth and cared little for personal security. The evidence at the crime seemed to indicate robbery, but investigators wondered if there was something more.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: When a young woman disappeared, police feared she was the latest victim in a string of similar crimes. A pair of bloody gloves, unique tire tracks and ordinary pine needles provided investigators with some extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, evidence suggests that he knew his killer. With just three hairs and some microscopic cells, police unravel a web of lies and find the motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police were called to the scene of what appeared to be an accidental drowning. The investigation gradually focused on one suspect who had more than a million reasons to want the victim dead.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 17
programme.desc: This episode includes: Black and Blue & UD, Drunk Driver & UD, Yeti, and Jane Doe's Ashes.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 18
programme.desc: This episode includes: UFO Odyssey, Reporter's Trucker, and Haunted Mansion.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 19
programme.desc: This episode includes: Getaway Photo & UD, Looking for Angeline & UD, UD: Nine Lives, and Mom & Pop Murders (Pts. 1 & 2 + UD).

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 20
programme.desc: This episode includes: Magnetic Attraction (Pts. 1 & 2 + UD), Oregon Heir, UD: The Man Who Never Was, and UD: Money Clip Murder.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 21
programme.desc: This episode includes: Slain Swedes, UD: Amelia Earhart 2, Black Market Babies, Bones Knows, UD: Prison Mom, and Med Scam & UD.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Radical Agenda
programme.desc: In the 1970's a string of bank robberies and bombings spread fear and destruction along the east coast. The FBI faced a new breed of criminal, the domestic terrorist.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Game
programme.desc: In the 1970s and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Silent Strike
programme.desc: Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Heist
programme.desc: In Arizona, an armored van loaded with cash failed to reach its destination. Authorities suspected an inside job. When the vehicle was recovered with the drivers and the cash missing, those suspicions grew even more.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Short Fuse
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which was mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid, the box exploded, killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Remnant of Blame
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Shreds of Evidence
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Drawing Conclusions
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written in Blood
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: House of Horror
programme.desc: Blackpool is iconic for ghosts and tonight, Sean and Bex investigate a horror attraction which appears to have attracted some very real spirits that are spooking its customers.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Long Lost Treasure at Jessops Old Mill and Auction House
programme.desc: The ghost dimension team visits Batley, West Yorkshire to investigate a location where it may not be the building that's haunted but the items that reside within.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Blackpool Pleasure Beach
programme.desc: Blackpool Pleasure Beach is one of the most visited attractions in the United Kingdom. People visit it not only for the fun, but to also hopefully catch a glimpse of the many ghosts that haunt there.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Forgotten Souls of Errwood Hall
programme.desc: Sean heads to the Errwood Hall ruins in the Goyt Valley. It is said to be haunted by 3 spirits, and that it has its very own time slip. The investigation does not disappoint and although the hall is gone, the spirits remain.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Ghost in the Shower
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Waterloo Rugby Club and come into contact with a very mischievous spirit in the male showers! A ghost that scares away any female that dares to enter.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom
programme.desc: Kendra is on a mission to save herself from her toxic boyfriend Chris. At 17, Kendra is pregnant with his sixth child. Kendra has tried almost everything including kicking him out of their house, but he not only argued back but assaulted Kendra as well.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Over the Edge
programme.desc: Sheroya is 17 and struggling to raise 2 kids while trying to party all the time. Her boyfriend Malcolm frequently cheats and verbally abuses her. Steve’s got a lot of work ahead with this couple, but will either of them wake up?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Failed 5 Times?
programme.desc: Did Everett touch his girlfriend Michelle’s daughter? Her ex Robert says that his 7-year-old daughter said so. Everett will take a lie detector test to disprove it! Don’t miss these shocking results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Not the Man You Think I Am
programme.desc: Sean says his wife has made him so angry that he’s put her in the hospital over 10 times. Sean’s also got a secret of his own — he is really a she! Can Steve help Sean iron out his issues?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Real Teens: Real Topics
programme.desc: Steve’s hosting another teen girl town hall to address critical issues all teen girls could face, including drug use, physical abuse, and online predators. No question is off limits!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Rescues a Runaway
programme.desc: Sherry was attacked at 15 and ran away from home. She wants Steve’s help with reuniting her with her mother. Then, Dawn's teenage daughter Cathy recently gave birth, but lives in fear of the baby’s unemployed and unstable father Nick.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: .357 Magnum
programme.desc: The murder of a popular teen at a crowded house party sends Kenda down a winding road paved with lies, misdirection, and innuendo.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shot Through the Heart
programme.desc: 15yr old Chuck returns home from school to find his mother, Betty Limbrick, shot dead on the floor. Evidence points to a robbery gone wrong, but Kenda uncovers a plot almost too shocking to believe.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Victim Zero
programme.desc: A brawl erupts at a local bar ends with the shooting death of a army solider. To unravel the murder, Lt. Joe Kenda most infiltrate a revered military institution, and expose a dangerous vendetta.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: When 22 year-old Micki Filmore is found raped and murder in her apartment, detective Kenda focuses his investigation on her activities the previous night.

programme.title: Evil Twins: The Candymen
programme.desc: Growing up privileged, the George Brothers had everything. In Florida’s pill epidemic of the 2000s, they became millionaires, only to crash amidst overdoses, arrests and a tragic train accident.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Folie Aux Deux
programme.desc: On the outside, the beautiful Hopkins sisters seem to have the perfect life. But under the surface lurks a devastating disease that will lead the twins down a path of destruction.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Do No Harm
programme.desc: Twin pediatricians, the Blankenburgs, harbor dark secrets that no one can believe. And just 300 miles north, the teenage Samel twins, commit a crime that will shock their neighborhood for decades.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Fatal Fraternity
programme.desc: Identical twins Wasel and Wael Ali were obsessed with power from an early age. Using false identities they torment unsuspecting people until they become victims of their own game.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Gann Twins
programme.desc: Identical twins Jordan and Simon Gann had potential in their youth. But as teens they take an inexplicable dark turn launching a global crime spree.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Spirits at The Lord Eldon
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travels to the old town of Knutsford, Cheshire to investigate the historic Lord Eldon Inn, hoping to contact the spirit of Sarah Ann Pollitt who is said to haunt the pub.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Monks and Demons at The Rutland Arms Hotel
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team journeys to Nottingham and the historic Rutland Arms Hotel. The pub and hotel have seen several centuries of change, and with that change came tragedy.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Final Session at Galleries of Justice
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travel back in time to The Galleries of Justice in Nottingham. This was a one stop shop for justice where criminals were held awaiting trial.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Underground World Of The City of Caves
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team ventures underground to investigate the City of Caves in Nottingham.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Strange Killing of Ken Rex McElroy
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane explore the gripping tale of justice, mystery and community in Ken Rex McElroy's demise.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Scandalous Murder of William Desmond Taylor
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane untangle a web of Hollywood's secrets in the scandalous murder of William Desmond Taylor.

programme.title: Mutant X: Fool for Love
programme.desc: Shalimar nærmer seg en annen vill når det er 'lyst ved første blikk', men saken blir komplisert når hennes nye kjæreste prøver å finne en kur for tilstanden hans.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Buddha's Bowl
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel drar til Nepal for å gjenopprette Buddhas fantastiske, overfylte almisse-skål for landsbyboere som bygger en helligdom til den opprinnelige Buddha.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Headless Nun
programme.desc: Når Sydneys fly krasjer, blir hun bedt av en gruppe nonner om å finne hodet til en annen nonne som ble halshogd for flere århundrer siden.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Smoking Gun
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel søker etter Al Capones diamantkledde pistol på oppdrag fra en mann som håper det vil fjerne bestefaren for et drap han var innrammet for.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Affaire de Coeur
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel drar til Skottland for å finne den andre ringen av paret Twining Rings of Calum og Elena.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dobbel helix
programme.desc: Andromeda blir involvert i en strid mellom en enn planeten og en Nietzschean-koloni.

programme.title: On the Case: Darkness After Dawn
programme.desc: After a newlywed is found murdered in her bedroom, a search is launched for the killer that will last for three decades.

programme.title: On the Case: A Knock on the Door
programme.desc: A beautiful young mother is found murdered in the bedroom of her home. The only witness was her five year old son. Would he be able to help police solve the crime?

programme.title: On the Case: A Wave Goodbye
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl is discovered murdered at an empty campground, located more than 50 miles from where she was last sighted.

programme.title: On the Case: Ring of Truth
programme.desc: When a young woman's body is discovered high in the San Bernardino Mountains, detectives must figure out who she was and how she got there before they can catch the cold blooded killer who murdered her.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Paper Trail
programme.desc: The police follow a trail of emails, hoping it will lead them to a 38-year-old woman's vicious killer.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Christine Taylor, Drew's News
programme.desc: "Hey Dude the 90's Called" podcast host and actress Christine Taylor is joining Drew to chat about working together on "The Wedding Singer" and some of her iconic roles in classics like "Dodgeball" and "The Brady Bunch Movie."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Mikel Welch, Eitan Bernath, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering topics like the solutions you can try if you're a chronic late texter and the reason many people are opting for environmentally friendly burials.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: "The Talk" Hosts, Drew's News
programme.desc: The hosts of "The Talk" Natalie Morales, Jerry O'Connell, Sheryl Underwood, Akbar Gbaja-Biamila and Amanda Kloots are joining Drew and taking on the final five to answer rapid fire questions about themselves!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with "The Talk" Hosts
programme.desc: The hosts of "The Talk" continue their Drew's News takeover and hitting today's hottest headlines like the woman who threw a party and invited sixty-five of her dating app matches.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Sheryl Underwood, Drew's News
programme.desc: "The Talk" co-host Sheryl Underwood is joining Drew and talking all about dating! Drew and Ross Mathews are covering the latest headlines in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Stephanie Izard, Eve Rodsky, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are at the Drew's News desk and covering the hottest topics. Stephanie Izard is joining Drew in the kitchen to make something delicious. Eve Rodsky is sharing home equity tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Melissa Rivers, Law Roach, Christian Siriano
programme.desc: We're celebrating the Oscars and style sheriffs Melissa Rivers, Law Roach and Christian Siriano are joining Drew and Ross Mathews for a special fashion panel.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Kevin Frazier and Nischelle Turner
programme.desc: Entertainment Tonight's Kevin Frazier and Nischelle Turner are joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk for a special Oscars themed Drew's News, sharing their predictions for the awards show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Eva Longoria, Drew's News with Lewis Howes
programme.desc: Actress Eva Longoria is joining Drew in the kitchen and they're cooking up Spaghetti Alle Vongole. Best-selling author Lewis Howes joins Drew and Ross Mathewsat the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Dylan Mulvaney
programme.desc: A year ago, actress Dylan Mulvaney publicly came out as a trans woman for the first time and began documenting her transition in her Tik-Tok series "Days of Girlhood," that now has over a billion views.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: "Drewber" with Courteney Cox and Melissa Barrera, Drew's News with Tony Dokoupil
programme.desc: "Scream VI" stars Courteney Cox and Melissa Barrera are joining Drew in an all-new Drewber. Plus, "CBS Mornings" Tony Dokoupil joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Tamar Adler, Tony Dokoupil
programme.desc: Tony Dokoupil joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to hit the headlines! James Beard Award-winning author Tamar Adler joins Drew andTonyDokoupil in the kitchen to serve up something delicious.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Red Notice For Murder
programme.desc: A report on the international search conducted by Nadia Ford and private detective Herman Weisberg for Viktoria Nasyrova, a Russian woman suspected of the 2014 murder of Ford's mother, Alla Aleksenko.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Click for a Killer
programme.desc: Part two of a two-part report on the alarming world of murder-for-hire on the mysterious "dark web," exposes an international criminal organization in a hunt for a self-described murder mastermind named Yura.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death on Valentine's Day
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Stalked: Out of the Shadows - Part 1
programme.desc: A two-part investigation into stalking -- the victims, the stalkers, the dangers and the long-term psychological damage this torment causes. Includes a report on the stalking death of singer Christina Grimmie.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Last Chance for Freedom
programme.desc: A report on Crosley Green, who in 1990 was convicted of the murder of Charles "Chip" Flynn and sentenced to death. Green has spent the last 26 years, with help from lawyers and private investigators, trying to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Cops: No Respect these Days
programme.desc: A combative man at a fast food restaurant claims his phone was stolen. Multiple illegal items are found on a man parked on the side of the road. An intoxicated man throws an 83-year-old's walker.

programme.title: Cops: Wardrobe Clash
programme.desc: A homeless man hides from deputies in the closet of an empty house. Deputies arrive to a domestic disturbance to find two brothers fighting over a pair of sandals.

programme.title: Cops: Two Too Many
programme.desc: A man fights with his wife over a haircut, then leads police on a car chase. A woman gets violent with her boyfriend and then calls the police on him.

programme.title: Cops: Finding Fido
programme.desc: A drunk man threatens both firefighters and the police. Police are called over a dispute regarding an alleged missing dog. A man is found pinned under his drunk friend's car.

programme.title: Cops: Poolwatch
programme.desc: Deputies taser a man who almost ran over a deputy with his truck. A man gives police false information after saving a boy who fell into a pool. A woman tries to buy drugs from an undercover officer.

programme.title: Cops: Gimme a Break
programme.desc: Officers pursue two brothers after an attempted bank robbery. A confused man with a shotgun calls police after hearing voices. Deputies find illegal items in the back of a man's truck.

programme.title: Cops: Table for Two
programme.desc: Police respond to an emergency call and find a man in dire trouble. Deputies respond to an abusive husband at a local eatery. Two women try to buy narcotics from an undercover deputy during a sting.

programme.title: Cops: Candlelight Burglar
programme.desc: Deputies respond to a fight between a daughter's boyfriend and her mother. A woman lights candles after an attempted break-in. Police respond when an evicted tenant tries to reenter his old apartment.

programme.title: Cops: The Car is Mine!
programme.desc: A man locks himself in a trunk after deputies respond to a restraining order call. Deputies respond to two women arguing over the ownership of a car.

programme.title: Cops: Bike for Sale
programme.desc: A deputy pursues a man who fled from a traffic stop. A deputy chases a suspicious man leaving an apartment complex. Two men claim they are trying sell a bike during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Josiane Bézard Case
programme.desc: On the morning of January 9th 2014, Josiane Bézard, 53 years old, drives her son to the Manosque's train station, and then vanishes.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Julein Thevenet Case
programme.desc: On January 27th 2014, in Somme-Suippe in the Marne, Sophie Thevenet discovers her dead husband's body in the garage.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Raphael Lomoro Case
programme.desc: On June 12th 2007, in Berhen-lès-Forbach, in Moselle, a young woman reports the disappearance of her brother Raphaël Lomoro, 46 years old vanilla producer living in Madagascar.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Key to the Enigma (Farid Ouzzane Case)
programme.desc: On July 13, 2011, two boaters retrieved a suitcase that was floating in the bay of Lorient. Inside, they discovered the tied up corpse of a man. In order to identify this unknown man, whose face was unrecognizable.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 102
programme.desc: Åtte år gamle Monika Sviglinskaja blir funnet død i sitt hjem på Sotra. Politiet mener det dreier seg om et selvmord og henlegger saken. Men moren hennes er fortsatt overbevist om at noe kriminelt har skjedd.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En politietterforskning settes i gang etter at Maud Johansson meldes savnet den 18. oktober 2005. Etter flere år med iherdig leting ser det ut til at etterforskningen stopper opp, men politiet gir ikke opp.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 704
programme.desc: En sommernatt i Värmland bryter det ut slagsmål, hvoretter 21 år gamle Harout mottar et dødelig knivstikk. Politiet får mistanker om at et sjalusidrama kan være nøkkelen til å finne den skyldige.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 504
programme.desc: En sommernatt i 2001 er Gunn Merete Lode på vei hjem etter et venninnetreff i Bryne. I nabolaget sitt blir hun overfalt av en ukjent mann. Situasjonen bli observert av 17 år gamle Øyvind.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 702
programme.desc: Ekteparet Suzanne og Lars lever et stille og rolig liv på landet utenfor Stockholm. Men når Suzanne avlyser en viktig tenniskamp på kort varsel, blir hennes tennispartner mistenksom og varsler politiet.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Song of Orpheus
programme.desc: When Father ventures to the Above World for the first time in decades, he is arrested for murder. Vincent and Catherine must delve into Father's mysterious past to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Dark Spirit
programme.desc: Investigating a mysterious death makes Catherine the target of a voodoo cult.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Children's Story
programme.desc: Catherine learns that the city's model foster home for children is hiding a dark secret.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: An Impossible Silence
programme.desc: When she witnesses a shooting, a deaf girl must decide whether to abandon the sanctuary of the City Below to free an innocent man.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Shades of Grey
programme.desc: Mouse makes his first appearance - and is quickly shunned by the Family of tunnel folk for thievery.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Mirror
programme.desc: After a poor but ambitious Central American farm worker overthrows his country's tyrannical leader, he believes he sees assassins everywhere. A look in the mirror reveals his most dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Grave
programme.desc: Before he died, notorious gunslinger Pinto Sykes put a curse on hired-gun Conny Miller. Miller returns to town and is challenged to visit the grave of Sykes, despite the curse.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: There Was an Old Woman
programme.desc: A writer of children's books gives a book to a sick young fan. Later, she starts hearing the sound of children in her house.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trunk
programme.desc: A young man at a motel discovers an empty trunk that grants any wishes. He uses it for popularity, but at a party he discovers who his true friends are.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Appointment on route 17
programme.desc: After finishing a heart transplant, a man finds his personality has changed. He also discovers that he has a strange attraction to a waitress at a road diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Cold Equations
programme.desc: A rescue pilot on the frontiers of space is faced with unpleasant prospects when he finds an innocent stowaway on his ship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: It's a Good Life
programme.desc: Little Anthony Fremont controls an entire town with his ability to read minds and make people do as he wishes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Deaths-Head Revisited
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce and is met by one of his victims.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Midnight Sun
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: JAG: People vs SECNAV
programme.desc: After an incident in Iraq claims the lives of innocent civilians, SecNav is brought up on charges of war crimes in International Court, and Harm and Mac must defend him. Meanwhile, during a trip to the arcade, little A.J. goes missing.

programme.title: JAG: Hard Time
programme.desc: Mac must accompany a prisoner who once assaulted her across the country while Harm and Bud delve into the case of an HIV-infected fleet officer who, after having his condition revealed and relegated to inactive duty, wants his old job back.

programme.title: JAG: Coming Home
programme.desc: A marine’s killing in Iraq has ramifications for JAG stateside as Harm helps the soldier’s family with a media onslaught, and Bud and Mac investigate the failure of his flack vest.

programme.title: JAG: Fighting Words
programme.desc: A general’s comments about Islam during a church service pit Harm and Mac against each other as a court-martial hearing examines whether those remarks were a danger to national security.

programme.title: JAG: Retrial
programme.desc: At the request of Seaman Saul Wainright (guest star William Sadler), who is serving a life sentence in a federal prison for stabbing a transsexual prostitute 20 years ago, Harm convinces Naval authorities to re-open the case.

programme.title: Happy Days: Smokin' Ain'T Cool
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie's Blindness
programme.desc: In a poignant, change-of-pace episode titled Fonzie's Blindness, Al barges through the kitchen door at the drive-in and hits Fonzie in the head with a tray of food.

programme.title: Happy Days: Casanova Cunningham
programme.desc: When Richie is caught two-timing Lori Beth for a pretty baton twirler, the Fonz has to step in and give Richie a few lessons in love.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Gets Framed
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Happy Days: Potsie Quits School
programme.desc: When troubles with his studies and an insulting professor cause Potsie to quit school, the Fonz comes up with an ingenious but offbeat plan to help his friend.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 1)
programme.desc: In Part I, Fonzie is called to make emergency mechanical repairs on a stalled hearse and inadvertently discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money hidden in the coffin.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Part II, after Fonzie discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money in a hearse, the counterfeiters attempt to silence him.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Duel
programme.desc: The Fonz defends America's pride and saves Richie's hide when he matches blades with a French fencing champion, who not only insults the country, but makes nasty remarks about Joanie

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Gets Shot
programme.desc: During a week-end at Potsie's uncle's hunting cabin, Fonzie is accidentally shot in the vicinity of his favorite jeans' back pocket.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Andy Cohen Spills the Tea While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The "Watch What Happens Live with Andy Cohen" star is no stranger to talk shows going off the rails.

programme.desc: Salma Hayek is an Academy Award-nominated actress and film producer who is here to conquer the spice.

programme.desc: The Hollywood superstar discusses doing her own stunts, vocal warmups and the keys to great mac and cheese.

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: They are iconic weapons: the Tommy Gun, Uzi, and today’s MP5. Invented to break WWI stalemates, the submachine gun revolutionized warfare and culture. Host Wil Willis explores its evolution, firing the Thompson and BAR.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Liberation & Revenge
programme.desc: 1945 frigjør soldater fra den Røde Hæren Auschwitz-Birkenau. Når andre befrielsene finner sted i de påfølgende månedene, blir verden sjokkert.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Aftermath
programme.desc: In WWII's final months, Allies discover Nazi death camps, prompting a sweeping denazification of Germany post-war. Nuremberg trials convict top Nazis. Former Nazis are employed by the West in the Cold War struggle against the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Today’s infantry demands a weapon combining machine gun firepower with rifle accuracy and mobility.. Host Wil Willis traces this journey through iconic firearms.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Special Forces operate deep behind enemy lines with top-of-the-line weapons.Host Wil Willis tests the Sig Sauer P226, the preferred choice like the Mark 25 by Navy SEALs, against competitors like the H&K Compact Tactical.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Kyllinger på rømmen
programme.desc: Carly og Sam starter med å klekke ut kyllinger for et naturfagprosjekt. Kyllingene klekkes tidligere enn ventet og rømmer fra inkubatoren. Nå må Carly, Sam, Freddie og Spencer finne alle kyllingene rundt om i leiligheten.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil ikke krangle
programme.desc: Carly makes Sam en unik iCarly T-skjorte for å markere årsdagen for vennskapet deres. Men når Sam bytter den bort mot konsertbiletter, havner de to vennene i klammeri.

programme.title: iCarly: Dansende drømmer
programme.desc: iCarly ber fansen om å sende inn videoer av dem selv når de danser sine kuleste danser. Over tre tusen danseklipp kommer inn, og Carly, Sam og Freddie prøver å holde seg oppe hele natten for å se på alle videoene.

programme.title: iCarly: Det spøker på Halloween
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie sender iCarly fra en leilighet som det sies at det spøker i. Når det begynner å skje nifse ting, begynner også vennene å bli redde for at spøkelsesryktene er sanne.

programme.title: iCarly: En dag jeg vil angre
programme.desc: Spencer redder livet til hovedsangeren i The Plain White T's og får ham til å gå med på å delta i iCarly. Merkelige ting begynner å gå feil midt i Carlys, Sams og Freddies nettvideosending.

programme.title: iCarly: Gjensittingen
programme.desc: Sam må sitte igjen den kvelden iCarly holder sin 50. nettvideospesialsending. Carly og Freddie kan da altså ikke gjøre som de pleier, så de prøver så godt de kan å få gjennsitting de også, så de kan sende fra skolebenken med Sam.

programme.title: iCarly: Fotsår reklame
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie blir invitert til Dakas hovedkvarter, der de blir tilbudt en stor pengesum får å gå god for Dakas nye sko, Tech-foten, på iCarly. Men det viser seg at skoene er forferdelige.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg lover å ikke sladre
programme.desc: Carly får en B på historieprøven hun burde ha fått en A på. Sam, som griper sjansen på sitt ukentlige møte med rektor Franklin, forandrer Carlys karakter på datamaskinen og overrasker henne med A blank.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly redder TV
programme.desc: En prestisjetung produsent vil gjøre iCarly om til et TV-show. Men Carly, Sam og Freddie blir raskt fortvilet når de hører om alle de store forandringene produsenten ønsker å foreta.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg hater Sams kjæreste
programme.desc: Sam får en kjæreste og de to blir uadskillelige. Men når forholdet begynner å få følger for iCarly, forstår Carly og Freddie at de må gjøre noe.

programme.title: iCarly: Overvåket
programme.desc: Etter å ha sett et klipp på iCarly der en mann selger illegale piratkopivideoer, bestemmer to detektiver seg for å bruke Carly og Spencers loft for overvåking.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: 40/40/40
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot Scott faces his worst nightmare when a faltering Curtiss C-46 Commando engine and low fog force a scary landing.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Pre-Christmas Rush
programme.desc: Christmas is just around the corner, but Buffalo's crucial food and mail runs come to a halt. An engine seizure strands Scott, AJ and the C-46 plane, creating a chaotic chain reaction.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Birthday from Hell
programme.desc: A string of bad luck turns chief pilot Arnie's 66th birthday run into the flight from hell - and threatens to spoil his naughty birthday surprise.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Big Deal
programme.desc: When a power failure leaves Rankin Inlet exposed to the brutal northern elements, captain Justin races to deliver an emergency generator. Ramp hand Jeremy tries to move ahead of co-worker Audrey by training a new hire from India to replace him.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: 40/40/40
programme.desc: Mechanic Cory races against the clock to turn two short-haul waterbombers into transatlantic aircraft for the epic journey to Turkey. It's up to engineer Adam to get the C-46 crew out of a jam on a remote airstrip in minus 40.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Woodys kjærestes mor, en vakker, eldre kvinne, gjør seksuelle fremskritt mot ham.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Frasier er opprørt når Liliths nye bok betegner ham som en kjedelig, pålitelig "godgutt"

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebeccas planer for en romantisk dag med Robin blir ødelagt når han velger å tilbringe dagen med å konkurrere mot Sam.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Carla får stor skyldfølelse når hun skjuler pengene fra sin avdøde manns eiendom for den andre enken.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam, Cliff og Norm ydmyker seg selv når de feilaktig tror at rivalene deres på en annen bar har gjort Cheers til mål for enda en narrestrek.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Woody gir Kelly en løftering når faren ordner en tur til Europa for henne.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Carla frykter at Eddies ånd hjemsøker henne når hun bestemmer seg for å begynne å date igjen.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam mener at han endelig har lurt Rebecca til å tilbringe natten med ham, men til slutt får han vite hvem som egentlig blir lurt.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Etter at Robin ber Rebecca om å flytte sammen med ham, får hun vite at han har utnyttet henne i planene om å overta selskapet hennes.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: They're Coming to Take Me Away, Huh Huh (aka Psychiatrist)/ Jump!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head pass all their Rorscach tests. / Beavis and Butt-head inadvertently stop a suicide.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Den nye fienden / Dobbelgjengeren
programme.desc: Vaskebjørner stjeler Beavis og Butt-Heads nachos, og guttene slår tilbake./ Beavis forveksler en fremmed med Butthead, og kan ikke bli kvitt ham.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Bokset inne / Birøktere
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head fanges i en pappeske mens de prøver å gjemme seg på skolen./ Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å sanke honning fra et vepsebol.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Leave it to Beavis/ Butt Flambé / Crying / Doomsday
programme.desc: The show parodies Leave It to Beaver / The duo needs to go to a hospital / Beavis cries and is mocked unrelentlessly / Highland experiences a toxic gas leak

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bathroom Break / The Rat
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head decide to devote as much of their time at work as possible to bathroom breaks. / A fool and his nachos are soon parted... by a rat? A rat takes up residence and they stop at nothing.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Woodshop / T.V. Violence / Canned / Garage band
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head take woodworking class / Stevensons get a sattelite dish / An unopened can puts our duo to new adventures / Beavis and Butt-Head form a band called Metallica

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Buy Beer / Just For Girls
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get drunk off non-alcoholic beer and fail a sobriety test. / Beavis and Butt-head are allowed to watch a film for girls about teen pregnancy. The titillation ends abruptly during the birthing sequence.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Here Comes The Bride's Butt / Skin Trade
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head crash a wedding in hopes of making out with the bride. / Beavis and Butt-head find a dead animal and try to sell its fur. But Beavis soon becomes attached to the lifeless creature.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Det farligste spillet / Beinjegerne
programme.desc: For å hindre den andre i å legge hånden i en bolle varmtvann så man tisser i buksa, holder guttene seg våkne i flere dager./ Beavis og Butt-Head bygger et dinosaurskjelett av bein fra en BBQ.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Beach Blanket Bizarro
programme.desc: Sabrina’s wild visions of her first college spring break turn squeaky-clean when her aunts ask 60’s teen idol Frankie Avalon to put a spell on the trip. This sends Sabrina and her friends into a world straight out of a 60’s beach movie.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Witchright Hall
programme.desc: When Sabrina’s trouble-making teenage cousin Amanda is sent to live with Hilda and Zelda, they count on Sabrina to convince the headmaster and school director of Witchright Hall to accept Amanda.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina the Activist
programme.desc: Sabrina, who is now in low spirits over her heavy course load and recent break up, decides to put her energy into something positive: leading a protest to save an historical building from demolition.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Do You See What I See?
programme.desc: Sabrina feels responsible when Miles considers giving up his paranormal research to settle in his father’s accounting business after no one believes the otherworldly phenomena he sees at the Spellman home.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Got Spirit
programme.desc: Sabrina tries to throw off Miles and the specialist he has hired to uncover paranormal activity in the house, but Sabrina herself discovers a ghost in the ceiling.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Finally!
programme.desc: Romance brews between Sabrina and Josh when they turn the coffeehouse into a single's night featuring entertainment by the band Eden's Crush.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Really Big Season Opener
programme.desc: Miles decides to make a student film in his favorite genre, horror, and enlists Sabrina as the producer of his film.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Date with Destiny
programme.desc: Sabrina and her friends return to school and a lot of excitement after summer break.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: What’s News?
programme.desc: Josh lands a job as a photojournalist for the Boston Citizen, and is surprised to learn that Sabrina is a fan of his new boss, Mike Shelby.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Murder on the Halloween Express
programme.desc: Hilda and Zelda are invited to attend a murder mystery party on the Halloween Mystery Train, which makes a stop in Boston.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Designated Hitter
programme.desc: Jennifer has a boyfriend and feels a bit self-conscious. When the boyfriend is teased at school by a bully, Jennifer steps in to defend him

programme.title: Fem i familien: Return Of The Native
programme.desc: Cousin June visits the Keatons, on holiday from her university studies in London. Memories bubble up when she starts talking about dating boys and a trip to Florence, most embarrassing moments for Keatons.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Matchmaker
programme.desc: Seeing that Mallory is a wreck after her break-up with Rick and six failed dates, Alex decides to match her with a fellow Leland student.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Mr. Wrong
programme.desc: The Keatons are shocked by Mallory’s new, gruff boyfriend, Nick.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Real Thing: Part 1
programme.desc: Alex picks out his dream girl from the school directory and falls for her roommate.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Real Thing: Part 2
programme.desc: Alex takes drastic measures to stop Ellen from getting married.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Old College Try
programme.desc: Mallory announces that she doesn’t want to go to college.

programme.title: Fem i familien: It's My Party: Part 1
programme.desc: Jennifer feels out of place at her own thirteenth birthday Party.

programme.title: Fem i familien: It's My Party: Part 2
programme.desc: Jennifer feels out of place at her own thirteenth birthday Party.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Michael Jackson Halloween
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan feirer Halloween med å flykte fra rasistiske zombier, skuespillerne i 'Human Centipede' har en skremmende gjenforening, og vi besøker en folkeskole for trollmenn med problemer.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Killer Concept Album
programme.desc: En politiker benekter å ha sendt rampete bilder, en detektiv forhører en rapper, Cedric og Levi finner lyn i en flaske, to herrer fra sør komplimenterer kvinner, Jordan møter en gammel venn og en betjent tar tingene helt bokstavelig.

programme.title: Key & Peele: East West Bowl #2
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en introdukjson av de nyeste East/West Bowl-spillerne, utleier-Devon ransaker Jordans leilighet, og Jordan blir støtt av en overseksuell kollega.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sex Detective
programme.desc: En respektert kriminalbetjent, ekspert i sexforbrytelser, benytter ukonvensjonelle metoder for å løse en sak, en actionhelt redder kjæresten sin og en ansatt i en butikk med yoghurt-is tester for mange vareprøver.

programme.title: Key & Peele: I'm Retired
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en ungkars-fest som blir underlig og en svart fyr med en hvit penis.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Joke Stealing
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en fotballspiller som blir straffet for å juble for mye, Jordan og Keegan som går på premieren på "Othello" og en high school-elev som blir berømt for å stjele en vits.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sex Addict Wendel
programme.desc: Artister blir sparket i skrittet på grunn av kunsten sin, klassens klovn terroriserer læreren og en mann prøver å få hellet med seg på et møte for sexmisbrukere.

programme.title: Key & Peele: East Bowl Rap / West Bowl Rap
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer All-Stars fra East/West bowl som rapper, karene spiller mafioso og de to parkeringstypene har vanskelig for å tro at noen tør å provosere Batmans.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Flicker
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan har en flickerkamp og en MMA-fighter går for langt når han erter motstanderen. Andre sketsjer inkluderer en bryllupsgjest somvil være dj og spille "klassiske" låter.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Terrible Henchman
programme.desc: En nødsituasjon tvinger en mann til å endre morgenritualet sitt, en medforbryter ødelegger for superskurken og Jordan minner Keegan på at han er voksen nå.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Dubstep
programme.desc: President Obama og hans vredeoversetter, Luther, taler til Mitt Romney, vi møter mannen som skulle holde tale etter Martin Luther Kings 'I Have A Dream'-tale, og to venner prater om hva som skjer med bæsjen deres atter at de skyller ned.

programme.title: Broad City: The Lockout
programme.desc: Når Abbi får sprøytet leiligheten sin mot skadedyr og Ilana mister nøklene sine, blir jentene nødt til å bo på gaten - akkurat når Abbi har sin første kunstutstilling.

programme.title: Broad City: P*$$Y Weed
programme.desc: Jentene må bli voksne! Abbi vil kjøpe sin egen marihuana, som en voksen kvinne, mens Ilana må takle skatten på egen hånd. Og, jentene er høye som hus.

programme.title: Broad City: Fattest Asses
programme.desc: Når Abbi innser at hun er for snill, blir hun mere bitchy. Ilana bestemmer seg for å nå sitt fulle potential. De går på en eksklusiv fest og møter noen eventyrlige DJ-er. Nå kan ingenting gå galt.

programme.title: Broad City: Hurricane Wanda
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana klarer sig igennem stormen med hjælp fra deres venner (Jaimé, Lincoln og Jeremy), men de får desværre selskab af Bevers og hans søster. Et spil 'Who Done It?' udspiller sig, mens orkanan raser udenfor.

programme.title: Broad City: In Heat
programme.desc: Ilana leter febrilsk etter en gave i siste øyeblikk til Lincoln, mens Abbi prøver å finne et klimaanlegg for å få det kjølig på soveværelset.

programme.title: Broad City: Mochalatta Chills
programme.desc: Der dukker opp nye muligheter når Abbi endelig kan trene noen på Soulstice og Ilana gjør suksess som firmasjef.

programme.title: Broad City: Wisdom Teeth
programme.desc: Abbi skal trekke visdomstennene og Ilana ser det som sin plikt å passe henne til hun får det bedre - noe som selvfølgelig innebærer en masse 'medikamenter' og en total mangel på tilsyn.

programme.title: Broad City: Knockoffs
programme.desc: Abbi og Jeremy går på en date som ender med en overraskelse. Ilana og hennes mor leter etter den perfekte håndvesken.

programme.title: Broad City: Hashtag FOMO
programme.desc: Jentene leter etter den perfekte fest, noe som avslører en underlig og surrealistisk side av Abbi, som igjen bekrefter Ilanas verste anelser.

programme.title: Broad City: Citizen Ship
programme.desc: Gjengen skal feire at Jaime har blitt amerikansk statsborger, men Bevers fører Abbi og Ilana på avveier med å love dem gratis sprit. Imens må Lincoln og Jaime klare seg selv blandt alle advokatene.

programme.title: Broad City: Coat Check
programme.desc: Abbi prøver å finne en forsvunnet frakk, mens Ilana utforsker en ny romanse - som føles merkelig kjent.

programme.title: RENO 911!: CSI: Reno
programme.desc: The deputies work as security guards when "CSI: Miami" comes to Reno, and Wiegel and Dangle get a homeless man into a bathtub.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Naked Stake-Out
programme.desc: After a drug sting goes wrong, Dangle and Junior race back to the station on foot -- and naked.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel and Craig Get Married
programme.desc: Good news and bad news for Wiegel: her boyfriend proposed, but he's going to be executed for multiple murders.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel's Pregnant
programme.desc: Did Dangle and Garcia freeze to death? Did Wiegel's serial killer husband get lethally injected? What is Carrot Top doing in Reno, and why is he so mad?

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Junior Bros.
programme.desc: While Garcia goes undercover to bust undocumented workers and the people who hire them, Junior spends his day off with his brothers.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Jet Ski Blues
programme.desc: The Reno Sheriff's Department inherits a beautiful, cursed jet ski from a fallen deputy.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Rick's On It
programme.desc: Rick the Citizens' Patrolman one-ups the Sheriff's Department in investigating a crime spree, and Garcia receives a visit from an old, unpredictable friend.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Spanish Mike Comes Back
programme.desc: Spanish Mike Alvarez returns to tempt the deputies, and Jones and Garcia work security at a Ted Nugent concert.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Son of a Chechekevitch
programme.desc: The deputies vow to avenge Sheriff Chechekevitch's death, and Wiegel studies with Lamaze instructor Guy Gerricault.

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Investigation Continues
programme.desc: The investigation into Sheriff Chechekevitch's murder zeroes in on his ex-wife, and Williams and Wiegel attend a Lamaze class.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: White People Can't Dance & The Three Daves
programme.desc: Dave challenges the myth that white people can't dance.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Love Contract & True Hollywood Stories: Rick James
programme.desc: Rick James is one of the baddest mothaf**kers of all time.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: True Hollywood Stories: Prince & Red Balls Energy Drink
programme.desc: Negrodamus answers questions, and Charlie Murphy plays basketball with Prince.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Internet & Moment in the Life of Lil Jon
programme.desc: Dave walks in Lil Jon's shoes and considers the Internet's sleaziness.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: World Series of Dice & Mooney on Movies
programme.desc: The Marcy Projects hosts a champion shooter contest, and Paul Mooney talks "Gone with the Wind."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: I Know Black People & Keeping It Real Goes Wrong
programme.desc: Dave asks contestants how much they know about black American culture.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Oprah's Baby Daddy & Jury Duty
programme.desc: Dave gets Oprah pregnant and recalls being a member of the O.J. Simpson trial jury.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Kneehigh Park & Making da Band
programme.desc: P. Diddy gives unusual requests, and Snoop Dogg visits Kneehigh Park; appearances by Q-Tip and Wyclef Jean.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mandela Boot Camp & The Time Haters
programme.desc: Dave reveals sketches that are too hot for television.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Wayne Brady & Tyrone Biggums's Fear Factor
programme.desc: Dave gives up his show to Wayne Brady, and Tyrone Biggums returns as a guest on "Fear Factor."

programme.title: Tosh.0: Competitive Sushi Eater
programme.desc: Det blir mye tygging når Daniel intervjuer en konkurransespiser. Videre tar han en titt på kvinnelige musikere og lærer om blomster og bier.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Redemption Reunion Spectacular: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Daniel sjekker hvordan det går for de som har fått oppreisning, viser sine første reklamer og finner ut hva unge gutter gjør når de er alene.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Headbanger Workout
programme.desc: Daniel viser at alkohol og elektrisitet aldri er en god kombinasjon, og programmet får sin mest sexy oppreisning noensinne.

programme.title: Tosh.0: How to Teach
programme.desc: Daniel støtter den første kvinnelige presidentkandidaten, anmeldere på Yelp snakker om hva Comedy Central gjør feil, og en gressrøykende student får oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Security Officer Jay
programme.desc: Daniel klikker over Movember, ønsker å rense seg selv og en vekter får oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Happy Birthday, Katie
programme.desc: Daniel hjelper en snill fyr å være mer enn bare en venn, gjør narr av rike idioter på Instagram og avslører resultatene av AIDS-testen sin.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Bad Impressions
programme.desc: Daniel gjør Thanksgiving ekstra queer, gir deg muligheten til å få din egen del av Tosh Empire, og gir en elendig imitator oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Ostomy Bag Girl
programme.desc: Daniel finner opp et spill som får Hasbros Parker Brothers til å skjelve av frykt, viser et julekort som er garantert ødelegger julen, og USAs favoritt-analjente får oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Weirdoes of the Year; Fan Christmas Cards
programme.desc: Daniel viser sine favorittklipp av årets gærninger, og åpner julekort fra fansen.

programme.title: Tosh.0: We Buy Golf
programme.desc: Daniel gjeninnfører 'Sport eller konsekvens', finner ut av mysteriet om hvem hans far er, og viser den mest sexy nettoppreisningen noensinne.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After an operation, Louie, the sharp-tongued dispatcher, panics when he has to keep a promise that he made to God during surgery to turn over a new leaf.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas’ youthful and attractive mother makes her first visit to America, and after she and Alex meet and have an evening love affair, Latka assumes that he will soon be getting a new daddy.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Alex’s ear is nearly shot off in a holdup attempt in his cab, he stuns his fellow cabbies by quitting and exchanging his driving clothes for a waiter’s tuxedo at a snobbish French restaurant.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies fall victim to a Hollywood-style roller coaster ride when a production company visits to do a film on taxi drivers. Life at the Sunshine Cab Company turns into a continual champagne and buffet festivity.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When John crashes Cab 804, the cabbies are shocked into a period of mourning, as they reminisce about the wild and memorable events that occurred when they were driving the legendary cab.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas frantically works to save the cracked-up Cab 804 as the cabbies fondly recall times in the legendary auto when Alex delivered a baby, Louie beat a rich brat out of a wad of money, and Elaine met the perfect man.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a dream come true for Tony when he’s challenged by an aging ex-champ, but he has more than just a fight on his hand when the opposition unveils its secret weapon.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies are in for a comedy surprise when the small town kid Bobby befriends, Steve, lands a big role as Romeo the first day he arrives in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex tells Elaine that her hectic schedule of being a mother, a cabbie and a museum employee is driving her crazy and that she should see a psychiatrist. Elaine decides that a quicker cure would be to spend the night with Alex.

programme.title: Becker

programme.title: Becker

programme.title: Becker

programme.title: Becker

programme.title: Man With A Plan

programme.title: The Hills: You Can't Just Be With Me?
programme.desc: Jason vil gjerne gjøre Laurens 20-årsdag spesiell, men når hun lyver for ham angående en jobb med mannelige modeller for et Teen Vogue-oppdrag, settes forholdet deres på prøve.

programme.title: The Hills: Love is Not a Maybe Thing
programme.desc: Heidi bestemmer endelig at hun har opplevd nok dramatikk med Jordan. Lauren og Jason tenker på å gå et hakk videre.

programme.title: The Hills: Timing is Everything
programme.desc: Når Laurens harde jobbing under moteuken i L.A. fører til tidenes største karrieremulighet, føler hun seg dradd mellom jobben sin og kjæresten sin.

programme.title: The Hills: Out With The Old
programme.desc: Etter en vaklevoren sommer med kjæresten Jason, bestemmer Lauren seg for å gjøre det slutt og drar tilbake til Teen Vogue for å møte sin mindre glade sjef. Heidi får problemer med en fyr som både hun og Audrina dater.

programme.title: The Hills: When You Least Expect It
programme.desc: Lauren går på sin første date siden Jason, og blir satt på prøve på jobben når hun bes om å gjøre sitt første moteshow. Heidi har en livsavgjørende hemmelighet hun må fortelle om til kjæresten sin.

programme.title: The Hills: The Best Night Ever
programme.desc: Når Audrina dukker opp i Heidis bursdag uten invitasjon, forstår hun at Heidi ikke er villig til å tilgi og glemme. Lauren, som har bestemt seg for å konsentrere seg om jobben, blir forført av sjarmen til Brody, den nye typen i livet hennes.

programme.title: The Hills: Who Do You Trust?
programme.desc: Audrina forteller Heidi at Spencer er en lurendreier, men Heidi stiller seg tvilende - til hun ser det med egen øyne. Lauren fortsetter å lure på om hun er klar for et forhold.

programme.title: The Hills: One Big Interruption
programme.desc: Heidi tar en pause fra Spencer, men savner ham mer en hun trodde hun ville. Lauren må planlegge en Teen Vogue-middag, men distraheres når hun må hjelpe praktikanten Emily fra New York.

programme.title: The Hills: You Have Chosen
programme.desc: Når Lauren forteller Heidi hva hun egentlig syns om Spencer, må Heidi velge mellom bestevennen sin og kjæresten.

programme.title: The Hills: With Friends Like These...
programme.desc: Lauren forstår at hun ikke kan stole på bestevennene sine etter at Heidi spleiser Jen med Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: Enough Is Enough
programme.desc: Spencer ber Heidi om å flytte inn hos ham, men Heidi vet ikke hva hun skal gjøre, eller hvordan hun skal fortelle det til samboeren Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills: New Year, New Friends
programme.desc: Laurens 21-årsdag er full av overraskelser - Heidi og Audrina holder selskap for henne. Jen gjør et forsøk på å slutte fred med Lauren.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Down The Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: Når single slipper seg løs på en fest, truer sjalusi med å hindre et par fra fluktdaten. Frustrasjonen stiger da huset forstår at kun et av de sterkeste parene kan bli en perfekt match.

programme.title: Are You The One?: It Takes One To Know One
programme.desc: Overraskende besøk gir singlene råd og innsikt i hva som trengs for å finne en perfekt match. En sannhetsbås avslører endinger i gruppedynamikken.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Stricking Out
programme.desc: I et enestående øyeblikk avslører Kamie en perfekt match under Parseremonien. Et favorittpar får endelig vite sin skjebne. Et annet par blir sammen igjen.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Kiss And Tell
programme.desc: Will fatter konsekvensen av å prøve å fortsette med Courtney samtidig som han leter etter en perfekt match. Huset slipper seg løs og deler skjule talenter.

programme.title: Are You The One?: You Were The One
programme.desc: Etter uker med diskusjon om hvordan finne sine utvalgte, går singlene sammen og gjør et djervt forsøk på å finne ekte kjærlighet.

programme.title: Are You The One?: You Can't Handle the Truth
programme.desc: 10 single kvinner og 10 single menn skal tilbringe en måned sammen mens de finner ut hvem som passer sammen. Klarer de det, vil de dele den største prissummen i MTVs historie - en million dollar.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: To gjester får et oppdrag som får store konsekvenser for kveldens dramatiske parseremoni. Et mørke legger seg over hotellet. Hvem tør å sove på sitt eget rom?

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Guttene er etterlatt, mens Mørkets herre herjer på hotellet. Jentene kommer til Lucifers rike hvor de blir himmelfalne over å møte den nye gutten.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Lucifer får endelig seg en partner, men blir fort usikker på om han valgte den rette. Jentene får seg en overraskelse da de skal på nok en date med enda en av underverdenens skikkelser.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Demonen sjekker inn og det gjøres klar for grilling før kveldens Pandoras eske. Hvem er egentlig hotellets største spiller?

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Hotellet er åpnet og elleve gjester sjekker inn til sesongens første fest. Foran seg har de uker med hardt spill, sterke følelser, ville fester, kjærlighet, allianser og vanskelige valg.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Spillet er i gang! Gjesten på solo er gjenstand for spekulasjon og parene skal gjennom en tillitseremoni. Stoler de på hverandre, eller er det noen som blir fristet til å bytte partner?

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 903
programme.desc: Hanne kjøpte drømmeboligen som viste seg å være infisert av både rotter og skjeggkre. Etter sitt forrige bomkjøp håper hun at Hans Christian kan hjelpe. Og Christian skal kjøpe sin første leilighet.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 904
programme.desc: Positivitetsblogger Petter ønsker å bo nærmere sentrum, men klarer Karianne å finne den perfekte guttebula? Camilla og Jon Erik trenger mer plass og får hjelp av Hans Christian.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 905
programme.desc: Iselinn og Ron er helt uenige om hvor de vil bo. Klarer Karianne å løse en tilnærmet umulig oppgave? Gårdsguttene Kim og Ole Johnny er på jakt etter et idyllisk gårdsbruk med skog og egen strandlinje.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 906
programme.desc: Karianne får et viktig oppdrag med å hjelpe alenemamma Samia i hus før mammapermisjonen er over – men holder budsjettet? Hans Christian møter Johanna og Joakim som er på jakt etter drømmehagen.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1001
programme.desc: Ingrid bor på leilighetshotell med sine to barn, og er desperat etter å få en ny start, og skape et hjem sammen med familien. Småbarnsforeldrene Toril og Eivind vil ut av leiligheten sin i Oslo-gryta.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1002
programme.desc: Lise og Damien blir snart tobarnsforeldre og vil ut av bykjernen og ned på bakkeplan. Cecilia starter i ny jobb i Trondheim om to uker, men har ikke hatt tid til å gå på visninger.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 201
programme.desc: 12 nye kjendiser flytter inn på Camp Kulinaris! Her skal de leve og bo sammen mens de drifter sin helt egne restaurant i regi av mesterkokk Kjartan Skjelde.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 712
programme.desc: Det er konkurransedag på Camp kulinaris, og den tapende restaurantsjefen skal i kokkekamp. Hvem av de tidligere lagkompisene som må møte ham, blir avgjort i en intens lærlingkamp.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 624
programme.desc: I lærlingkampen blir deltakerne testet i både teknikk og hurtighet, utfallet blir for mange overraskende og det er duket for årets mest spennende kokkekamp.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 630
programme.desc: Et steg nærmere finalen for de gjenværende deltakerne! På dag to i finaleuken utfordrer Kjartan finalistenes smaksløker. Dagen avsluttes med at enda en finalist må reise hjem.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 616
programme.desc: Nok en deltaker må forlate Camp Kulinaris. Dagens kokkekamp står mellom to gode venner som begge ønsker å bli.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 610
programme.desc: Et lag jobber harmonisk og målrettet, mens det andre har fokus på lave skuldre og chill stemning. Hvilken strategi som viser seg å være den beste gjenstår å se på dagens servering.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1111
programme.desc: Iselin og Jørgen prøver seg på hinderløype til vanns. Onkel Erling og Stein Are har endelig kommet fram etter lastebilturen, men det tar ikke lang tid før et nytt problem dukker opp.

programme.title: Charterfeber
programme.desc: Per Sandberg ankommer og ender i karaoke-duett med Svein. Roger fortsetter jakten på CD-er, mens landkrabbene fra Harstad søker spenning i det våte element. Fred Åge havner i dartduell mot en brite.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1123
programme.desc: Bibbi og Svein fortsetter daten sin, og får selskap av noen innpåslitne kameler. Jane og gjengen er på marked. Stein Are og onkel Erling imponerer på kjøkkenet med klassikeren Toro-ertesuppe.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 913
programme.desc: Hilde er fremdeles optimist på at hun skal tjene inn penger til basseng hjemme i Norge, og prøver seg denne gangen som massør på stranden.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1101
programme.desc: I første episode treffer vi Aurora, som har med seg mamma Bibbi på tur. Stein Are fra Harstad-familien har tatt med seg onkel Erling på guttetur og vi blir kjent med Cathrin, og hennes lillebror Odin.

programme.title: Charterfeber After Beach: Episode 103
programme.desc: Paradise-gjengen drar på booze-cruise etterfulgt av en fuktig kveld på byen. Fetsund-gutta avholder en intern konkurranse, og en ny venninnegjeng fra Bodø kommer for å ta øya med storm.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 905
programme.desc: Svein får hjelp av det fastboende kunstnerparet Tara og Rune, da han trenger inspirasjon til sin kommende reisetips-bok, mens damene fra Buskerud tester ut hotellets fasiliteter.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 305
programme.desc: Halvor tar med seg gutta til vakre Lofoten for å hjelpe en familie som drukner i klær og utstyr inne i den lille hytta de har.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 306
programme.desc: For første gang reiser gutta til ei hytte som faktisk er nyoppusset. Selv om den er nymalt innvendig trenger den omfattende endringer for å bli slik familien ønsker seg.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 307
programme.desc: I Tydal finnes kanskje Norges yngste hytteeier, hun er 19 år! Guttas oppdrag blir derfor å lage en feminin, ungdommelig hytte som passer en ung kvinne og hennes venninner.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 308
programme.desc: Et sporty og ungt par skal få forvandlet hytta si til en dødskul fritidsbolig hvor ALT er svart! Mørkt og trist tenker du? Eventyrlig, tenker vi!

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 309
programme.desc: Oppussingskvartetten dra til nydelige Kinn i Sogn og fjordane, hvor et fiskevær skal få en ny drakt. til nydelige Kinn i Sogn og fjordane, hvor et fiskevær skal få en ny drakt.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 310
programme.desc: Sesongens siste hytte ligger i vinterparadiset Geilo med utsikt til fantastiske Hallingskarvet. Gutta ønsker å gi den slite hytta en solid ansiksløftning, fornye kjøkkenet, samt utvide stuen.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2302
programme.desc: Gry og Glenn fra Veitvet i Oslo elsker å dra på turer med danskebåten og spise på restaurant. Men ekteparet har levd fullstendig over evne, og økonomiekspertene finner raskt ut at paret aldri har samarbeidet om økonomien.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2303
programme.desc: Ida Helene fra Harestua klarer aldri å holde et budsjett og går i minus hver eneste måned. Bare ett år etter at hun kjøpte leiligheten hun og datteren bor i, står hun i fare for å miste den. Klarer Lene og Hallgeir å redde boligen?

programme.title: Luksusfellen
programme.desc: Daniel fra Siggerud fikk sitt første kredittkort som 17-åring og er siden blitt nedsyltet i gjeld. Kjæresten hans, Pia, håper at Magne og Hallgeir kan klare å ordne opp i Daniels gjeldskaos.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2305
programme.desc: Renate bor på en gård i Svarstad sammen med barna sine og hunden. Hun har pådratt seg mye kredittkortgjeld og sliter med seks betalingsanmerkninger og lønnstrekk. Klarer Magne og Lene å få redusert gjelden?

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2306
programme.desc: Pengene til 27-åringen Ole André, som bor på Haslum, går unna til dyr elektronikk og gaming. Han kjøpte også like godt en Tesla på impuls. Kan Lene og Hallgeir hjelpe han med å få styr på økonomien?

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2307
programme.desc: Småbarnsforeldrene Martin og Line fra Tromøya sliter hele tiden med at pengene ikke strekker til. Drømmen om å kunne kjøpe sitt eget hjem virker fjern, men kanskje Hallgeir og Magne kan hjelpe dem ut av den økonomiske krisen?

programme.title: South Park: Handicar
programme.desc: Timmys suksess med hans nye bilverksted gir ham en masse fiender.

programme.title: South Park: Dobbel innsats
programme.desc: Kyle leker med ilden når han blander seg i Cartman og Heidis forhold.

programme.title: South Park: Credigree Weed St. Patrick's Day Special
programme.desc: Butters blir sjokkert da han får vite at folk i South Park ikke forstår hva St. Patrick's Day handler om.

programme.title: South Park: Råtne tomater
programme.desc: Barna i South Park påstår at de har sett mr. Garrison luske rundt i byen. Folk i byen er sinte fordi presidenten skremmer barna deres.

programme.title: South Park: Tweek hjerte Craig
programme.desc: De asiatiske jentene på skolen tegner henførte drømmebilder av Tweek og Craig.

programme.title: South Park: Skammens armbånd
programme.desc: En fryktelig dopingskandale ryster alle i troen på et elsket ikon. Alle som en gang støttet den falne helten, klipper av seg sine gule armbånd.

programme.title: South Park: Klubbhus
programme.desc: Guttene vil bygge klubbhus for å spille nødt eller sannhet med Wendy og Bebe.

programme.title: South Park: Dobbeltrøbbel i Kina
programme.desc: Randy ser en mulighet for Tegridy i China.

programme.title: South Park: Cow Days
programme.desc: Innbyggerne i South Park tror et turistpar har stjålet 'Cow Days'-statuen, mens den i virkeligheten ble stjålet av kuene.

programme.title: South Park: Starvin' Marvin i verdensrommet
programme.desc: Marvin er tilbake! Han og guttene reiser verden rundt for å finne mat, med CIA og Sally Struthers hakk i hæl.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 222
programme.desc: Det blir en leken uke når deltagerne blir delt opp i to lag, og må kjempe om å imponere den nye gjesten.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 223
programme.desc: Embla nyter makten hun har denne uken når deltagerne skrur opp temperaturen med et råne- og ragge-show!

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 224
programme.desc: Embla jobber for å velge allianse, og et emosjonelt valg må tas når en deltager skal sjekke ut.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 225
programme.desc: En superskurk går løs og setter én etter én av superheltene i fare. Det bygges opp til sjalusidrama når Polestar bruker sine forføreriske evner.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 226
programme.desc: Superskurken herjer videre på resorten, og fire superhelter skal ut på et superhemmelig oppdrag. Øyvind og Natalia fortsetter å gjøre hverandre sjalu...

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 235
programme.desc: Siste fest med gjengen! Mye sinne og frustrasjon bobler opp til overflaten, og et nytt Paradise-par viser endelig sine følelser for hverandre.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 236
programme.desc: Finale – og det er klart for den ultimate troskapstesten!

programme.title: This Property Is Condemned
programme.desc: Robert Redford and Natalie Wood headline this sexually charged Depression-era drama. Redford plays Owen Legate, a railroad official come to backwater with pink slips for the yard employees.

programme.title: Vendepunktet
programme.desc: Vincent blir separert fra sin vakre, men reserverte kone, og er utro med en blid og lidenskapelig skribent. Kjærligheten hennes lover en ny begynnelse, men Vincent slites mellom de to kvinnene, så hans fremtidige lykke står på spill.

programme.title: Tamara Drewe
programme.desc: Den unge journalisten Tamara Drewe vender tilbake til sine røtter på den engelske landsbygda for å selge sitt barndomshjem etter at hennes mor dør. Hennes ankomst skaper mildt sagt en hel del uro i byen.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
