programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A four-dollar lawsuit is brought against an insurance company by a farmer who claims he was cheated.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Bounty Killer
programme.desc: Col. Benteen asks Earp to help with a string of murders in the outlaw area called Robber's Roost. Earp agrees to investigate and finds himself working with outlaws.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt finds a cabin to shelter himself from a blizzard, only to learn it is occupied by a pair of bank robbers.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Even though Doc has confessed to murdering the man that shot his horse, Matt is unwilling to arrest him.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A tenderfoot teams with a prospector who is quick to live up to his reputation as a jinx.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah seg på 'Kostymekatastrofer', kommer i kontakt med 'Etikettefjerne folk' og blir vitner til 'Nære på-overganger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood se folk som snus opp ned av 'Påtvungne overslag', får seg en drink og to for mye med 'Pussa bestemødre' og finner ut grunnen til å unngå dansing med drinker i 'Ikke drikk og dans'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' med Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah får vi se strålende treffsikkerhet i 'Skallesnikskyting', finner ut av hva som er motsatt av å prestere under press i 'Vanære under press' og avslutter med noen 'Sjalu hjerter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' drar Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood for å skate med gjenstander på hjul som er 'Park-uforenlig', tar bilder og får seg en smell i 'Knipseattakk' og holder fast på verdisakene i møte med 'Mobile skurker'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' opplever Rob, Steelo og spesialgjest Lolo Wood at selv dommere kan oppleve stygge 'Dommertreff', at de kan bli fiskemat under 'Vannattakk og de hopper over instruksjoner i 'Anvisningskaos'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood imot høyhastighetpresanger i 'Gaver i forbifarten', opplever massiv bråstopp i 'Løperhinder' og blir opprørt av 'Kritiske mødre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' foretar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood litt amatørmessig jordforflytning med 'Helgedosere', tar med ungene i butikken i 'Shoppingmonstere' og setter nesen sørover og opplever litt 'Landsens vrede'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' feirer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood noen første smeller som ektepar med 'Første store feilsteg', prøver å kommunisere med berusede ved å 'Snakke fyllisk' og opplever fryktløse folk som er 'Slangesikre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' holder Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood hodet høyt for å unngå 'Baller fra oven', tar et lett kaotisk bad og opplever full 'Badekarinvasjon' og får hører den ufiltrerte sannheten av 'Søte små kritikere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' morer Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg i parkeringsanlegg med 'Garasjegøy', ser at avløpsåpnere kan brukes til mer enn kun nummer to i 'Mangefasetterte avløpsåpnere' og lurer døden i 'Nesten knust'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Forsøk på avrettingsmasse
programme.desc: Flavin kommer tilbake og utløser en gjengkrig og hjelper Dylan til å utvikle seg som et paradin.

programme.title: Andromeda: Så brenn de utemmede landene
programme.desc: En krystall som kan gjenopprette Andromedas kraft blir oppdaget, men for å få den, må Dylan jobbe for gruveeieren.

programme.title: Andromeda: Det som ikke var
programme.desc: Tunneler oppdages på Seefra som kan brukes til å nå åtte andre Seefra-planeter.

programme.title: Andromeda: Testen
programme.desc: Når en gammel mann blir drept, er Beka, Rhade og Harper de viktigste mistenkte og stilles for retten

programme.title: Andromeda: Gjennom et glass mørkt
programme.desc: Rhade leder opprørerne i en kamp mot en krigsherre på Seefra-5.

programme.title: Andromeda: Stolthet før fallet
programme.desc: Dylan oppdager at kjæresten til Beka var Drago Musevini, og han brukte Bekas DNA til å skape Nietzscheans.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police were called to the scene of what appeared to be an accidental drowning. The investigation gradually focused on one suspect who had more than a million reasons to want the victim dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss, Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: When a popular disc jockey was found murdered in a community garden, police swung into action. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert led police to the killer, who had been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: When a man is gunned down in his own garage, investigators use science to unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths prove to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which had no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: When a victim is brutally murdered in his own bed, investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside — physical evidence they hope will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: Armed with little else, police hoped that shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation of Audrey Nichols' murder back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When the head chef of a historic Philadelphia restaurant was found dead, investigators interviewed the usual suspects: family, friends and coworkers. As they sifted through the evidence, police uncovered a chilling tale of debt and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: When Washington, DC is plagued by a series of arson fires — each started with the same type of incendiary device — it's up to forensic scientists to find the clues that lay in the ashes.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 21
programme.desc: This episode includes: Slain Swedes, UD: Amelia Earhart 2, Black Market Babies, Bones Knows, UD: Prison Mom, and Med Scam & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 22
programme.desc: This episode includes: Noah's Ark, New in Town & UD, Model A Sister & UD, and Carwash Kidnap & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 23
programme.desc: This episode includes: World Leaders, Marie Hilley, Experts/Walker, and Women in the Bay & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 24
programme.desc: This episode includes: Broken Hearts & UD, Burning Car & UD, Armored Car Killings & UD, and Amnesia Victim.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 25
programme.desc: This episode includes: Don's Near Miss, UD: Drunk Driver, Eleven Million Dollar Heist & UD, Migrant Twin & UD, and Orthodox Jew.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 1
programme.desc: This episode includes: Tami Lynn, Hudson Valley UFO (Pts. 1 & 2) and Daredevil Doe & UD.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Heist
programme.desc: In Arizona, an armored van loaded with cash failed to reach its destination. Authorities suspected an inside job. When the vehicle was recovered with the drivers and the cash missing, those suspicions grew even more.

programme.title: The FBI Files: John Gotti: Convicted
programme.desc: John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Polly Klaas: Kidnapped
programme.desc: On October 1, 1993, a stranger abducted 12-year-old Polly Klaas during a slumber party in her home.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Firefight
programme.desc: In Miami, a gang of robbers targeted banks and armored cars. They carried assault weapons and weren't afraid to use them. They struck during the day, and sometimes twice a day. For awhile, they seemed unstoppable.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brutal Abduction
programme.desc: A Chicago street gang thought they had figured out how to kidnap people for ransom again and again, and never get caught. But their one mistake was they underestimated the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written in Blood
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Wasted Youth
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Crimes Of Passion
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Cold Cases
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Raw Greed
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Ghost in the Shower
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Waterloo Rugby Club and come into contact with a very mischievous spirit in the male showers! A ghost that scares away any female that dares to enter.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Drakelow Tunnels
programme.desc: The Drakelow Tunnels are a former underground military complexused mainly for storage. However, during the construction and running of this facility, 6 people are thought to have died.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Mischievous Ghost of The Kings Arms Hotel
programme.desc: Sean investigates claims that a mischievous ghost going by the name of Alice is causing havoc at The Kings Arms Hotel. This is one night at a hotel that the team will not rest.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Lady in Grey
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate ruins of The Orangery in Merseyside and claims that the ghost of a grey lady is haunting the location. They capture some of the most compelling paranormal evidence they have ever encountered.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Ghosts of the Pumping Pit
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension head to Wigan and investigate Aspull Pumping Pit. Built in 1871, the location is currently in ruins and is home to a whole host of paranormal activity. Ghostly entities make contact tonight, in an unforgettable paranormal investigation!

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Bump In The Bingo Hall
programme.desc: The team head out to Blackpool for a day out at the seaside that they will never forget. Investigating one of Blackpool's iconic buildings The Empire Bingo Hall. Many famous acts have played here and it seems that some may have never left.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Rescues a Runaway
programme.desc: Sherry was attacked at 15 and ran away from home. She wants Steve’s help with reuniting her with her mother. Then, Dawn's teenage daughter Cathy recently gave birth, but lives in fear of the baby’s unemployed and unstable father Nick.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Kristy wants her baby back from her mother Donna! Donna claims she took the baby away because he was born with severe disabilities due to Kristy’s drug use during pregnancy. Who’s the liar?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?
programme.desc: At 17, Janelle's infant son died from serious injuries. She was sentenced to 3 years in prison for reckless homicide, but claims she's innocent. What will her polygraph results say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Betrayal
programme.desc: Korey is positive that his girlfriend Dominique is cheating on him and is also worried that she might be selling sex. She says that his suspicions have caused him to become abusive. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin isn’t faithful!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Did It To Hurt You
programme.desc: Aeshia’s here to prove to Terrence and his wife Lashondra that Terrence is the father of her child, but Lashondra knows she’s wrong! Both Shaunah and Chris have convinced themselves that they’re being cheated on. Who’s the father?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Left You, But You Are The Father
programme.desc: Anastasia and Robert's 2 year relationship crumbled when he heard rumors that she was cheating on him. She says that she's always been faithful, but Robert doesn't believe her and now he doubts he is the father of her newborn baby.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did The Babysitter Abuse My Child?
programme.desc: Stephanie says that ever since she came home from work to find her 1-year-old with a black eye, she has feared that her children's babysitter harms them. Sitter Cheryl denies some serious accusations about a child.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: When 22 year-old Micki Filmore is found raped and murder in her apartment, detective Kenda focuses his investigation on her activities the previous night.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Now Pronounce You Dead
programme.desc: Mother of 3 Dianne Hood is shot to death by a masked gunman on her way home from a Lupus support meeting. Joe Kenda uncovers a sordid web of lust and greed, revealing a killer no one ever expected.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Rains Down
programme.desc: Restaurant worker Sharon Coleman is murdered in a hail of large caliber gunfire. Kenda must break through a web of lies to hunt down one of the most dangerous criminal masterminds he’s ever faced.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Fractured Glass
programme.desc: When affable ladies’ man Michael Tittemore is gunned down in the dead of night, Kenda first sets his sights on the roommates who were present during the murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Gann Twins
programme.desc: Identical twins Jordan and Simon Gann had potential in their youth. But as teens they take an inexplicable dark turn launching a global crime spree.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Hell Hath No Fury
programme.desc: From the moment they are born identical twins, Yvette and Doris Gay, are a close-knit pair. But when they meet a married man the quiet duo transforms into a dangerous threesome.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: As each lead turns cold in a gruesome murder case, Dr. G worries justice may never be served. As the autopsy draws to an end, Dr. G uncovers a shocking clue that may solve this crime.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Under My Thumb
programme.desc: Robert and Stephen Spahalski are identical twins from New York. One twin is put behind bars for murder as a teen, while the other becomes a serial killer.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A daughter wants to surprise her dad with breakfast in bed but finds him unresponsive. His family is convinced they know what killed him, but Dr. G must let the evidence speak for itself.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Scandalous Murder of William Desmond Taylor
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane untangle a web of Hollywood's secrets in the scandalous murder of William Desmond Taylor.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Extraordinary Disappearance of Louis Le Prince
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane cover the disappearance of a man who stepped onto a train only to never be seen again.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Disturbing Mystery of the Jamison Family
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane discuss the mystery of the Jamison family, who vanished in the woods under odd circumstances.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Sinister Disappearance of Jimmy Hoffa
programme.desc: Delve into the case of Jimmy Hoffa as Ryan and Shane investigate the mystery of this prominent mob figure.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Bizarre Collar Bomb Bank Robbery
programme.desc: Join Ryan and Shane as they discuss the bizarre collar bomb incident and the details that still remain murky.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Mysterious Death of the Eight-Day Bride / The Incredible Alcatraz Prison Break
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane unravel the tale of a tragic love triangle and cover a thrilling escape from Alcatraz Prison.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories: Nene Leakes
programme.desc: TV personality and "The Real Housewives of Atlanta" star NeNe Leakes joins psychic medium Kim Russo to investigate paranormal events connected to a wedding she attended in Atlanta, GA.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories: Kelly Osbourne
programme.desc: Kelly Osbourne enlists psychic medium Kim Russo to help her solve a series of paranormal mysteries she experienced at a notoriously haunted Hollywood hotel.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dobbel helix
programme.desc: Andromeda blir involvert i en strid mellom en enn planeten og en Nietzschean-koloni.

programme.title: Andromeda: Angel Dark, Demon Bright
programme.desc: En slipstream sender Andromeda tilbake i tid til like før Commonwealth faller. Mannskapet må gripe inn for å bevare historien

programme.title: Andromeda: Slipsene som blinder
programme.desc: Besvarelse av et nødanrop fører til at mannskapet henter Bekas bror, nå en Wayist, og hans venn.

programme.title: Andromeda: Bankene til Lethe
programme.desc: Et svart hull lar Dylan kommunisere med sin tidligere forlovede, 300 år tidligere.

programme.title: Mutant X: Kilohertz
programme.desc: En ny mutant blir kidnappet fra familien sin, og Mutant X satser på å gjenopprette ham og finne ut hva Eckharts interesse for ham er.

programme.title: Mutant X: Meaning of Death
programme.desc: Når en pest som bare rammer mutanter raser, blir Adam og Eckhart enige om å samarbeide for å finne en kur.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Paper Trail
programme.desc: The police follow a trail of emails, hoping it will lead them to a 38-year-old woman's vicious killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Secrets From The Grave
programme.desc: After a teenager's partially nude body is discovered brutally beaten in a desolate cemetery, Investigators and her family face an emotional journey to the truth behind her murder

programme.title: On the Case: A Tangled Past
programme.desc: When a daughter investigates her sick mother's death, she begins to wonder if the cause of her untimely end was really murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Unanswered Questions
programme.desc: Patti Berry disappears on the way to pick up her child at the babysitter's, then her body is found in a secluded wooded area not far from her abandoned blood-soaked car.

programme.title: On the Case: A Stranger Among Us
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Velda Rumfelt's disappearance in Brentwood, Missouri, in 1977 marked the beginning of a tragic, decades long mystery.

programme.title: On the Case: The Green Dragon
programme.desc: A four year old boy's terrifying discovery sends police on the hunt for a vicious killer.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Tamar Adler, Tony Dokoupil
programme.desc: Tony Dokoupil joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to hit the headlines! James Beard Award-winning author Tamar Adler joins Drew andTonyDokoupil in the kitchen to serve up something delicious.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Kerry Washington, Tracy McMillan
programme.desc: Kerry Washington stars in an all-new comedy show, 'UnPrisoned' by creator Tracy McMillan, and they're joining Drew to dish all about the new series.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Kerry Washington, Danny Seo, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew-crew member Danny Seo is back and sharing professional laundry tips with Drew andKerry Washington, including how to get makeup stains out of sheets.Drew and Ross Mathews are at the Drew's News desk and covering the hottest topics.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Paris Hilton, Michelle Miller, Drew's News
programme.desc: "Paris in Love" star Paris Hilton joins Drew to chat. Then, CBS News Anchor Michelle Miller is helping Drew and Ross hit the headlines at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Ronnie Woo, Drew's News
programme.desc: Chef Ronnie Woo is cooking up a storm with co-host Ross Mathews. Then, Drew and Ross discuss some of the latest and greatest headlines.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Lily Tomlin, Jane Fonda
programme.desc: Iconic duo and longtime best friends Jane Fonda and Lily Tomlin are chatting with Drew all about meeting her as a kid, their new film, "Moving On," their secrets to a lasting friendship and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Ike Barinholtz, Drew's News with Ally Love
programme.desc: "History of the World Part Two" StarIke Barinholtz is joins Drew and talks about how he met his wife in Las Vegas, his new show and more. Peloton Instructor Ally Love joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Kiera Knightley, Carrie Coon, Drew's News
programme.desc: Kiera Knightley and Carrie Coon join Drew to talk about their upcoming film, "Boston Strangler."Drew and her co-pilotRoss Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Justice Smith, Drew's News with Ali Landry
programme.desc: Actor Justice Smith joins Drew and he's dishing about his latest film, "Dungeons and Dragons." Drew and Ross Mathews are joined by Ali Landry at the Drew's News desk as they serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Lucy Liu, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew is joined by her friend "Shazam! Fury of the Gods" star Lucy Liu and she's dishing on some of her iconic roles like "Charlie's Angels" and "Kill Bill."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Rob Riggle
programme.desc: Rob Riggle joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover topics like the news of a potential "Dumb and Dumber 3" and the couple that opted for mashed potato powder instead of rice at their wedding.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Last Chance for Freedom
programme.desc: A report on Crosley Green, who in 1990 was convicted of the murder of Charles "Chip" Flynn and sentenced to death. Green has spent the last 26 years, with help from lawyers and private investigators, trying to prove his innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in the O.C.
programme.desc: A report on the 1994 murder of millionaire businessman Bill McLaughlin in his California home. After his divorce, he became involved with the much younger Nanette Johnston, who it was later discovered, made a habit of seeking out wealthy men to date.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dangerous Beauty
programme.desc: A report on the 2003 murder of Russel Douglas on Whidbey Island, Washington, and how the investigation led to the involvement of Peggy Sue Thomas, a one-time Washington beauty queen-turned-high-end limo driver.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Drawn to Murder - Part 1
programme.desc: A two-part report on the February 1987 murder of 37-year-old Peggy Hettrick in Fort Collins, Colorado. Her mutilated, half-naked body was discovered in a field near the home of Tim Masters, a 15-year-old who lived near the crime scene.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Facebook Detectives
programme.desc: A report about three Texas housewives, Tammye Markle, Joni Shannon, and Tina Wiley, who call themselves the "Facebook Detectives" and who used the Internet to try to find their friend Lisa Stone, who disappeared from her Dallas home in June 2010.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Case Against Michael Politte
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: Cops: Bike for Sale
programme.desc: A deputy pursues a man who fled from a traffic stop. A deputy chases a suspicious man leaving an apartment complex. Two men claim they are trying sell a bike during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops: She Needed a Nap
programme.desc: Deputies pursue a man involved in a carjacking. Deputies are called to an altercation between a father and son. Officers respond to an unresponsive woman lying in a roadway.

programme.title: Cops: Mamma's House
programme.desc: Deputies search for a man who ran from a traffic stop. A man being pursued tells officers he was going to his mother's house. A drunk driver won't admit to hitting a car.

programme.title: Cops: Mean Girls Times Two
programme.desc: Deputies are forced to taser a man after pursuing him into a field. A driver plays dumb when asked about the revolver under his car seat. Officers respond to two teenage girls in a fight.

programme.desc: An officer struggles with a man reaching for something in his pocket. A man won't cop to the gun in his backseat. Police arrive on the scene when a man threatens to shoot his wife.

programme.title: Cops: An Innocent Gardener
programme.desc: Officers pursue a vehicle that struck a police car. Two men deny the lawnmower in their truck was stolen. Deputies are called when a mother attempts to run her daughter over.

programme.title: Cops: Penalty Box
programme.desc: A man sneaking away from a bar fight clams he was chased by a truck. Deputies are called when a woman assaults people at a skating rink. A drunk man abandons his truck on train tracks.

programme.title: Cops: Pup and Rescue
programme.desc: A driver denies ownership of what police find in his car. Police conduct a narcotics sting that nets several arrests. A deputy removes a pooch from the scene of an accident.

programme.title: Cops: Undercover Blues
programme.desc: Police work a sting that targets drug dealers. An undercover sting uncovers narcotics trafficking. Police respond to a burglary in progress and discover a flop house.

programme.title: Cops: Multiple Identities
programme.desc: Officers recover a baggie of drugs from a crying suspect. A drunk woman hides a second ID in her back pocket. Police stop a vehicle that hit a patrol car.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Key to the Enigma (Farid Ouzzane Case)
programme.desc: On July 13, 2011, two boaters retrieved a suitcase that was floating in the bay of Lorient. Inside, they discovered the tied up corpse of a man. In order to identify this unknown man, whose face was unrecognizable.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Corpse In The Cemetery: The Frederic Butanowicz Case
programme.desc: On November 9, 2011, the body of a man was found near the Courcelles-le-Comte cemetery (Pas-de-Calais).

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Deadly Trap For the Interior Designer - Guy Georges Case
programme.desc: On April 18th 2014, in Visé, Belgium, policemen are informed that gunshots had been fired on the street.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Audrey Jouannet Case
programme.desc: September 16 2005. The lifeless body of Audrey Jouannet, 24, is found hidden under the bed in her small apartment in Soisy-sur-Seine. It soon becomes apparent that the young woman has been tortured at length before being strangled.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Mysterious Murder at the Farm (Valerie Bary Case)
programme.desc: On Friday, March 26, 2004, in the region of Dijon, Laurent Bary came home from his work to discover the lifeless body of his wife, Valerie, bathing in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 702
programme.desc: Ekteparet Suzanne og Lars lever et stille og rolig liv på landet utenfor Stockholm. Men når Suzanne avlyser en viktig tenniskamp på kort varsel, blir hennes tennispartner mistenksom og varsler politiet.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Da 32 år gamle Memo plutselig forsvinner, tar vennene hans saken i egne hender og begynner å lete desperat etter ham. Bekymringen forvandles til frykt når letingen fører til urovekkende oppdagelser.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Natt til 13. februar 2023 rystes den lille bygda Malå i Nord-Sverige av et brutalt angrep. Etter hvert som politiet begynner å nøste opp i saken, dukker det opp mørke hemmeligheter og mistanker mot uventede personer.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 603
programme.desc: Politiet har ikke gitt opp å oppklare dobbeltdrapet i Linköping. Etter en endring i svensk lov i 2019, har politiet nå muligheten til å bruke kommersielle slektsdatabaser for å finne gjerningsmannen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 304
programme.desc: I august 2004 stormer to bevæpnede personer inn i Munch-museet på Tøyen. I kaoset som oppstår tar de med seg de to verdenskjente maleriene Skrik og Madonna. Hvem står bak tyveriet, og er bildene tapt for alltid?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 706
programme.desc: I mai 2017 ble småbarnsfaren Filip Viking funnet skutt i Katrineholm. Vitner skynder seg bort til ham og i forbindelse med forsøkene på å redde Filips liv, klarer de å se en lang svartkledd mann løpe fra åstedet.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Shades of Grey
programme.desc: Mouse makes his first appearance - and is quickly shunned by the Family of tunnel folk for thievery.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: China Moon
programme.desc: Vincent and Catherine help a Chinatown beauty avoid an arranged marriage by escaping into the underground.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Alchemist
programme.desc: Catherine has reason to believe that a new drug on the streets is being supplied by someone from Vincent's world.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Temptation
programme.desc: A beautiful attorney seduces Catherine's boss, Joe Maxwell, creating a serious conflict of interest.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Promises of Someday
programme.desc: Catherine is disturbed when she begins to suspect the new attorney in her office is a fraud... and more disturbed when she finds him looking for the entrance to Vincent's world.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Midnight Sun
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Still Valley
programme.desc: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Stranger in Possum Meadows
programme.desc: A young boy playing in a field meets an old man who is really an alien collecting specimens to bring back to his planet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Street of Shadows
programme.desc: While taking a walk in a wealthy neighborhood, an unemployed man living in a shelter experiences an unusual transformation

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Something in the Walls
programme.desc: A doctor arrives at his new job in a sanitarium. He discovers the case of a woman who is terribly frightened of things that appear on her walls.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Room 2426
programme.desc: Martin Decker is confined to a special room for acts and thoughts against the state. They want the formula for a weapon he does not want to reveal. Escape for Martin comes from the mind.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Jungle
programme.desc: Alan Richards plans to build a dam in Africa on a tribe's ancestral land. The tribe's witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Once Upon a Time
programme.desc: Woodrow, a janitor living in the year 1890, accidentally activates a time traveling helmet which transports him to 1962 - then promptly breaks down.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Five Characters in Search of an Exit
programme.desc: A hobo, clown, bagpipe player, ballerina and military officer are trapped in a huge cylinder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Quality of Mercy
programme.desc: A gung-ho young soldier gets a new viewpoint on war when he inexplicably changes places with a Japanese officer trying to stop his superior from leading a charge against American forces.

programme.title: JAG: Retrial
programme.desc: At the request of Seaman Saul Wainright (guest star William Sadler), who is serving a life sentence in a federal prison for stabbing a transsexual prostitute 20 years ago, Harm convinces Naval authorities to re-open the case.

programme.title: JAG: One Big Boat
programme.desc: When a Naval Academy sailing team gets caught in a squall and a team member drowns, Mac and Turner must determine if their driven commander willingly put his crew at risk.

programme.title: JAG: Fit For Duty
programme.desc: Harm and Mac find themselves on opposing sides when a Navy psychiatrist is charged with allegedly sending a marine diagnosed with combat stress back to battle too soon.

programme.title: JAG: Death At The Mosque
programme.desc: Vukovic is sent to Iraq to defend a Marine who was caught on tape killing a seemingly innocent Iraqi civilian.

programme.title: JAG: Dream Team
programme.desc: A sailor dies during a fight aboard a ship at sea; Bud discovers the explanation. Mattie wakes up and talks. The general announces a reorganization, orders, and a promotion.

programme.title: JAG: Pilot, Part 1 & 2
programme.desc: A woman radar-intercept officer (RIO) disappears at night from an aircraft carrier in the Adriatic Sea. Two JAG lawyers, Lt. Harm Rabb and Lt. Caitlin Pike, investigate and solve. Harm, a former Naval aviator, unexpectedly becomes a hero.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Gets Shot
programme.desc: During a week-end at Potsie's uncle's hunting cabin, Fonzie is accidentally shot in the vicinity of his favorite jeans' back pocket.

programme.title: Happy Days: American Musical
programme.desc: Struggling to write a school essay on America's immigrant history, Chachi is inspired by Fonzie's colorful story told to the tune of an imagined melting pot melody.

programme.title: Happy Days: Grandma Nussbaum
programme.desc: Grandma Nussbaum teaches Fonzie and Chachi a lesson in growing old gracefully when they try to convince the feisty granny to move into a retirement home.

programme.title: Happy Days: A Night at the Circus
programme.desc: Howard's teen-aged niece, K.C., comes to stay with the Cunninghams after a scandal closes her Houston boarding school while Fonzie hopes a night at the circus will help him win little Heather's heart when nothing else seems to work.

programme.title: Happy Days: Where the Guys Are
programme.desc: After tricking Fonzie into going to a single's camp to help him get over losing steady girlfriend Ashley, Potsie, Chachi and Roger get suckered into a sauna by three con-girls.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Get What You Pay For
programme.desc: Howard decides the house needs a second bathroom. Fonzie offers a way to have it installed and save Howard money as well.

programme.title: Happy Days: Kiss Me Teach
programme.desc: Joanie encounters trouble when she accepts a student teaching job at Patton High.

programme.title: Happy Days: The People vs. The Fonz
programme.desc: His friends are baffled when Fonzie refuses to speak in his own defense after he is accused of manhandling a student and brought before the school board's disciplinary court.

programme.title: Happy Days: School Dazed
programme.desc: Joanie tries to help an angry fifteen year old girl kick a drug habit that threatens to get her kicked out of school.

programme.title: Happy Days: Open House
programme.desc: Over the protests of Richie, whose parents are out of town, Potsie invites three-stranded beauty pageant contestants to spend the night.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Jack Harlow Fulfills His Dreams Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Jack Harlow is a Grammy-nominated rapper and founder of the music collective Private Garden.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Andrew Callaghan is a journalist you know best from his work on Channel 5 News.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Malcolm Gladwell Hits the Tipping Point While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Malcolm Gladwell is the author of five NYT bestsellers, including 'The Tipping Point,' 'Blink' and 'Outliers.'

programme.title: Hot Ones: Seth Meyers Unravels While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Seth Meyers is one of the longest tenured cast members on "SNL" and host of "Late Night with Seth Meyers."

programme.title: Hot Ones: Anderson .Paak Sings Hot Sauce Ballads While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Anderson .Paak is the groovy Grammy-nominated singer, rapper, drummer and producer.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Gabrielle Union Impersonates DMX While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Gabrielle talks about husband Dwyane Wade's bromance with LeBron James and the great Banana Boat Incident.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Superfan Brett Baker Grills Sean Evans Over Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Hot Ones fans have spoken, and we heard your voices loud and clear: Get Brett Baker on the show!

programme.title: Hot Ones: Adam Richman Impersonates Noel Gallagher While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Adam Richman is the legend you know from shows like "Man v. Food" plus a best-selling author.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Dave discusses the funniest rappers, his friendship with Benny Blanco and his favorite Philly athletes.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Special Forces operate deep behind enemy lines with top-of-the-line weapons.Host Wil Willis tests the Sig Sauer P226, the preferred choice like the Mark 25 by Navy SEALs, against competitors like the H&K Compact Tactical.

programme.title: Secret War: The Scholar and the Fight for Greece
programme.desc: Monty Woodhouse, a professor and a legend for blowing up the Gorgopotamos Bridge in Greece in 1942. In the British counter attack against Rommell at Al Alamein in North Africa it was vital to disrupt German supply routes, Greece.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Seizing Power
programme.desc: In 1930s Germany, Hitler capitalizes on economic woes blaming the Weimar Government and Jews. Despite scandals, Nazi rallies gain popularity and emerge as the largest party. Hitler becomes Chancellor in 1933, using the 'Enabling Act' to seize power.

programme.title: Secret War: The Banker, the Norwegians & the Bomb
programme.desc: Sir Charles attended Eton, and then joined the Coldstream Guards. He won the Military Cross on the Western Front and, having survived the war, returned to banking.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Frenzied Killing
programme.desc: Flere mennesker blir drept i 1944 enn noen gang før på Auschwitz. Nazistene prøver å så forvirring blant de allierte i øst, og de vestlige allierte tar beslutninger om å forhandle med nazistene om jødene og bombe leiren.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Overvåket
programme.desc: Etter å ha sett et klipp på iCarly der en mann selger illegale piratkopivideoer, bestemmer to detektiver seg for å bruke Carly og Spencers loft for overvåking.

programme.title: iCarly: Skolebytte
programme.desc: Carly får vite at hun får mulighet til å få et fullt stipend til en privat eliteskole pga nettshowet sitt. Skolen er Briarwood. Carly er i sterk tvil, men Sam og Freddie vet de må få henne til å gå for det.

programme.title: iCarly: Fektedrama
programme.desc: Freddie trenger litt guttetid, så han slår seg sammen med Spencer for å dra og fekte. Freddie er et naturtalent, men ting blir innviklet når Spencer får ham med i en kamp mot den utrolige Doug Toder.

programme.title: iCarly: Vinn en date
programme.desc: Når vennen deres Gibby er for sjenert for å be ut jenta han liker, bestemmer gjengen seg for å gjøre ham og hans flamme til deltagere i et "iWin A Date" innslag på nettvideoshowet deres

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg så han først
programme.desc: Når Carly og Sam viser interesse for den samme fyren, lover de at han ikke skal komme imellom dem. Men det er vanskelig, og når de slåss om hans oppmerksomhet, blir vennskapet deres satt på prøve.

programme.title: iCarly: Pack rat
programme.desc: Carly må trå til når Spencer blir avhengig av et videospil. Sam lurer Freddie til å tro at han blir forfulgt av uhell når han nekter å sende et kjedebrev videre.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg skylder deg en
programme.desc: Sam blir fornærmet når Freddie beskylder henne for ikke å betale ham og Carly noen av de pengene tilbake som hun konstant låner. Sam prøver iherdig å betale dem tilbake - hun finner seg en ordentlig jobb.

programme.title: iCarly: Hubert Lewbert
programme.desc: En "Lur Lewbert"-sketsj går helt galt og skader Carlys irriterende portvakt. Gjengen pleier ham inntil Freddies mor tar over. Men når kærligheten begynner å blomstre, må de sette en stopper for det.

programme.title: iCarly: Pie
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Spencer tar med Freddie til deres yndlingskonditori, finner de ut at eieren er død. Men enda verre er det at oppskriftene hans kanskje er gått tapt for alltid.

programme.title: iCarly: Jul
programme.desc: I et forsøk på å pifte opp julen med et utradisjonelt tre, kommer Spencer til å sette fyr på alle Carlys gaver. Fortvilet ønsker hun seg at hun hadde en normal bror.

programme.desc: The CBS Evening News team shares the day's stories, delivering context and depth to bring greater understanding to the world.

programme.title: 24/7 Primetime
programme.desc: 24/7 Primetime is your essential daily guide to all the stories shaping your world. Anchored by CBS News' Elizabeth Cook, the show delivers the news you need to know.

programme.title: The Takeout with Major Garrett
programme.desc: The Takeout is a new spin on the widely acclaimed podcast hosted by Major Garrett; a daily streaming show that harnesses the best of CBS News' political reporting and lives comfortably in deep discussions.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: 40/40/40
programme.desc: Mechanic Cory races against the clock to turn two short-haul waterbombers into transatlantic aircraft for the epic journey to Turkey. It's up to engineer Adam to get the C-46 crew out of a jam on a remote airstrip in minus 40.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: On the Move
programme.desc: A charter flight falls through the cracks after the McBryans attend a wild family wedding, and an irate Joe pulls captain Justin from the Turkey test flights to do the job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Suspension
programme.desc: A furious Joe fights against a federal suspension that will prevent him from carrying passengers for the first time in 20 years. It's also a setback for Jeremy and the other rampies, which takes a turn for the worse with an unexpected injury.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Cause for Celebration
programme.desc: AJ and Candace get married in the Ice Castle. A frustrated Chuck tries to get the Electra to pay her way. A flummoxed Mikey tries to bake a cake for Joe's birthday.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Transatlantic Crossing
programme.desc: The Turkey crew makes the critical jump over the North Atlantic. But en route to Portugal, one crew is forced to turn back.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Thin Ice
programme.desc: C-46 and DC-4 crews race against the spring melt to fly mining equipment to an airstrip on a frozen lake. Jeremy tries to catch up to fellow rampies Audrey and Wilf.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Etter at Robin ber Rebecca om å flytte sammen med ham, får hun vite at han har utnyttet henne i planene om å overta selskapet hennes.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam får tilbake eierskapet for baren samt en etterlengtet mulighet med Rebecca. Han overlater Robin til myndighetene for innsidehandel.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Robin kommer uventet tilbake etter å ha havnet på feil side av Rebecca og lovens lange arm.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Kevin McHale slutter seg til Cheers-gjengen i en basketballkamp mot den rivaliserende baren.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam prøver å få Rebecca tilbake på Cheers etter at hun har fått seg en annen jobb.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebecca blir forvirret når Robins eks forteller til pressen at hun er hans sanne kjærlighet.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Ma Clavin flytter inn hos Woody når Cliff vender henne bort.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Norm kjemper for å redde favorittstedet fra å bli revet.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebecca planlegger et overraskelsesbesøk til hennes fengslede kjærlighet, Robin.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: I denne helt spesielle, timelange feiringen av Cheers' episode nummer 200, slutter Shelley Long seg til resten av gjengen for et unikt tilbakeblikk på de siste åtte årene. Del 1.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Det farligste spillet / Beinjegerne
programme.desc: For å hindre den andre i å legge hånden i en bolle varmtvann så man tisser i buksa, holder guttene seg våkne i flere dager./ Beavis og Butt-Head bygger et dinosaurskjelett av bein fra en BBQ.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bounty Hunters / School Test / Going Down
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head become ace bounty hunters after a chance meeting with a reality TV. / With a big test looming, our favorite idiots receive an education in cheating. / Beavis and Butt-Head find themselves trapped in an elevator with a smokin hot chick

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Oil Change / Whiplash
programme.desc: After being instructed to change the oil in the fryer at Burger World, Beavis and Butt-head get the oil from a local gas station. / In an attempt to collect some big insurance money, Butt-head tries to give Beavis a whiplash injury while riding the school

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Candy Sale / To the Rescue
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head sell chocalate bars for their school. Well, the chocolate bars practically sell themselves. / Beavis and Butt-head witness a plane crash and appear in a cheesy reenactment on "Rescue 911."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A great day / Bride of Butt-Head / Special delivery
programme.desc: The school closes and makes the best day / Butt-Head phones in a mail-order bride / Burger World launches a home delivery service

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Stewart is Missing / Yard Sale
programme.desc: Mrs. Stevenson shows up at Butt-head's house, desperate to enlist their help in finding Stewart. / Tom Anderson get Beavis and Butt-head to watch his yard sale, and the boys manage to sell everything when they take the sale inside.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Tainted Meat / Bad Dog
programme.desc: Beavis and his bacteria ridden "thingy" contaminate the food at Burger World. / Beavis and Butt-head adopt a vicious dog at a shelter and it trains them.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Crisis line / Career day
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head set out to support callers on a crisis line / Later they go out on work experience as security guards

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A Very Special Episode / Dumbasses Anonymous
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head come to the aid of a wounded baby bird...almost. / Beavis and Butt-head show up at an AA meeting hoping to score some booze.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nektet service / Balleskvis
programme.desc: Beavis prøver yogabukser og får dem ikke av. / Guttene oppdager at de har rett til å nekte service til kunder på Burger World.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Murder on the Halloween Express
programme.desc: Hilda and Zelda are invited to attend a murder mystery party on the Halloween Mystery Train, which makes a stop in Boston.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Gift of Gab
programme.desc: Sabrina and Roxie are thrilled to get their own show on the campus radio station, a two hour talk show they call "Chick Chat."

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Thin Ice
programme.desc: Sabrina finds herself in a jam when ex-boyfriend Harvey requests that she use her magical powers to help him.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Hex, Lies, and No Videotape
programme.desc: Josh gets Sabrina an internship at the Boston Citizen where he works.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Humble Pie
programme.desc: Sabrina and her roommates discover that Morgan didn't pay her portion of the rent when the housing office sends a student to replace her in the house.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A Birthday Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina receives an unexpected surprise on her birthday, a visit from her evil Aunt Irms, the matriarch of the Spellman family.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Deliver Us from Email
programme.desc: Intern Sabrina wants to propose writing her own column about the college experience to Boston Citizen editor Mike Shelby.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Cloud Ten
programme.desc: In an attempt to escape her problems, Sabrina decides to visit her childhood friend, Cathy Winter (Colleen Ann Fitzpatrick) in the Other Realm.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina and the Candidate
programme.desc: Sabrina is assigned to research the local city councilman election for an article, which will run in the Boston Citizen.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: I Think I Love You
programme.desc: Sabrina's relationship with Josh couldn't be going better until Josh tells her that he loves her.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Arrangement
programme.desc: Sabrina's devilish Aunt Irma returns for yet another unexpected visit.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Time After Time
programme.desc: When Zelda's boyfriend breaks up with her she cooks up a storm to drown her sorrows.

programme.title: Fem i familien: It's My Party: Part 2
programme.desc: Jennifer feels out of place at her own thirteenth birthday Party.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Don't Go Changing
programme.desc: Alex tries to change himself to fit in with Ellen’s world of artsy friends.

programme.title: Fem i familien: My Tutor
programme.desc: A young genius falls for Jennifer while tutoring Alex in math.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Mr. Right
programme.desc: Nick takes on a polished image to win the approval of Steven and Elyse.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Just One Look
programme.desc: Steven gets jealous when his old college buddy shares memories with Elyse.

programme.title: Fem i familien: How Do you Sleep
programme.desc: Alex refuses to admit that he struggling with insomnia.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Big Fix
programme.desc: Elyse tries to fix up her co-worker with one of her friends.

programme.title: Fem i familien: You've Got a Friend
programme.desc: Mallory tries to help a trouble teen after catching her shoplifting.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Nothing But a Man
programme.desc: Steven neglects his family after getting a promotion at work.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Dubstep
programme.desc: President Obama og hans vredeoversetter, Luther, taler til Mitt Romney, vi møter mannen som skulle holde tale etter Martin Luther Kings 'I Have A Dream'-tale, og to venner prater om hva som skjer med bæsjen deres atter at de skyller ned.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Bitch
programme.desc: I denne seriepremierer av komiprogrammet prøver Jordan Peele og Keegan Michael Key å si et forbudt ord om deres kvinner, Lil Wayne venner seg til livet bak lås og slå, og president Obama uttrykker hva han egentlig føler.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Dueling Magical Negroes
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan spiller to mystikere som kjemper om rettigheten til å gi skarpsindige råd. Andre sketsjer inkluderer Jaden Smith og hans agent som diskuterer et nytt manuskript, og et homsepar som 'feirer' ny lovgivning.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Severed Head Showcase
programme.desc: En gospel-gruppe må øve uten læreren sin, en gjeng krigere feirer en halshugning, en fange prøver å narre fengselsvakten og en ung mann blir konfrontert fordi han bare snakker i floskler.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Old Ladies And Satan
programme.desc: To gamle damer slåss mot Satan, ting går galt når en mann vil kjøpe en ny madrass og gjestene på en klubb tvinges til å se sannheten om seg selv.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Obama Shutdown
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Keegan blir litt for høy, en forballspiller som vil gjøre alt for å få rødt kort, og to sexeksperter som gir råd om cunnilingus.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Black Ice News
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer Samuel og Lashawn som gleder seg over fordelene ved sine nå lovlige ekteskap, en politibetjent som møter sin nye makker og Lando fra 'Star Wars' blir forfulgt av et superfan.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Non-Stop Party
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en fyr som jager etter kjæresten sin til verdens ende og LMFAO som ikke kan holde opp med å feste.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Parole Officer Puppet
programme.desc: En tilsynsverge bruker en dukke til å knytte bånd til en person i hans varetekt, en mann med nakkestøtte prøver å feste villt og en soldat har en følelsesladet gjenforening med familien sin.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Pussy On The Chainwax
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer Keegan som blir distraheret mens han snakker i telefon med kjæresten sin, at Keegan og Jordan har en ondskapsfull sjef og hvordan et nytt uttrykk blir til.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Les Miz
programme.desc: Vi møter vikaren fra bykjernen Mr. Garvey og A-Aron, Jordans kjæreste tar ham i å se på porno og karene har det moro med Les Mis.

programme.title: Broad City: Coat Check
programme.desc: Abbi prøver å finne en forsvunnet frakk, mens Ilana utforsker en ny romanse - som føles merkelig kjent.

programme.title: Broad City: St. Mark's
programme.desc: Når jentene feirer Ilanas 23. fødselsdag, blir de avbrudt av en rømt tenåring som fører dem ut på en vill jakt rundt i St. Mark's Place.

programme.title: Broad City: Two Chainz
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana opplever store klesuhell på vei til en venns utstilling og legger ut på en desperat jakt etter et offentlig toalett.

programme.title: Broad City: Co-Op
programme.desc: Abbi må late som om hun er Ilana for å ta hennes skift på jobben, mens Ilana drar til Long Island pga en svært viktig legetime.

programme.title: Broad City: Game Over
programme.desc: Ilana får en ny mulighet på Deals, Deals, Deals, og Abbi prøver å holde konkurranseinstinktet i sjakk på Soulstice Games Day.

programme.title: Broad City: Rat Pack
programme.desc: Etter å ha mottatt en heftig regning for skadedyrsbekjempelse, holder Jaime og Ilana en fest for å dekke kostnadene. I mellomtiden drar Abbi ut på tokt for å møte nye mennesker.

programme.title: Broad City: 2016
programme.desc: Ilana finner sitt nye kall, og Abbi må innom det mest fryktede sted i verden: biltilsynet.

programme.title: Broad City: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana drar til Philly for å besøke Abbis barndomshjem . Når Abbi innser at hun gjorde en stor tabbe på videregående, drar hun og Ilana på forsoningsoppdrag.

programme.title: Broad City: B&B-NYC
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana legger ut leilighetene sine på B & B-NYC for å tjene litt ekstra penger.

programme.title: Broad City: Burning Bridges
programme.desc: Ilanas foreldre kommer til byen for deres 30-årsjubileum, men Abbi og Ilana syns det er vanskelig å feire når de begge opplever samlivsproblemer.

programme.title: Broad City: Getting There
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana skal ut på tur, men bare det å komme seg til flyplassen viser seg å være mye vanskeligere enn forventet.

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Investigation Continues
programme.desc: The investigation into Sheriff Chechekevitch's murder zeroes in on his ex-wife, and Williams and Wiegel attend a Lamaze class.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Corporate Sponsor
programme.desc: Hotty's Restaurants sponsors the Reno Sheriff's Department, and the gang gets burned by the deal.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Christian Karaoke Singles' Mixer
programme.desc: Clemmy scandalizes Kimball's Christian singles karaoke club, and Dangle takes bets on the origins of Wiegel's baby.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Proposition C
programme.desc: As Williams and Wiegel consider tampering with the vote for deputies' raises, Jones and Garcia tangle with a drug dealer who may be a D.E.A. agent.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Reno Mounties
programme.desc: Jones and Garcia discover that not just anyone can dispense justice from horseback.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Hodgepodge
programme.desc: The Reno Sheriff's Department takes more than seven hours to respond to a liquor store robbery.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Happy Anniversary
programme.desc: Dangle visits his ex-wife and her new husband on their anniversary, and the lady deputies stake out a lecherous meth dealer and his girlfriends.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Dangle's Wedding
programme.desc: Dangle preps for his wedding after his ex-wife's ex-husband proposes, and Wiegel goes into labor while stuck in cake.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Jumping the Shark
programme.desc: Garcia breaks up Dangle's wedding in more ways than one, and Terry the prostitute finds someone to love.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Tommy Hawk
programme.desc: Tommy Hawk, bounty hunter, and reality TV star runs afoul of the Reno Sheriff's Department.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Wayne Brady & Tyrone Biggums's Fear Factor
programme.desc: Dave gives up his show to Wayne Brady, and Tyrone Biggums returns as a guest on "Fear Factor."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Lil Jon on Lil Jon & Black Bush
programme.desc: Dave considers how recent events would have played out if President Bush were black; special guests Jamie Foxx, Lil John, and music from Outkast's Big Boi.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: PopCopy & Clayton Bigsby
programme.desc: A blind white supremacist unleashes hate, and Dave unveils Nat King Cole's booty videos.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums at School & Wrap It Up Box
programme.desc: Crack addict Tyrone Biggums visits an elementary school.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Zapped & It's a Wonderful Chest
programme.desc: Dave screens his failed reality TV show and shares outtakes from "Roots."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Reparations & NY Boobs
programme.desc: Great New York boobs get awards, and Dave predicts reparations chaos.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Great Moments in Hookup History & Ask a Black Dude
programme.desc: With time running out, Martin Johnson has one last stab at glory: Ashley "Smashly" Evans.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mad Real World & Ask a Gay Dude
programme.desc: Dave imagines a "Real World" season with an all-black cast and one super-white guy.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Real Movies & Wu-Tang Financial
programme.desc: Dave takes a realistic look at "Pretty Woman" and "The Matrix" and introduces the Wu-Tang Clan's new financial consulting firm.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums's Intervention & Racist Hollywood Animals
programme.desc: Tyrone mistakes an intervention for a crack sale, and "Frontline" covers racist animals.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Blackzilla & Playa Haters' Ball
programme.desc: Dave takes Japan by storm in the sci-fi adventure "Blackzilla," and America Undercover presents The Playa Haters' Ball.

programme.title: Tosh.0: We Buy Golf
programme.desc: Daniel gjeninnfører 'Sport eller konsekvens', finner ut av mysteriet om hvem hans far er, og viser den mest sexy nettoppreisningen noensinne.

programme.title: Tosh.0: IceJJFish
programme.desc: Daniel går på date, gir bort bilen sin, og sangeren med fløyelsstemmen IceJJFish får sin nettoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Take No Orders
programme.desc: Daniel prøver å gjøre alle hjem i USA til offentlige toaletter, har en utfordring som sensuren vil hate og fyren som ikke tar ordre fra kvinner får oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Ben's Video Resume
programme.desc: Daniel gir C-SPAN bedre seertall ved å tale i Kongressen, spiser frokost med en hjemløs fyr og en ung jobbsøker får oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Boomer the Dog
programme.desc: Daniel ansetter nettets mest krenkende advokat, spiller en støtende versjon av Sett halen på eslet og en hund fanget i en manns kropp får oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Model Teacher
programme.desc: Daniel tvinger publikummet til å drikke noe han har laget på toalettet, og selger seg selv for dyre hodetelefoner - og en lærerinne får nettoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Prancing Elites
programme.desc: Daniel frigjør verden fra homofobi ved hjelp av The Prancing Elites, forvandler forferdelige tweets til en barnebok og berører en heldig fans følelsesmessig.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Comedian Daniel Songer
programme.desc: Daniel viser hvorfor man aldri skal ta med kjæresten sin til et sportsarrangement, og en ny komiker på 49 år får sin oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Misses Every Layup
programme.desc: Daniel ser hvor mye sitrus menneskeøyet kan tåle og lærer en mann å spille basket.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Roof Jump
programme.desc: Daniel viser hvordan man hever nivået med hashtagger og snakker med den lykkeligste og ekleste fyren i LA - og piken som vil at Internett skal betale for hennes skader, får nettoppreisning.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex tells Elaine that her hectic schedule of being a mother, a cabbie and a museum employee is driving her crazy and that she should see a psychiatrist. Elaine decides that a quicker cure would be to spend the night with Alex.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby and Tony’s friendship is on the line when they become embroiled in a hilarious love triangle and attempt to outdo each other in vying for the affection of a beautiful young lady.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The overweight blind date Alex once had returned to the scene a svelte shell of her former self, and eager for the romance she yearns for with Alex

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The riotous race of the century pits Alex against Louie in a winner-take-all bet to see who can bring in the most receipts. Lecherous Louie uses every dirty trick in the book to make sure he wins his prize—an evening with Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine suddenly starts getting mysterious love letters. When she becomes intrigued by the poetic propositions, a couple of cabbies quickly claim responsibility, leaving Elaine with the hilarious task of discovering who is the amorous writer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie makes a horrible first impression on girlfriend Zena’s parents on Taxi. Louie’s romance with girlfriend Zena takes an outrageous twist when she brings him home to meet her parents.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies try to make Tony a family man when they convince him to adopt the adorably precocious eight-year-old boy named Brian whom he befriended.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a hilarious shock to the cabbies when Rev. Jim brings his new pet to the garage—an over-the-hill racehorse that he bought after cashing in on the 300-to-1 long shot. However, he soon finds that it’s impossible to housebreak a horse.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby faces a humorous predicament when it becomes obvious that one of the biggest talent managers in New York is representing him because of his prowess as a lover, and not for his ability as an actor.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker starts a secretive new health regime to lower his cholesterol, which leads people to talk about his unknown condition. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is arrested for being confrontational and forced to do community service and Bob moves in with Linda. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker feels old after having to renew his driver's license.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker takes a stab at being social by having a dinner party.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker fights over a phone bill, Reggie is angry over not being invited to a wedding and Bob gains too much confidence listening to self-help tapes. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker mistakenly tells the wrong family that their father has died, while Margaret and Linda deal with Linda's depressed friend Lynda. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker and Linda have jury duty and Jake gets a seeing-eye-dog. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Jake goes on a date with a blind girl and Margaret is confronted by the fact that one of her patients doesn't like her. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets into a passionate discussion about faith in the power of God versus medicine with a Priest and Jake, Reggie and Bob take a stab at the stock market.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie has a panic attack about where her life is going and Becker confesses that he misses Elizabeth. (TV-PG)
