programme.title: McLeods døtre: Episode 702
programme.desc: Kates avslutning av forholdet har vekket forvirrende følelser hos Jodi, som blir besatt av å bygge en ny dam på Drovers, med nesten tragiske resultater.

programme.title: McLeods døtre: Episode 703
programme.desc: Jodi avdekker det bisarre 140 år gamle mysteriet til Emma McLeod. Jodi blir skremt av en mystisk visjon, og utvikler et smertefullt utslett på håndledd og ankler.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Alex og Marcus krangler om fremtiden til Killarney, og Marcus avslører en hemmelighet som vil forandre livene deres for alltid.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Jodi stiller spørsmål ved sin egen tilregnelighet når hun hjemsøkes av visjoner om sin forfader Emma McLeod og en dømt morder.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China and America NO
programme.desc: I en tid da mange kinesere ble solgt til amerikanske jernbaneselskaper som behandlet dem brutalt med tøffe arbeidsforhold, reiser Wong Fei-hung til Amerika. Men etter et bakholdsangrep blir han adskilt fra de andre han reiser med.

programme.title: Armor of God 2: Operation Condor NO
programme.desc: Eventyreren i Jackie Chans skikkelse er tilbake i en ny jakt etter en bortgjemt skatt, skjult i ørkenen av nazistene før andre verdenskrig. Men Jackie og kompanjongen hans Ada er ikke de eneste som leter etter skatten...

programme.title: Winners and Sinners NO
programme.desc: Fem gode venner blir løslatt fra fengsel, fast bestemt på å leve lovlydige liv fra nå av. Sammen starter de et rengjøringsfirma, og starten på deres nye liv er et faktum. Men samme dag løslates også en sjette fange som har en motsatt plan.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Secret Kisses
programme.desc: Michael er KCs eks, og er tilbake fra Hemmelighullet Han rører alle med sin oppriktige unnskyldning. Kori og Elle blir nærmere mens Theo og KC tar et hemmelig kyss, bare for å krangle på ekte 'Ex On The Beach'-måte.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Loose Lips
programme.desc: Michael Goonans hemmelige oppdrag avsløres i hemmelighullet, men kan sladderen bite ham i ræva. En eks betyr problemer for Kori, og Ella og KC får grønt lys fra Kaz.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: True Colours
programme.desc: Michael Goonan sender hjem noen, og blir så urolig for sin egen besøkelsestid. KC syns stadig det er vanskelig å være med Theo når Kaz er der. Nathan tar farvel med Tommy før han blir sendt til stranden for å ta imot den neste eksen.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Kori Gets the Hump
programme.desc: Lockie og Megan deler sitt første kyss. Kori blir forvirret av Sofies doble signaler. Nathan frykter at Declan kan ombestemme seg.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Double Whammy
programme.desc: Kori og Lockie rammes av dobbel motgang, og SOS betyr trøbbel for kjendisene. Nathans usikkerhet blir en fordel, og Mike blir overrasket.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Theo's 'Down Under' Dilemma
programme.desc: Theo er knust etter at Kaz dro, og hans forhold med KC tilspisser seg. Lockie og Sofie krangler, og en ny eks gir oppstyr.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: A shock elimination forces both teams to regroup. Guitarist Joe Perry and singer Estelle are among the dinner guests.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants take part in an ingredient crossword challenge. Kid-friendly items must be incorporated into dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining contestants are tasked with cooking their own version of a southern staple, to be judged by chef Chris Hastings.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining contestants are challenged to taste pureed baby food, with the winning team enjoying massages and a nice lunch.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The newly reformed teams try to impress their celebrity diners, but another tough dinner service leads to a shocking elimination.

programme.desc: Sydney og Gage bruker sine undercoverevner for å spille MC-folk for å infiltrere en meth-gjeng.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Uten en lyd

programme.desc: Walker og rangerne må stoppe en gjeng som bytter stjålne diamanter mot våpen.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Vaklende rangere

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: Natalie's just moved from sleepy Roswell. This new girl figures planning the biggest bash LA Jolla has ever seen will put her on the map with the kids at school.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: Sierra (daughter singer/producer of Cee-Lo) is a little diva who wants what she wants, which includes having a Sweet 15 party so she can be the first among her friends to celebrate their coming of age.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1978 Cadillac Sedan DeVille
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen Niles Cadillac Sedan DeVille. Nile ruller hjem i en mørkerosa metallic bil med bagasjerommet fullt av nye sko.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1986 Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Logans Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. Logan ruller hjem med basketgulv og lakk i to farger.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1992 Honda Civic
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Christines Honda Civic. Tre dager etter at avsnittet med Christine ble sendt, døde en nær slektning av magekreft.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1990 Mitsubishi Mirage
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Antwons Mitsubishi Mirage. Antwon ruller hjem på 18-tommersdekk og med et akvarium i baksetet.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Mandy Moore, Eliza Dushku, Todd Oldham, Oscar de la Joya, Ashton Kutcher
programme.desc: Eliza Dushku is mistaken for a shoplifter. Mandy Moore & Todd Oldham do a little bit of crib crashing - literally! Oscar De La Hoya steps into the ring for some Punk'd style rounds.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Jessica Alba, Wilmer Valderama, Tom Arnold, Ashton
programme.desc: Jessica Alba is tormented by a naked shopper, thinking that the SUV belongs to Ashton, a jealous boyfriend in a love triangle feud destroys Wilmer Valderrama's SUV and Tom Arnold drops off his brat kid with Ashton's newly hired assistant.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Kevin Richardson (Backstreet Boys), Seth Greene
programme.desc: The Backstreet Boys' Kevin & Trishelle from Real World Las Vegas get caught in building security. Seth Green gets stung when Ashton's celeb craps game gets raided. Punk'd takes over a tattoo parlor.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Jessica Biel, Jessica Simpson, Nick Lachey
programme.desc: Charges are threatened on unsuspecting Jessica Biel when she agrees to watch a fan's kid, Jessica Simpson's long-lost relatives show up on her doorstep asking for money and customers are treated badly by valets when they come to pick up their cars.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ryan O'Malley
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo og Chanel viser sinnssykt morsomme Redneck Good Times, Nutflix og Double Whammies. Ryan O'Malley, hoppestokkmester, viser frem sportens gode og dårlige sider, og du får se hvorfor du aldri bør snu ryggen til en lama!

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Train
programme.desc: Prime Minister Larya of Svardia is working to establish democracy, but is unaware that his personal protege, Deputy Premier Pavel, plans to set up a dictatorship.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Shock
programme.desc: Enemy operative Kiri has kidnapped U.S. envoy Carl Wilson and has an imposter, Gort, who is impersonating him to discredit a U.S. trade agreement.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: A Cube Of Sugar
programme.desc: The IMF team must rescue a U.S. intelligence operative who has top-secret military plans on a microcircuit chip.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Traitor
programme.desc: An American intelligence officer, Hughes, has defected to the enemy with the only copy of an encoded top-secret message.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Psychic
programme.desc: The team must trick a crooked investment promoter into endorsing $80 million in stolen stocks and then getting them back from him.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 302
programme.desc: Louise og Michael har vokst ut av sin lille leilighet i Århus og trenger mer plass. Paret gjør et kompromiss, og Louise står overfor sitt største mareritt i huset som ekspertene kjøper til dem.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 303
programme.desc: Charlotte og Mikkel bor i en så liten leilighet at dusjen må tømmes for ting hver gang de skal bade. Men nå ønsker de å flytte litt ut av byen sammen med sønnen deres.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 304
programme.desc: Pernille og Nicklas fra Odense bor så lite at hvis de trenger litt privatliv, så har de bare toalettet å ty til. Nicklas drømmer om å få et kjøkken med to ovner, slik at han kan lage mer mat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 305
programme.desc: Wendy og Jesper fra Kalundborg bor allerede bra, i en leilighet som har en utrolig utsikt. Men en kommende familieforøkelse betyr at de må finne noe som er større.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åland (Part 2)
programme.desc: Tareq goes back to Åland to explore more of this island territory. Tareq finds a chef setting up a huge food village, sees forts left over from various invaders over the centuries, and learns about beer being recreated from 200 year old DNA.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Tornedalen
programme.desc: There are not many places like Tornedalen. A rushing river has provided for locals for centuries, and the very fertile land has yielded amazing crops for centuries.Tareq explores the traditions and the food that are part of the short summer season.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: North Jutland
programme.desc: At the northern-most part of Denmark, you are always close to raw, beautiful nature, and incredible sunlight that has drawn artists here for over 100 years. Tareq visits a salt maker using medieval techniques and experiences the magic light of Skagen.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: East Denmark
programme.desc: East Denmark contains some of Denmark’s most fertile lands, and many traditional farmers are converting to organic production and winning awards for their cheeses and wine. Tareq bikes through an area of limestone cliffs and Viking ships.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kristianstad
programme.desc: Located in Sweden’s south, beautiful Kristianstad is a 400-year old town surrounded by the ocean, fertile farmland and protected wetlands to aid the environment. Tareq makes his own chocolate and learns all about the art of eel-fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Southwest Jutland
programme.desc: Tareq visits Sydvestjylland – a unique area in Denmark filled with endless contrasts. Many food innovators are using the surrounding environment to take old traditions and apply them to the 21st century.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Nynäshamn
programme.desc: Sunny Nynäshamn is a resort town close to Stockholm, but there is more here than the sea. Tareq meets a prize-winning chocolate maker using ingredients from her garden, visits a thriving local food market, and gets a lesson in how to smoke fish.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Røros
programme.desc: Born as a mining town in the 17th century, Røros is now a center for local and organic food producers. Tareq tries dairy products which Michelin-starred chefs swear by, goes skiing and sledding around Røros many hilly streets

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Family Means Family
programme.desc: Feststemning råder når Jay overraskende kommer på party-besøk. Charlottes følelser for Gaz går opp og ned, Vicky sjekker og konkurransene om tittelen superpuler går så det suser når alle jeneter i Sydney er på radaren til Scotty og Gaz - supergutta!

programme.title: Geordie Shore: House Divides
programme.desc: James og Gaz krangler om krafttaket, noe som får alle Geordierne til å tilte helt og Gaz tvinges å forlate huset. Men er det å bli bortvist så ille? Gaz og Scotty unngår straffen og oppdager hva som virkelig fins i Australias krattskog.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Vicky Meets Dan
programme.desc: Mens Australias mest veltrente fyr sender jentene til himmels og klubblivet tar en stygg vending, drar Gary inn i bushen. Charlotte får en åpenbaring, Vicky kommer i ekstase og Scotty T nyter straffen sin ørlite gran for mye.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Anger Management
programme.desc: Gruppen får undervisning i sinnemestring, og Charlotte slipper ut alle sine negative følelser for Gaz. Sophie og Joel blir for fulle og skjemmer ut gruppen i løpet av en utekveld.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Pie Shop Argument
programme.desc: James og Garys utfall mot hverandre sender sjokkbølger gjennom huset og Charlotte mykner og kommer til Garys forsvar. En hemmelig singeltur til Whitsundays ender i katastofe og gutta må ta tak i en lite hyggelig penisblokkering.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Goodbye Australia
programme.desc: Tiden i Sydney er i ferd med å ta slutt og singlene gjør det til sitt kall å få en stormende kveld på Whitsunday-øyene. Vickey og Fit Dan har en pågående date. Får Gary og Charlotte avsluttet en gang for alle?

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 504
programme.desc: Vi møter Mike, Vinny og Deena som snakker om da Vinny kom tilbake til strandhuset, om Mikes forhold til Paula og Paulys forhold til...vel, alle andre. Og vi får en snikkikk på neste episode!

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 507
programme.desc: Det er damenes aften og Jenni, Sammi, Snooki og Deena skravler om Jennis kjærlighetstrøbbel med Roger, om kjøttbollegreier og Guidette-problemer. Og vi får en snikkikk på hva vi har i vente.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Gym, Tan, Look Back
programme.desc: Jerseygjengen tar et tilbakeblikk på sin reise sammen de siste tre årene. Amerikas yndlingssamboere forteller i intervjuer sine unike historier om uforglemmelige øyeblikk. Og en sniktitt på sesong 6 er med.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Once More Unto the Beach
programme.desc: Alle kommer til strandhuset en siste gang. The Situation forteller ærlig om rehabiliteringen og Snooki må møte den utfordringen det er å være gravid i et hus skapt for festing og moro.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: No Shame, Good Integrity
programme.desc: Romkameratene installerer seg i strandhuset og Deena må takle å være adskilt fra kjæresten sin. Nicole kommer med en kunngjøring som sjokkerer hele huset.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Toxic Shots Syndrome
programme.desc: Snooki flytter ut av strandhuset for seg selv og Dina sliter uten kjøttbollen sin. Mike må takle baksiden av rehabiliteringen etter å ha fått behandling av en lege.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Blues, Balls, & Brawls
programme.desc: Jenny planlegger en overraskelsesfest på Rogers bursdag som faller litt i fisk. Deena prøver ut Danny som kjøttbolle. Vennegjengen befinner seg plutselig midt i et digert basketak på klubben og en av dem meies ned i håndgemengen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Pressure Cooker
programme.desc: De siste jentene sendes snart hjem og noen som er i faresonen må lære seg den berømte DCC-entréen, men treningen øker ikke akkurat deres sjanser til å komme på laget.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Game Day
programme.desc: Jentene har en siste sjanse før deres skjebne avgjøres. Drømmer begynner å bli til virkelighet når jentene poserer for lagbildet. Det bys på fantastisk dans når show-gruppen og resten av troppen opptrer for første gang.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Journey Begins
programme.desc: Følg med og se hvem som kommer til å klare de vanskeligste danseuttakene i sportsverdenen. 500 kvinner satser alt for drømmen om å bli en av de berømte Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders for 2014-2015-sesongen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dancing For Your Life
programme.desc: 55 jenter i toppklasse har kommet seg til finalen, noe som bekymrer de 30 veteranene som nå må kjempe for en plass i troppen. Kitty Carter holder ikke tilbake når hun forbereder jentene på å danse sine soloer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Welcome to Valley Ranch
programme.desc: Når treningsleiren åpner med 43 kvinner, blir presset stort! Kellis entusiasme er smittsom, men det første møtet er også opprørende. Forventningene er skyhøye. Syv jenter må eliminieres for at troppen skal bestå av 36.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: A Week Of Firsts
programme.desc: Frykt griper treningsleirkandidatene når de innser at de må klare DCCs benspark og hoppspagat for første gang. Å lande så unaturlig krever stor tro på seg selv.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Jake in Exile
programme.desc: An Australian Shepherd/Pit Bull Mix has severe aggression problems towards women. A Boxer is an expert escape artist, able to jump the 6 foot backyard fence. Her owners are concerned for her safety.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: The Language of Scrout
programme.desc: A Doberman Mix has taken control of his family home; an animal communicator calls for back-up with her Doberman Pinscher; and a comedienne enlists Cesar's help for her two temperamental rescue dogs.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Fear of Dogs
programme.desc: After being attacked by a dog as a boy, a man must learn to overcome his fear of dogs for the sake of his career and his wife and children. Cesar is called in to exorcise Ernesto’s fear.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Lotus Blossoms
programme.desc: A jealous dachshund learns to get along with both of his owners. Can Cesar exorcize a demon possessed German Shepherd that prevents his people from entering certain rooms of the house.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: The Red Zone
programme.desc: Two new sibling dogs fight over everything, from food to toys. Facing the possibility of giving up one of the pooches, Cesar travels south to end the civil war between the two dueling pit bulls.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Madonna
programme.desc: MacGyver and the kids at the Challenge Center discover the meaning of Christmas when they befriend a mysterious homeless woman.

programme.title: MacGyver: Two Times Trouble
programme.desc: MacGyver investigates a series of accidents befalling his childhood friend, Roxy Yeats, who fears her twin sister is behind the mishaps.

programme.title: MacGyver: Serenity
programme.desc: When everybody begins making demands on his time, an agitated and exhausted MacGyver escapes to the tranquil-sounding town of Serenity, Montana…and the year 1867.

programme.title: MacGyver: Live And Learn
programme.desc: MacGyver volunteers to serve as a role model for a 16-year-old potential dropout and teach the boy the value of an education.

programme.title: MacGyver: Log Jam
programme.desc: MacGyver goes undercover in a logging camp to investigate possible lumber smuggling by a ruthless Japanese businessman.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The wives try to spend more quality time with their men by challenging Willie and his brothers to a "frogging" competition; Si and Miss Kay interrupt John Luke and Mary Kate's preparations for college.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie visits a friend in Nashville, Tenn.; new college students John Luke and Mary Kate are dropped off at Liberty University; River enlists the family to help him make a ninja movie.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertson family throws a party for Willie and Korie's 25th anniversary; Jase blames Uncle Si after he receives a parking ticket.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie asks a local chainsaw artist to make a statue for him; Jep and Jessica attempt to help Kay with her hoarding by selling some of her items online.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Reed proposes to his girlfriend, inspiring Jase to get romantic with Missy; Uncle Si senses a business opportunity when Willie gets recruited to be a guest lecturer at one of Sadie's classes.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase must rid the neighborhood of a pesky beaver; Willie and Si argue over which of them makes the better driving instructor after Little Will receives his learner's permit.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase and Jep argue over who should inherit their grandfather's old rifle; Willie and Korie rehearse a Taiwanese engagement ceremony with Rebecca as she prepares to travel to Taiwan with her fiancé.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A love triangle develops involving a mild-mannered man, a tough female prospector and her long-lost husband.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: A Papa for Butch and Ginger
programme.desc: Wyatt's deputy, Shotgun Gibbs, runs off a saddle bum who was hassling a pretty young widow who had hired him to help her go to Colorado.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: When Claypool swindles McSween out of his gold mine, storekeeper Hobart has an idea for retribution.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: It Had to Happen
programme.desc: After Bat's shirt sleeve is hit by a bullet from a gunman Earp had hit in the shoulder, Mayor Kelley tell Earp he must shoot to kill which causes him to have second thoughts about his job.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A minister's attempts to rebuild a church in Carson City are blocked by a saloon owner.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Clay Allison
programme.desc: Pete Albright tries to hire gunfighter Clay Allison to kill Earp to open up Dodge City. Allison won't take money but is willing to kill Earp.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Townspeople plan a vendetta when a Mexican outlaw is accused of killing four miners.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A former prospector is hired by a young woman to find her fiancé, who became lost in the mountains.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' morer Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg i parkeringsanlegg med 'Garasjegøy', ser at avløpsåpnere kan brukes til mer enn kun nummer to i 'Mangefasetterte avløpsåpnere' og lurer døden i 'Nesten knust'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg noen ordentlige 'Foreldreoverraskelser', ruller med noen skikkelig 'Dediserte inlineløpere' og mister litt kontroll i 'Radioustyrlige'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' gjemmer Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Carly Aquilino drinken for Drikketyver', ser nye merkelige antrekk i 'Bærbare rariteter' og får andrehånds skrubbsår av trafikanter som følger regelen 'Se i begge retninger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og gjest Carly Aquilino trappene med barn som gjør noen 'Mini-feilsteg', tester senger med 'Madrassprøving' og lokaliserer alle de løse skruene i 'Oppussingsanger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XL
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' avdekker Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood farene med døråpninger i 'Dørdengt' før de drar til havs på 'Kræsjcruise' og avslutter med noen mestere i forkledning i 'Bykamuflasje'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slåss Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino mot vinden i 'Aggressiv luft', sliter med spisepinnene i 'Fomlepinner' og viser fram rare evner i 'Ferdigheter er ferdigheter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino nærmere på utsatte besteforeldre i 'Barnebarnskader', får ødelagt humøret av 'Stemningssenkere' og har det gøy med litt 'Landsens avslapping'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran sjansen på å ta seg en lur i 'Blottlagte blunder', finner nye bruksområder i tillegg til hockey i 'Nyttekøller' og får seg en trøkk fra oven med 'Takattakk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg en kakk i hodet når de er 'Uten høydebevissthet', får multitaskingeksamen ved 'Simultankapasitets-universitetet og betrakter barn som dras i 'Hunder med barneslep'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino litt konkurransesugne i 'Utilsiktede hjulskader', opplever T-banekaos på 'Ville tog' og morer seg stort med 'Skjelettkompiser'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Stolthet før fallet
programme.desc: Dylan oppdager at kjæresten til Beka var Drago Musevini, og han brukte Bekas DNA til å skape Nietzscheans.

programme.title: Andromeda: Måneskinn blir deg
programme.desc: Beka og Rhade finner en test som enten gir dem stor rikdom eller driver dem til galskap.

programme.title: Andromeda: Fortiden er Prolix
programme.desc: Harper oppdager et program som kan ødelegge åtte av Seefra-planetene og drepe millioner.

programme.title: Andromeda: Motstandene av tiltrekning
programme.desc: Mens Harper jobber på en måte å redde Seefra-systemet, smyger en spion ombord Andromeda og angriper Beka.

programme.title: Andromeda: Sparer lys fra en svart sol
programme.desc: Det blir gjort et forsøk på å fikse den blinkende solen til Seefra, men Trance blir erstattet av en dobbeltganger.

programme.title: Andromeda: Total tilbakekalling
programme.desc: Når Dylan er hardt skadet i en laboratorieeksplosjon, reiser han gjennom en rekke alternative virkeligheter.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: When Washington, DC is plagued by a series of arson fires — each started with the same type of incendiary device — it's up to forensic scientists to find the clues that lay in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High 'n Dry
programme.desc: When Genell Plude is found dead in her bathroom, the scene points to suicide. But a coroner's inquest and a unique application of forensic science give investigators a different explanation for her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Faced with three homicides that appear to be professional executions, investigators on both sides of the Atlantic must find a common thread between the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The device is so powerful that it embedded shrapnel in houses across the street. The bomber had not only knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-be Killer
programme.desc: A killer tries to incinerate everything that could link him to his crime. But in doing so, he inadvertently creates new forensic evidence. Detectives employ a technique never before used in a criminal investigation to bring it to light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: The prime suspect had a criminal record and his driver's license was found at the scene of a brutal double homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Was it an accident, an unexplained illness or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: When a car was found in a drainage ditch with two bodies inside, a fingertip torn from a latex glove would point investigators to both the crime scene and the killer.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 1
programme.desc: This episode includes: Tami Lynn, Hudson Valley UFO (Pts. 1 & 2) and Daredevil Doe & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 2
programme.desc: This episode includes: Love Triangle & UD, Champ, Pierre's Amnesia & UD, UD: Honky Tonk Woman, Killer Kranz & UD and Memphis Kidnap & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 3
programme.desc: This episode includes: Arson King, Huey Long (Pts. 1 & 2) & UD and Brother X & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 4
programme.desc: This episode includes: Cop Killer Escape & UD, Mexico Suicide & UD, Is Ed Dead?, UD: Coffee Pot Twins and Next Most Wanted & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: Dear Patricia & UD, Lucie's Last Fare & UD, Unknown Mom & UD and Little Miss Panasoffkee & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: Dreams Come True, New Orleans Killer, Comic Relief & UD and J.D. Method & UD.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brutal Abduction
programme.desc: A Chicago street gang thought they had figured out how to kidnap people for ransom again and again, and never get caught. But their one mistake was they underestimated the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Above the Law
programme.desc: California Highway Patrolman George Gwaltney discovered the body of 23-year-old Robin Bishop near her car on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Predator
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Perfect Heist
programme.desc: Bank robbery is a brazen yet simple crime. A mask, a gun, a note passed to a teller. But bank burglary is different. It takes skill to disable an alarm, to penetrate a locked vault.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death in Alaska
programme.desc: The day began like any other for Cheryl and Paul Chapman, until the silence of a peaceful Sunday morning was shattered with a phone call.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Raw Greed
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Grave Secrets
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The New Detectives: The Unforgotten
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Presumed Dead
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Three hairs, microscopic fibers, a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Flames Of Justice
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Bump In The Bingo Hall
programme.desc: The team head out to Blackpool for a day out at the seaside that they will never forget. Investigating one of Blackpool's iconic buildings The Empire Bingo Hall. Many famous acts have played here and it seems that some may have never left.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Night Before The Storm
programme.desc: In this special episode, it's the night before Sean and Bex are joined by their celebrity guest and they check out The Black Horse in Pluckley Village to investigate the paranormal hauntings at the most haunted pub in the UK.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 1
programme.desc: The team heads to Lincolnshire to investigate the Village Farm Museum. This location looks out of place, being in the middle of a residential housing estate.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 2
programme.desc: This fascinating location sees a twist in the activity with Bex and Sean getting more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Brookside
programme.desc: Multiple ghostly sightings have been reported that could be connected to the close, but what will Sean and Bex encounter during the day for a special Ghost Dimension Lock Down investigation?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Stockport to investigate a haunted mill, which has a lift with a mind all of its own. Will any of the ghosts haunting the mill join him on the investigation tonight or will it all go pear shaped?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did The Babysitter Abuse My Child?
programme.desc: Stephanie says that ever since she came home from work to find her 1-year-old with a black eye, she has feared that her children's babysitter harms them. Sitter Cheryl denies some serious accusations about a child.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: We Can't Live Like This
programme.desc: Thornton says he can't trust his cheating girlfriend Crystal and wants her to take a lie detector test! Plus, Stephanie wants to prove to her husband Mathew that she's not having sex with her own family member! She wants the accusations put to rest.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I'm Raising Him, But Is He Mine?
programme.desc: Deshawn claims that his ex Lynette abandoned their 5-year-old son. But she claims that he is keeping her from their child. However, Deshawn recently found out that he isn't listed on his son's birth certificate, so he wants a DNA test!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Know About the Affair, But Is He the Father?
programme.desc: Stephanie gave birth to a baby boy and believes Brandon is the father. But Brandon claims he didn't find out about the child until three years later and denies being the father. Stephanie and her mother want Brandon to step up.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Gets The Real Update
programme.desc: Megan wanted to find out if her boyfriend Devin was cheating. But even darker relationship secrets surface! Plus, you'll be shocked to find out why Laura and Steven need Steve's help again!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Falsely Accused of Molestation?
programme.desc: Desmond believes that his ex Cassandra is making up a story about him touching their child because she's jealous of his new fiancée. And later, Tammy has been investigated for child abuse and even accused of locking her kids in a closet.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Stuck In A Coffin
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a five-alarm fire, first responders discover a lifeless body. When Kenda learns that the deadly blaze was no accident, he launches a manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Highway
programme.desc: One is dead and two are in critical condition, and it’s up to Kenda and Barry to find out why a gun battle occurred in a quaint family home.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Comes Knocking
programme.desc: Neighbors are aghast when Ernestine Addison and her teen son Bobby are gunned down in cold blood. The case heats up when Kenda receives word that the killer’s murderous rampage isn’t over just yet.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lock the Door
programme.desc: Soon after the lifeless body of Charlie Tuttle was discovered behind a locked bedroom door, his death was ruled a suicide. But six months later, Kenda receives an unprompted confession .

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Officer Down
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda is faced with his worst nightmare when he learns a friend and fellow officer, Mark Dabling, has been killed in the line of duty.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A daughter wants to surprise her dad with breakfast in bed but finds him unresponsive. His family is convinced they know what killed him, but Dr. G must let the evidence speak for itself.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A teacher excuses himself for a nap after dinner, but he never wakes up. The man has a complex medical history that leads Dr. G on a hunt for an explanation for his mysterious death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A woman fears the worst when her aunt stops answering her calls. When her greatest fear is confirmed, Dr. G must determine one thing: was this a fatal fall?

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A woman is killed in a drunk driving accident. At first, her death seems to be an open-and-shut case, but Dr. G discovers clues that the woman may have played a key role in her own death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A mother of infant twins notices that her son is not breathing. EMTs attempt to revive him, but it's too late. Now, Dr. G must work fast to determine if the other twin's life is in danger.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories: Kelly Osbourne
programme.desc: Kelly Osbourne enlists psychic medium Kim Russo to help her solve a series of paranormal mysteries she experienced at a notoriously haunted Hollywood hotel.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories: Taye Diggs
programme.desc: Taye Diggs returns to a New York City theatre with psychic medium Kim Russo to investigate an unforgettable paranormal encounter he experienced years ago.

programme.title: A Haunting: Echoes from the Grave
programme.desc: Ron and Nancy learn their house is a way station between life and death.

programme.title: A Haunting: Darkness Follows
programme.desc: A girl commits suicide and her spirit haunts the new tenants.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 1
programme.desc: Unsolved Mysteries covers crimes, paranormal events, tales of lost love, UFO's, and unexplained history. This episode includes: Thumbs & Update, Marsh & Update, Conway, Honeymoon Bones and Dottie.

programme.title: Mutant X: Meaning of Death
programme.desc: Når en pest som bare rammer mutanter raser, blir Adam og Eckhart enige om å samarbeide for å finne en kur.

programme.title: Mutant X: Lit Fuse
programme.desc: Eckhart søker en mutant som kan absorbere energi, en som Brennan blir romantisk involvert med.

programme.title: Mutant X: In the Presence of Mine Enemies
programme.desc: Jesse blir forelsket i en datamaskinhacker, som Eckhart vil 'anskaffe' for å ødelegge de offentlige datanyhetskanalene mot nye mutanter ... og GSAs fordel.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Thank You Very Much
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel drar til Tyskland for å finne en tapt Elvis Presley-gitar.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Transformation
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel og Derek Lloyd drar til den peruanske jungelen for å lete etter Paracelsus-rullene som inneholder formelen for å gjøre bly til gull.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Flag Day
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel drar til Larivee, California for å finne Pioneer's Bear Flag.

programme.title: On the Case: The Green Dragon
programme.desc: A four year old boy's terrifying discovery sends police on the hunt for a vicious killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Offer
programme.desc: After coming to the aid of a stranded roommate, Stephanie Brown's car is found abandoned on the interstate and her body is later discovered floating in an irrigation ditch, the victim of sexual assault and murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Dreams and Nightmares
programme.desc: An 18-year-old woman is murdered the night before her college career is about to begin.

programme.title: On the Case: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: John Greathouse finds his stepdaughter, Kelli Bailey, murdered in her bedroom; investigators find a video tape and a dead man's forged check and hope these clues will be the keys to bringing Bailey's cold-blooded killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case: Gone in an Instant
programme.desc: In Lenexa, Kansas, young women disappear from their apartments as police piece together evidence showing the terrifying crimes are connected.

programme.title: On the Case: Blood and Betrayal
programme.desc: A military police officer is found murdered in her own home, sending police on a twisted journey for answers.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Rob Riggle
programme.desc: Rob Riggle joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover topics like the news of a potential "Dumb and Dumber 3" and the couple that opted for mashed potato powder instead of rice at their wedding.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Jennette McCurdy
programme.desc: Jennette McCurdy, author of the best-selling memoir, "I'm Glad My Mom Died," has a very honest and revealing conversation with Drew.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Phoebe Robinson, Design Under $30, National Teacher’s Day
programme.desc: Podcast host Phoebe Robinson joins Drew to help solve some dilemmas in “Drew’s and Don’ts.” Comedian Michelle Collins and Drew play “Change My Mind: Reality TV Edition.” Drew celebrates Nat'l Teacher’s Day with Bronx middle school teacher Jamel Holmes.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: James Corden, “Drew’s Love Bug” Dating Apps, The Weekender
programme.desc: James Corden gets candid on hosting a daily show. Drew dives into the world of dating apps enlisting a dating expert to share tips in the latest installment of “Drew’s Love Bug.” Drew gives a curated list of her favorite picks in “The Weekender.”

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Joe Manganiello, Adam Sandler, Money Talk with Carmen Rita Wong
programme.desc: "Archenemy" star Joe Manganiello chats with Drew. Drew shares some never before seen moments from her chat with Adam Sandler. Personal finance expert Carmen Rita Wong shares tips. Drew tries out some weird food combos with TikTok star Eitan Bernath.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Nikki Glaser, Retro Cooking, Shirley Temples With 7-Year-Old Shirley Temple King

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: Cops: Multiple Identities
programme.desc: Officers recover a baggie of drugs from a crying suspect. A drunk woman hides a second ID in her back pocket. Police stop a vehicle that hit a patrol car.

programme.title: Cops: Donut Pursuit
programme.desc: Officers pursue a truck after a donut shop robbery. Deputies are dispatched when a wife attacks her husband with an unknown object. Deputies respond to a mother and son knife fight.

programme.title: Cops: Kick the Car
programme.desc: Officers intervene when an estranged husband kicks his ex-wife's boyfriend's car. A man claims someone gave him the car he is driving. A woman claims the pills in her purse are not hers.

programme.title: Cops: Maybe it's Sugar
programme.desc: Police conduct a sting operation. A woman is covered in white powder during a traffic stop. Officers spot a young boy on a bike who wandered away from home.

programme.title: Cops: Not a Momma's Boy
programme.desc: Officers are called to fight between a mother and her son. Officers respond to a man on a trolley hurling racial slurs at a passenger. A traffic stop uncovers narcotics in a young man's trunk.

programme.title: Cops: All Aboard!
programme.desc: Officers pursue a truck driving backwards on a freeway. A suspect jumps a train to evade police. A woman claims to be disabled when a pill falls from her pocket.

programme.title: Cops: To the Lighthouse
programme.desc: Officers are called to a restaurant after the owner was held at gunpoint. Police respond to a woman being sexually harassed in a park. A drunk man tells police he is going to buy a lighthouse.

programme.title: Cops: Get a Room
programme.desc: A man claims to be protecting the car he broke into. Officers are called to when a couple gets too friendly while out in public. Police are dispatched when a drunk woman pounds on her neighbor's door.

programme.title: Cops: Connect Four
programme.desc: Deputies assist border patrol in pursuit of a vehicle that has blown both a checkpoint and its tires. A drunk woman is pulled over not knowing she is missing a tire.

programme.title: Cops: When Ya Gotta Go
programme.desc: A man urinating in public flees from police on foot. A handgun is found in the vehicle of a driver who claims to be a student leaving class. Deputies find drugs in a man's car.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Mysterious Murder at the Farm (Valerie Bary Case)
programme.desc: On Friday, March 26, 2004, in the region of Dijon, Laurent Bary came home from his work to discover the lifeless body of his wife, Valerie, bathing in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Triple Murders in Vise
programme.desc: On May 17th 2005, a body is discovered in a forest of Sucy-en-Brie; Christophe Belle, 40 years old, a renowned pastry cook.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Mathilde Croguenne Case
programme.desc: In the early hours of the morning, Mathilde Croguennec, 18, attending \"Teknival\" in Brittany, is found at the foot of a tree with her throat cut. Investigators face the task of finding the killer among the 43,000 participants of this festival

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: In Search of SK1 - Akira Ojima Case
programme.desc: On October 13th 1996, the body of young Angélique Dumetz, 18 years old, is recovered down a ditch in Oise forest. An important clue is found on the crime scene.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 706
programme.desc: I mai 2017 ble småbarnsfaren Filip Viking funnet skutt i Katrineholm. Vitner skynder seg bort til ham og i forbindelse med forsøkene på å redde Filips liv, klarer de å se en lang svartkledd mann løpe fra åstedet.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 405
programme.desc: To reindriftsutøvere fra Vest Finnmark havner i politiets søkelys etter å ha innrapportert flere hundre rovdyrskadde reinsdyr. Kan det virkelig være slik at de to har mishandlet dyrene sine for å motta erstatning?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: I juli 2022 rystes Mölndal da en død mann blir funnet halvt avkledd, brennemerket og med en båndopptaker plassert på kroppen. Politiet mistenker at noe langt mer urovekkende enn et vanlig drap har funnet sted.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 201
programme.desc: En augustdag i 1996 blir den 20 år gamle hotellarbeideren Trude Espås observert sittende på en stein ikke langt unna Geiranger sentrum. 11 dager senere blir hun funnet drept.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 203
programme.desc: Den tidligere artisten, flammeslukeren og TV-danseren Julio Kopseng lever et omsvermet liv i Oslos dansemiljø. Da han blir anmeldt for en voldtekt i 2013 utløses et skred av voldtektsanmeldelser mot ham.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 104
programme.desc: 10. august 2019 opplevde Norge nok et rystende terrorangrep. 21 år gamle Philip Manshaus dreper først sin 17 år gamle stesøster. Bevæpnet, og med uniform går han deretter til angrep mot Al-Noor moskeen i Bærum.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Promises of Someday
programme.desc: Catherine is disturbed when she begins to suspect the new attorney in her office is a fraud... and more disturbed when she finds him looking for the entrance to Vincent's world.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Down to a Sunless Sea
programme.desc: Catherine fails to heed Vincent's warnings about her dangerous former law-school beau.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Fever
programme.desc: After Mouse discovers a ship's gold and gemstones treasure buried beneath the city, Vincent's community is torn apart by greed and strife.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Everything is Everything
programme.desc: A Romani boy clears his father's name and regains the love and trust of his grandparents with Vincent and Catherine's help.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: To Reign in Hell
programme.desc: Vincent prepares for a battle to the death after Catherine is kidnapped by a giant warrior.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Quality of Mercy
programme.desc: A gung-ho young soldier gets a new viewpoint on war when he inexplicably changes places with a Japanese officer trying to stop his superior from leading a charge against American forces.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Mind of Simon Foster
programme.desc: In an impoverished future, Simon Foster goes to a pawnshop to sell some personal items to raise money for rent. The shop owner offers to buy some of his memories. In Simon Foster's life, what could be possibly be valuable?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Wall
programme.desc: A U.S. military experiment opens a portal to an unknown place. After sending through one team, the Army calls upon a career soldier to investigate, where he finds an idyllic planet. He has to decide whether to stay or go back to his old life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: A shy woman finds that a cat is actually a cursed "Casanova." She falls for the man but finds that her Prince Charming is actually a scoundrel.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Rendezvous in a Dark Place
programme.desc: An old woman with an obsession with death attends funerals for entertainment. One night when an injured thief breaks into her home, she lets him die and waits for Death to come and collect him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nothing in the Dark
programme.desc: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: One More Pallbearer
programme.desc: Paul Radin has invited three people to join him in his bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Dead Man's Shoes
programme.desc: A vagrant steps into a murdered gangster's expensive shoes and is taken over by the dead man's ghost, who vows to remain on Earth to seek revenge against his killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hunt
programme.desc: On a hunting trip, Hyder Simpson and his dog Rip dive into a lake after a raccoon. When he gets home he finds that no one can see or hear him.

programme.title: JAG: Pilot, Part 1 & 2
programme.desc: A woman radar-intercept officer (RIO) disappears at night from an aircraft carrier in the Adriatic Sea. Two JAG lawyers, Lt. Harm Rabb and Lt. Caitlin Pike, investigate and solve. Harm, a former Naval aviator, unexpectedly becomes a hero.

programme.title: JAG: Shadow
programme.desc: A civilian tech rep aboard a submarine seizes control of an experimental torpedo after its launch during an exercise

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Three Navy lieutenants die by homicide in 11 months around Washington. Harm and Meg investigate

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Due to a human error in an exercise, artillery fire injures seven Marines, one of whom later dies.

programme.title: Happy Days: Open House

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Car

programme.title: Happy Days: You Go To My Head

programme.title: Happy Days: Goin' to Chicago

programme.title: Happy Days: The Cunningham Caper

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Frenzied Killing
programme.desc: Flere mennesker blir drept i 1944 enn noen gang før på Auschwitz. Nazistene prøver å så forvirring blant de allierte i øst, og de vestlige allierte tar beslutninger om å forhandle med nazistene om jødene og bombe leiren.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: The activities of nations after World War I that lead to World War II.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Hitler's Killer Police
programme.desc: In Ukraine and Lithuania, Nazi invaders were welcomed as liberators. In Lithuania, Antanas Gecas led a militia that executed hundreds of Jews. Ukrainian nationalists participated in pogroms slaughtering 34,000 Jews in two days.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The Gatling Gun, designed to change 19th-century battlefields, now reigns supreme in the skies as a high-speed offensive weapon. With a 150-year legacy of havoc it continues to be a formidable force.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Corruption
programme.desc: I 1943 er korrupsjonen løpsk på Auschwitz-Birkenau. Leiren får også en ny inntektskilde – klær og verdifulle eiendeler tatt fra jøder som kommer for å bli gasset.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Jul
programme.desc: I et forsøk på å pifte opp julen med et utradisjonelt tre, kommer Spencer til å sette fyr på alle Carlys gaver. Fortvilet ønsker hun seg at hun hadde en normal bror.

programme.title: iCarly: Kysset
programme.desc: Sam overhører Freddie fortelle Carly at han aldri har kysset en jente, og avslører hemmeligheten hans på netshowet. Gibby og Carly trener Spencer til utttaket for det lokale, profesjonelle fotballaget.

programme.title: iCarly: Bilbråk
programme.desc: Gjengen holder en konkurranse på iCarly, og premien er en ny bil fra en lokal forhandler. Etter at Nevel vinner, oppdager barna at forhandleren ikke visste noe om konkurransen eller bilen de skulle ha donert bort som premie.

programme.title: iCarly: Fred
programme.desc: Freddie sier offentlig at han ikke er fan av internettsensasjonen Fred, noe som får Fred til å meddele at han skal slutte å legge ut filmer for alltid. Fansen blir rasende fordi Freddie har forårsaket slutten på de populære filmene.

programme.title: iCarly: Dobbelt opp
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie sniker seg ut for å dra til en MMA-kamp, får de sine dobbeltgjengere til å lure Spencer til å tro at de fortsatt er hjemme. Imens bygger Spencer en kjempeversjon av Newton Balls.

programme.title: iCarly: Om hva for noe?
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie oppfordrer iCarly-fans til å stemme på David Archuleta i "Amerika Sings", syns de synd på nummer to og hjelper ham med å lage en musikkvideo.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg skal gjøre Sam jentete
programme.desc: Da Sam innrømmer at hun liker en gutt på skolen, lærer Carly henne hvordan hun kan lokke ham til seg ved å oppføre seg mere feminint. Spencer er overbevist om at en jente liker ham pga. smokingen hans, så han går med den hele tiden.

programme.title: iCarly: A date en pøbel del 1
programme.desc: Når Carly dater er en tøffing, prøver hun å holde forholdet skjult for Spencer. Og Sam betaler Freddie for å lage en hjemmeside der hun kan legge ut alle sine ekle videofavoritter.

programme.title: iCarly: Gjenforening med Missy
programme.desc: Da Carlys gamle venninne Missy flytter tilbake til Seattle, tror Sam at Missy prøver å skifte henne ut som Carlys bestevenninne.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg må ha skap 239
programme.desc: Når Sam og Freddie begge to vinner konkurransen for skolens beste skap, slir de nødt til å dele skap. Carly ber Spencer gi henne timer i billedkunst.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly utdelingen
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie holder en iCarly-galla for de beste bruker-bidragene i iCarly, og hyller pristagerne live på web-showet. Spencer verver europeiske badedraktmodeller for å hjelpe ham å lage premiestatuettene.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Thin Ice
programme.desc: C-46 and DC-4 crews race against the spring melt to fly mining equipment to an airstrip on a frozen lake. Jeremy tries to catch up to fellow rampies Audrey and Wilf.

programme.desc: After thousands of hours of painstaking preparation and dangerous flying, a terrible accident devastates the waterbomber crew in Turkey - and everyone at Buffalo.

programme.desc: When her husband quits after a blowout with Joe, Kelly is put in a terrible position. Will she stay at Buffalo - or will she go? Scott gets the news he must stand down from flying so another co-pilot can fast-track to captain.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Up In the Air
programme.desc: After her husband's acrimonious departure from Buffalo, Kelly has a confrontation that decides whether she, too, will quit. Jeremy makes a mistake that could end his Buffalo career.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Frozen Four
programme.desc: As Joe fights a Transport Canada claim against the airline, star pilot Justin is tasked with shipping an 8,000lb generator to a remote town. But a controversial decision results in the DC-4 becoming stranded and frozen solid on a High Arctic airstrip.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: When a deadly fire destroys a northern outpost a week before Christmas, Buffalo puts everything aside to come to the rescue. Cargo Manager Kelly receives a shocking diagnosis that renews her fight to quit smoking.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Les Miz
programme.desc: Vi møter vikaren fra bykjernen Mr. Garvey og A-Aron, Jordans kjæreste tar ham i å se på porno og karene har det moro med Les Mis.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The End
programme.desc: Ray Parker Jr. har noen nye låter, en mann kan ikke slutte å si "deez nuts", Keegan må ringe 112 og en ung mann lærer om Negrotown.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Slap-Ass: In Recovery
programme.desc: En baseballspiller slåss med sin avhengighet av rumpeklapsing, en mafioso tar hevn og Steve Urkel driver en mann til vanvidd.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Concussion Quarterback
programme.desc: En fotballspiller med hjerneskade prøver å inspirere laget sitt, en mann anklager sin kone for å være utro med en hund og en restauranteier skremmer bort gjestene sine.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Job Interview
programme.desc: Dommer Jessie har et nytt program, en mann venter på et jobbintervju, to damer sludrer, parkeringsvakter diskuterer Val Kilmer, en pensjonert mann fra hæren hører om et nytt prosjekt og en kvinne introduserer sin forlovede for foreldrene.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Gang Stand-Off
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer gangstere som er gale etter 'Twilight,' besøk i en verden der navn er promper, og rasistiske superhelter.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meegan & Andre Break Up
programme.desc: To venner kommer i klammeri på en klubb, Meegan og André har en seriøs samtale, en rapper går fra et intervju, Conrad flyr business class og Keegan har en ny bart.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Country Music
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer Steve Jobs' efterfølger, Ice-T, som en uoppdragen valp og Rihanna og Chris Brown prøver igjen.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Branding
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan utforsker opplevelsen som sort collegestudent og snylterne som suksess medfører. Andre sketsjer inkluderer et nabolags reaksjon på et mystisk vesen, når man kan - og ikke kan - si et kontroversielt ord.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Alien Imposters
programme.desc: Romvesener invaderer jorden, en familie forliker seg med en slektnings homobryllup og noen rasister gir uttrykk for noen overraskende meninger.

programme.title: Broad City: Getting There
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana skal ut på tur, men bare det å komme seg til flyplassen viser seg å være mye vanskeligere enn forventet.

programme.title: Broad City: Jews on a Plane
programme.desc: Abbi får mensen under en flytur, så hun og Ilana går drastisk til verks for å finne en tampong.

programme.title: Broad City: Sliding Doors
programme.desc: En vårdag i 2011 møtes Abbi og Ilana for første gang.

programme.title: Broad City: Twaining Day
programme.desc: Abbis korte tilbakekomst til Soulstice blir interessant når hun får opplæringsmuligheten som hun alltid har drømt om. I mellomtiden får Ilana en ny jobb på en restaurant.

programme.title: Broad City: Just the Tips
programme.desc: Ilana går amok med pengene hun tjente på servitørjobben, og Abbis nye forhold gjør at det lyser av henne. På fest senere den kvelden, møter jentene på en gammel venn.

programme.title: Broad City: Mushrooms
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana ruser seg på sopp og opplever en hendelsesrik trip.

programme.title: Broad City: Abbi's Mom
programme.desc: Abbis mor kommer til byen på besøk, og Ilana navigerer Sushi Mambeaux' intense arbeidskultur samtidig som hun håndterer sin sesongavhengig depresjon.

programme.title: Broad City: Witches
programme.desc: Abbi føler seg gammel etter å ha funnet et grått hår; Ilana går til en sexterapeut.

programme.title: Broad City: Florida
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana, Eliot og Bobbi drar til Florida for å rydde ut av Grandma Esthers leilighet.

programme.title: Broad City: House Sitting
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana, Jaime og Lincoln passer huset til Strands. Ilana og Lincoln definerer forholdet deres, og Abbi går på en Bumble-date med en mann fra fortiden hennes.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Tommy Hawk

programme.title: RENO 911!: Kevlar for Her

programme.title: RENO 911!: Mayor Hernandez
programme.desc: Reno's Mayor Hernandez asks the Sheriff's Department for help, and the deputies must decide whether to uphold the law or uphold local government.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Coconut Nut Clusters
programme.desc: The deputies raise money selling delicious Coconut Nut Clusters door-to-door.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Back in Black

programme.title: RENO 911!: Undercover at Burger Cousin
programme.desc: Rick the Burger Cousin manager is a cruel taskmaster when deputies go undercover flipping burgers.

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Wall
programme.desc: Garcia and Junior help build a wall to keep Mexicans from crossing into America illegally.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Death of a Pickle-Thrower
programme.desc: Jackie, the pickle-throwing hooker, spends her twilight hours with the Reno Sheriff's Department.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Baghdad 911
programme.desc: Iraqi police force cadets learn law enforcement skills from Reno's finest, and Dangle and Wiegel destroy a huge cocaine supply.

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Tanning Booth Incident
programme.desc: Dangle learns that free tanning sessions for law enforcement aren't necessarily a good thing.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Blackzilla & Playa Haters' Ball
programme.desc: Dave takes Japan by storm in the sci-fi adventure "Blackzilla," and America Undercover presents The Playa Haters' Ball.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Piss on You & The World's Greatest Wars
programme.desc: Dave presents the History Channel coverage of great inner-city gang wars from the 1980s.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Make-A-Wish & Fisticuff
programme.desc: Dave sees people's inner thoughts and freaks out when a little kid beats him at video games.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: O'Dweeds & Trading Spouses
programme.desc: Dave shows what happens when couples try "Trading Spouses" and introduces a family-friendly brand of pot; musical guest Black Star.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Samuel Jackson Beer & Racial Draft
programme.desc: Dave debuts Samuel Jackson beer and reveals major upsets in "The Racial Draft."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Negrodamus & The Niggar Family
programme.desc: Paul Mooney introduces Negrodamus, and Dave imagines a black Gallagher.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: White People Can't Dance & The Three Daves
programme.desc: Dave challenges the myth that white people can't dance.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Love Contract & True Hollywood Stories: Rick James
programme.desc: Rick James is one of the baddest mothaf**kers of all time.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: True Hollywood Stories: Prince & Red Balls Energy Drink
programme.desc: Negrodamus answers questions, and Charlie Murphy plays basketball with Prince.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Internet & Moment in the Life of Lil Jon
programme.desc: Dave walks in Lil Jon's shoes and considers the Internet's sleaziness.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: World Series of Dice & Mooney on Movies
programme.desc: The Marcy Projects hosts a champion shooter contest, and Paul Mooney talks "Gone with the Wind."

programme.title: Tosh.0: Roof Jump
programme.desc: Daniel viser hvordan man hever nivået med hashtagger og snakker med den lykkeligste og ekleste fyren i LA - og piken som vil at Internett skal betale for hennes skader, får nettoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Spoken Word Fail
programme.desc: Daniel hjelper en religiøs rapper med å gjeninnta sin plass på tronen, viser oss at det ikke finnes noen dumme spørsmål (bare dumme jenter) og prøver litt 'ganj'.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Banned from Walmart
programme.desc: Daniel kaster hestesko etter kvinner og lekker ut sine private samtaler til pressen. Desuten får USAs gjerrigste mann nettgenopprettelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Nana Nana Subaru Winner
programme.desc: Daniel avslører hvem som får hans gamle Subaru og viser oss hvorfor det aldri er trygt å besvime hjemme hos ham.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Space Shuttle Launch
programme.desc: Daniel begraver "spadejenta" for alltid, deler ut av fansens "Twisdomsord" til studentene fra 2014, og romfergefyren for nettgjenoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Perfect Game Bowler
programme.desc: Daniel webchatter med en geit - og en bowler som gikk glipp av sjansen til å få høyeste pong får nettgjenopprettelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Summertime Is Great
programme.desc: Daniel feirer slutten på sommeren med å gi en pinlig familie gjenoppreisning, jager folk som har stukket av, og viser oss sitt mest erotiske antrekk hittil.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 617
programme.desc: Daniel møter den eneste mannen i verden som liker damesport, går på lag med en opprydder på kontoret og feirer tilbakekomsten av "Er det rasistisk?"

programme.title: Tosh.0: 618
programme.desc: Tosh snakker med Vine-gangsta Bryan Silva, Big Ass Baby havner i en bedriten situasjon og Daniel lekker ut nakenbilder av fansene sine.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 619
programme.desc: Brooklyns groveste hundeekspert får gjenoppreisning, Daniel gir oss hverdagstips og "Tosh.0" nyter sommerens siste grillfest.
